name: Abjurer's Blast
descriptionHtml: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Arcane damage. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Arcane damage. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Absorb Ice
descriptionHtml:
You gain Absorb Ice, which gives you Damage Reduction 100 Frost against the triggering damage. After the damage resolves, if the caster is not you, someone allied to you or from an effect made by you or an ally, you gain Temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to the amount of damage this ability reduces.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.
requirementHtml: You're about to take Frost Damage.
requirementText: You're about to take Frost Damage.

name: Accelerando
descriptionHtml: Grant yourself or an ally +4 initiative.
descriptionText: Grant yourself or an ally +4 initiative.

name: Accelerating Strike
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Afterwards, you gain Accelerating Strike, which increases your Initiative by up to 2.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Afterwards, you gain Accelerating Strike, which increases your Initiative by up to 2.

name: Adaptive Defense
descriptionHtml: You take the Block Action. You then gain 4 Adaptive Defense (Type) which grants you Damage Reduction 4 against that damage type until the end of your next turn. You can only have one instance of Adaptive Defense at a time.
descriptionText: You take the Block Action. You then gain 4 Adaptive Defense (Type) which grants you Damage Reduction 4 against that damage type until the end of your next turn. You can only have one instance of Adaptive Defense at a time.

name: Aerial Crashdown
descriptionHtml: You and your mount crash down on the target. You move towards the target and your mount makes a Heavy attack against it. On damage, the target is knocked prone.
descriptionText: You and your mount crash down on the target. You move towards the target and your mount makes a Heavy attack against it. On damage, the target is knocked prone.
requirementHtml: You are mounted on a flying mount and the target is at least 20ft below you.
requirementText: You are mounted on a flying mount and the target is at least 20ft below you.

name: Aerial Loop
descriptionHtml: You and your mount take the Dodge action and gain a +5 bonus to evasion against the attack.
descriptionText: You and your mount take the Dodge action and gain a +5 bonus to evasion against the attack.
requirementHtml: You are mounted on a flying mount and you or your mount are the target of a ranged attack
requirementText: You are mounted on a flying mount and you or your mount are the target of a ranged attack

name: Aerial Mode Switch
descriptionHtml:
You switch between hover and aerial mode.

Hover mode allows you to attack with normal attacks with one hand. Your airships movement speed is reduced to 10ft while in hover mode. 

While in Aerial Mode you cannot use any attacks or actions that are not airship weapons or have the Aerial Mage keyword.
descriptionText:
You switch between hover and aerial mode.

Hover mode allows you to attack with normal attacks with one hand. Your airships movement speed is reduced to 10ft while in hover mode.

While in Aerial Mode you cannot use any attacks or actions that are not airship weapons or have the Aerial Mage keyword.
requirementHtml: Riding Aerial Staff.
requirementText: Riding Aerial Staff.

name: Aftershock
descriptionHtml:
You attack with such force that you create aftershocks when you miss your attack, dealing Half Pierce Physical Damage equal to your Power to the target and all enemies within 5ft of it. 

If the target Dodged the triggering attack, this damage is reduced to half your Power instead.

If your attack targets multiple enemies, this only applies if you miss all enemies.
descriptionText:
You attack with such force that you create aftershocks when you miss your attack, dealing Half Pierce Physical Damage equal to your Power to the target and all enemies within 5ft of it.

If the target Dodged the triggering attack, this damage is reduced to half your Power instead.

If your attack targets multiple enemies, this only applies if you miss all enemies.
requirementHtml: You missed a Heavy melee attack with a Two-Handed Melee Weapon.
requirementText: You missed a Heavy melee attack with a Two-Handed Melee Weapon.

name: Aimed Shot
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.

name: Airheart Gravity Turn
descriptionHtml: You drop 25 feet altitude in order to immediately change direction. Can be used mid movement, all leftover movement can carry over into the new direction.
descriptionText: You drop 25 feet altitude in order to immediately change direction. Can be used mid movement, all leftover movement can carry over into the new direction.
requirementHtml: Must be at least 30ft in the sky and on an aerial staff in Aerial mode
requirementText: Must be at least 30ft in the sky and on an aerial staff in Aerial mode

name: Alarm Ward
descriptionHtml: A ward that can be placed on a normal-sized room or can be combined to ward off a house or larger area. Each ward can cover a 40ft radius. For each Alarm Ward placed in the same area as another Alarm Ward, this radius increases by 40ft (For example, 120ft with 3 Alarm Wards). If someone other than you passes through the ward, the ward triggers creating a loud ringing noise that persists until the ward is disabled. Casting this takes 10 minutes of uninterrupted casting. Once triggered, the field remains active for 5 more minutes before vanishing. At the time of casting, you may choose people that can pass through the barrier without triggering it. If not triggered, Alarm Ward lasts until you remove it. For each Alarm Ward you maintain, your maximum mana is reduced by 1. This is considered a tier 1 ward.
descriptionText: A ward that can be placed on a normal-sized room or can be combined to ward off a house or larger area. Each ward can cover a 40ft radius. Once triggered, the field remains active for 5 more minutes before vanishing. At the time of casting, you may choose people that can pass through the barrier without triggering it. name: Alchemeister Core Crafting
descriptionHtml:
Masterful Dilution
Cost: 40 Crafting Points
Description: 
By diluting the contents to the perfect required amounts, you gain an additional Elixir, Potion, Flask, Potion or Salve upon crafting success. Stacks with Efficient Dilution.

Distillation
Cost: 40 Crafting Points
Description: 
You extract the highest quality healing materials from herbs, granting Healing +8 to a Potion with a heal or shielding effect.

Explosive Lining
Cost: 10 Crafting Points
Description: 
You carefully add an alchemical compound to a pressurized Flask. If the Flask has an area of effect, increases the area by another 5ft (example a 10ft radius becomes 15ft radius).

Purify Elixir
Cost: 40 Crafting Points
Description: 
You reduce the toxicity of an Elixir that has been detoxified while still maintaining its effect, reducing the damage from taking an Elixir by an additional 5.

name: Alchemical Detonation
descriptionHtml: You touch a wall, door or container in front of you, which shatters from deconstructive force, becoming destroyed.  Can destroy up to a 5ftx5ft segment of wall.  Only affects objects made out of common building materials (wood, clay, stone, iron etc), however it affects all walls made out of player abilities.  The GM determines if the object is detonateable.  You can then take a movement action to move 5ft into the space where the wall was.
descriptionText: You touch a wall, door or container in front of you, which shatters from deconstructive force, becoming destroyed.  Can destroy up to a 5ftx5ft segment of wall.  Only affects objects made out of common building materials (wood, clay, stone, iron etc), however it affects all walls made out of player abilities.  The GM determines if the object is detonateable.  You can then take a movement action to move 5ft into the space where the wall was.

Pressurization

Volatile Flask

name: Allow me to clean that~
descriptionHtml:
You instantly remove a negative effect from the terrain (such as Oil Slick, Sheet Ice, Web etc). Permanent effects such as fissure or effects with HP like a wall cannot be removed with this. A maximum of 15x15ft can be removed in 1 use and you may move to any spot of the cleaned terrain afterwards.

In addition, you may target an ally with this to remove 1 negative physical effect from them instead.
descriptionText:
You instantly remove a negative effect from the terrain (such as Oil Slick, Sheet Ice, Web etc). Permanent effects such as fissure or effects with HP like a wall cannot be removed with this. A maximum of 15x15ft can be removed in 1 use and you may move to any spot of the cleaned terrain afterwards.

In addition, you may target an ally with this to remove 1 negative physical effect from them instead.

name: Always Prepared
descriptionHtml:
You immediately purchase a single base item with no mods that is worth 1000 clim or less (base cost). 

You can immediately use the draw/stow action and equip this item into your hand. 

Can only be used once per arc.
descriptionText:
You immediately purchase a single base item with no mods that is worth 1000 clim or less (base cost).

You can immediately use the draw/stow action and equip this item into your hand.

Can only be used once per arc.

name: Ambush Trapper
descriptionHtml:
You may use Place Trap’s 0 RP effect once this encounter, even if you didn’t spend the time to set it up. The GM may rule that the pitfall and net options are unavailable based on the situation.

These activations still cost a Trap when used (but not if you don't use them).
descriptionText:

These activations still cost a Trap when used (but not if you don't use them).
requirementHtml: Must be stealthed or have surprised the enemy.
requirementText: Must be stealthed or have surprised the enemy.

name: Amphibious
descriptionHtml: You can swim up to your speed and can hold your breath underwater for up to an hour.
descriptionText: You can swim up to your speed and can hold your breath underwater for up to an hour.

name: Anathema
descriptionHtml: You choose one target unit and they must save against your Potency or be afflicted by Anathema. Anathema increases the next source of damage that the target receives by your Heavy Attack damage.
descriptionText: You choose one target unit and they must save against your Potency or be afflicted by Anathema. Anathema increases the next source of damage that the target receives by your Heavy Attack damage.

name: Angel's Embrace
descriptionHtml: You grant the target ally Angel’s Embrace, which grants a Shield against the triggering attack that blocks damage equal to 5 + (2 x Toughness). This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You grant the target ally Angel’s Embrace, which grants a Shield against the triggering attack that blocks damage equal to 5 + (2 x Toughness). This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
requirementHtml: A creature other than you is attacked.
requirementText: A creature other than you is attacked.

name: Antennae
descriptionHtml: You are able to detect creatures by sensing the vibrations in the air. You gain a +10 expertise bonus to Perception (Vibration Sense) which works up to 40ft from you, but only detects creatures.
descriptionText: You are able to detect creatures by sensing the vibrations in the air. You gain a +10 expertise bonus to Perception (Vibration Sense) which works up to 40ft from you, but only detects creatures.

name: Anti-Magic Shield
descriptionHtml: You grant the target ally 1 RP that must be spend on a basic Dodge or Block action against the triggering attack as well as Anti-Magic Shield for the triggering attack. Anti-Magic Shield reduces the damage the target ally takes by your Focus.
descriptionText: You grant the target ally 1 RP that must be spend on a basic Dodge or Block action against the triggering attack as well as Anti-Magic Shield for the triggering attack. Anti-Magic Shield reduces the damage the target ally takes by your Focus.
requirementHtml: Ally is the target of a damage dealing Spell.
requirementText: Ally is the target of a damage dealing Spell.

name: Anvil Tactics
descriptionHtml: A single ally in range may move up to their speed. If they end up in melee range of an enemy and there is an ally on the direct opposite side of that enemy, they may make an Attack of Opportunity. This attack gains Lock On.
descriptionText: A single ally in range may move up to their speed. If they end up in melee range of an enemy and there is an ally on the direct opposite side of that enemy, they may make an Attack of Opportunity. This attack gains Lock On.

name: Aqua Drill
descriptionHtml:
You infuse water with your mana firing a spiraling blast of high pressure water, making a heavy attack that deals Water damage against a target within range. You can use either the RP or AP cost for the ability.  The water is used as a projectile and spills anywhere within 5ft of the target at your choice.

If you use an RP for this ability, the mana cost increases by 1.
descriptionText:
You infuse water with your mana firing a spiraling blast of high pressure water, making a heavy attack that deals Water damage against a target within range. You can use either the RP or AP cost for the ability.  The water is used as a projectile and spills anywhere within 5ft of the target at your choice.

If you use an RP for this ability, the mana cost increases by 1.
requirementHtml: You are touching an amount of water equal to a normal sized bucket of water.
requirementText: You are touching an amount of water equal to a normal sized bucket of water.

name: Aquatic Fae
descriptionHtml:
While swimming, your base movement speed becomes 30, in addition you gain Elemental Mastery: Water.

Your Aqua Drill costs 0 mana when used as RP ability while in natural water.
descriptionText:
While swimming, your base movement speed becomes 30, in addition you gain Elemental Mastery: Water.

name: Arcane Barrier
descriptionHtml:
You create a Magical Barrier that absorbs damage until it breaks. The barrier has HP equal to 15 + your Focus. The barrier has a Guard of 0 and any damage it takes is subtracted from the barrier’s HP. When the barrier breaks, any remaining damage is subtracted from your HP. The barrier otherwise lasts until the start of your next turn or until you take any action other than the Block action.

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity and does not protect against true damage.

name: Arcane Barrier II
descriptionHtml:
You create a Magical Barrier that absorbs damage until it breaks. 

The barrier has HP equal to 15 + your Focus. The barrier has a Guard of 0 + your guard and any damage it takes is subtracted from the barrier’s HP. When the barrier breaks, any remaining damage is subtracted from your HP. The barrier otherwise lasts until the start of your next turn or until you take any action other than the Block action. If using the Block action while the barrier is active, the guard of the barrier also increases. 

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity and does not protect against true damage.

name: Arcane Explosion
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack that deals Arcane damage against all enemies within 10ft of yourself. This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack that deals Arcane damage against all enemies within 10ft of yourself. This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Arcane Power
descriptionHtml: You gain Arcane Power, which adds 3 damage to the damage of all your Arcane Damage rolls until the start of your next turn.

name: Arcane Pull
descriptionHtml: You pull the target to an empty square next to you. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Your next Block or Dodge action against the target before the start of your next turn costs 0 RP. This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You pull the target to an empty square next to you. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Your next Block or Dodge action against the target before the start of your next turn costs 0 RP. This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you apply Sunder 2 until the start of your next turn.

name: Armor Up
descriptionHtml: You gain temporary HP equal to the Block value of your armor and shield, up to a maximum of 40 temporary HP.

name: Armored Blow
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. Your next Block against that target costs 0 RP and gains a +10 bonus.

requirementHtml: May only be used after moving at least 20ft in the previous action. Must be mounted.

Cloak Layering

You use a special material for the creation of the cloak. Each material has its own crafting point cost. Only cloak special materials can be used and mixing in a special material increases the burden cost of the cloak by 1.

When converting items of a higher tier, you can convert up to 6000 of tamahagane, 9000 of mithril, 12000 of Orihalcum or 15000 of escudo.

name: Assign Decoy
descriptionHtml: Choose one willing ally other than yourself within range and one enemy within range. The enemy is Challenged by the chosen ally until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: Choose one willing ally other than yourself within range and one enemy within range. The enemy is Challenged by the chosen ally until the start of your next turn.

name: Astral Projection
descriptionHtml: After a 10 minute channel you arrive at the space between worlds, allowing you to interact with Eidolons that wish to meet with you.
descriptionText: After a 10 minute channel you arrive at the space between worlds, allowing you to interact with Eidolons that wish to meet with you.

name: At your side
descriptionHtml: You teleport up to 40ft. This must place you next to your VIP.
descriptionText: You teleport up to 40ft. This must place you next to your VIP.

name: Attack in Detail
descriptionHtml: You target one enemy unit. All allied units (including yourself) gain a +1 Damage Bonus when that enemy unit is the target of an attack until the start of your next turn. In addition, all allied units gain +5 Movement Speed when moving towards that enemy unit.
descriptionText: You target one enemy unit. All allied units (including yourself) gain a +1 Damage Bonus when that enemy unit is the target of an attack until the start of your next turn. In addition, all allied units gain +5 Movement Speed when moving towards that enemy unit.

name: Attacks from the Past
descriptionHtml:
After making a melee weapon attack, you may repeat the attack from one of your past self tokens. You may target the same enemy as your original attack. Cannot repeat Secret Arts or other attacks with a once per combat/arc etc type limitation.

Can only repeat attacks with a base cost of 2 AP or lower and any mana cost must be paid as normal.
descriptionText:

Can only repeat attacks with a base cost of 2 AP or lower and any mana cost must be paid as normal.

name: Attune Eidolon
descriptionHtml:
You attune to a specific Eidolon, paying the attunement cost (if applicable) and then activating its Passive (if applicable).  You gain its Channel Eidolon, Summon Lesser Eidolon and Secret Art: Summon Eidolon abilities provided that you have advanced enough in this class to get them.

You may use this as an Encounter Start ability without paying an AP cost.
descriptionText:
You attune to a specific Eidolon, paying the attunement cost (if applicable) and then activating its Passive (if applicable).  You gain its Channel Eidolon, Summon Lesser Eidolon and Secret Art: Summon Eidolon abilities provided that you have advanced enough in this class to get them.

You may use this as an Encounter Start ability without paying an AP cost.
requirementHtml: You have an Eidolon you are contracted to.
requirementText: You have an Eidolon you are contracted to.

name: Aura of Protection
descriptionHtml: You create a 30ft radius Aura of Protection around yourself. While this aura is active, when an ally within 30ft of you takes the Block action you may spend 1 Mana to replace their Block Value with your own. In addition, any abilities with the Aid keyword have their range increased by 20ft while inside the Aura.
descriptionText: You create a 30ft radius Aura of Protection around yourself. While this aura is active, when an ally within 30ft of you takes the Block action you may spend 1 Mana to replace their Block Value with your own. In addition, any abilities with the Aid keyword have their range increased by 20ft while inside the Aura.

name: Aura of Resistance
descriptionHtml:
You create a 30ft radius Aura of Resistance around yourself until the end of the encounter. 

While this aura is active, when an ally other than yourself fails a save you may spend 1 Mana to make them treat their save as if they were using your Toughness value instead of their own.
descriptionText:

While this aura is active, when an ally other than yourself fails a save you may spend 1 Mana to make them treat their save as if they were using your Toughness value instead of their own.

name: Aurora Blade Style Secret Art: Permafrost Guilotine
descriptionHtml:
You make a light attack against the target or spend 1 extra AP to make a heavy or precise attack that deals Frost damage. On damage, the target is rooted until the end of your next turn.

Then, enter Permafrost Guillotine stance. While in this stance you can use Aurora Blade Style Secret Art: Permafrost Guillotine again. The stance lasts until the end of combat or until you enter different stance.
descriptionText:
You make a light attack against the target or spend 1 extra AP to make a heavy or precise attack that deals Frost damage. On damage, the target is rooted until the end of your next turn.

Then, enter Permafrost Guillotine stance. While in this stance you can use Aurora Blade Style Secret Art: Permafrost Guillotine again. The stance lasts until the end of combat or until you enter different stance.
requirementHtml: Can only be used after you move to a target using Rimestep. Light swords, longsword, katana or dueling weapon only.
requirementText: Can only be used after you move to a target using Rimestep. Light swords, longsword, katana or dueling weapon only.

name: Aurora Blade Style: Aurora Slash
descriptionHtml:
You fire slashes in a straight line creating a curtain of light which strikes the first target hit with a light attack that deals frost damage. On hit the target is slowed until the end of your next turn. 

The light from the slash continues for the full range, creating a 300ft high wall that blocks vision on both sides. This wall of multicolored light last until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText:

The light from the slash continues for the full range, creating a 300ft high wall that blocks vision on both sides. This wall of multicolored light last until the start of your next turn.
requirementHtml: Light swords, longsword, katana or dueling weapon only.
requirementText: Light swords, longsword, katana or dueling weapon only.

name: Aurora Blade Style: Rimestep
descriptionHtml: When a target is slowed by an attack with the frost keyword, you may sidestep up to your speed towards the target. If you have enough movement you can end your movement anywhere next to the target. Overcharge: You may spend 1 Mana to instead make it three times your speed.
descriptionText: When a target is slowed by an attack with the frost keyword, you may sidestep up to your speed towards the target. If you have enough movement you can end your movement anywhere next to the target. Overcharge: You may spend 1 Mana to instead make it three times your speed.

name: Aurora Blade Style: Winter's Edge
descriptionHtml: You imbue your blade with frost energy and make a precise attack that deals Frost damage. On hit, the target is slowed until the end of your next turn.
descriptionText: You imbue your blade with frost energy and make a precise attack that deals Frost damage. On hit, the target is slowed until the end of your next turn.
requirementHtml: Light swords, longsword, katana or dueling weapon only.

name: Ave María
descriptionHtml: You attack with a swift double slash in the blink of an eye, making a Heavy Attack that deals Light damage + Heavy Holy damage.
descriptionText: You attack with a swift double slash in the blink of an eye, making a Heavy Attack that deals Light damage + Heavy Holy damage.

name: Backlash
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. You take true damage equal to half the damage dealt.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target. You take true damage equal to half the damage dealt.

name: Banana Peel
descriptionHtml: You toss a banana peel in front of the target and they must make a Save or fall prone. If they fall prone, you may immediately use Pie Toss against them for 0 RP.
descriptionText: You toss a banana peel in front of the target and they must make a Save or fall prone. If they fall prone, you may immediately use Pie Toss against them for 0 RP.
requirementHtml: An enemy is moving within range.
requirementText: An enemy is moving within range.

name: Barrel Roll
descriptionHtml:
You take the Dodge action and remove Lock On from the attack.

You may spend an additional RP to automatically make the attack miss you, even if the attack has Sure Hit.
descriptionText:
You take the Dodge action and remove Lock On from the attack.

You may spend an additional RP to automatically make the attack miss you, even if the attack has Sure Hit.
requirementHtml: You are on an aerial staff and in Aerial mode.
requirementText: You are on an aerial staff and in Aerial mode.

name: Battle Cast
descriptionHtml: The next Spell you cast before the end of your turn does not provoke an attack of opportunity from being casted in Melee Range of an opponent.
descriptionText: The next Spell you cast before the end of your turn does not provoke an attack of opportunity from being casted in Melee Range of an opponent.

name: Bear Maul
descriptionHtml:
You swing your paw at the target and make a Heavy attack against it that deals maximum damage. If the target dodges, this attack automatically misses.

You are considered proficient in unarmed attacks for this attack, even if you normally wouldn’t be.
descriptionText:
You swing your paw at the target and make a Heavy attack against it that deals maximum damage. If the target dodges, this attack automatically misses.

You are considered proficient in unarmed attacks for this attack, even if you normally wouldn’t be.

name: Bear Shock
descriptionHtml: You gain a +20 bonus to Deception checks when disguising yourself as something other than a bearfolk.
descriptionText: You gain a +20 bonus to Deception checks when disguising yourself as something other than a bearfolk.

name: Bear Trap
descriptionHtml:
You place down a bear trap in an empty square within range. If an enemy enters that square, they trigger the trap taking Light full pierce damage and becoming rooted until they spend 2 AP to remove the effect.

Against beasts, this does Heavy damage instead of Light damage.

This ability consumes a Trap.

This ability consumes a Trap.

name: Benediction
descriptionHtml:
You make a precise attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On damage, inflict Sanctify 3.

This attack does not benefit from Pinpoint.
descriptionText:
You make a precise attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On damage, inflict Sanctify 3.

This attack does not benefit from Pinpoint.

name: Bestial Command
descriptionHtml:
The summon may take basic actions as if it had 2 AP to spend.

In addition, if your summon is under the effects of Independent Action, it gains Bestial Command until the end of the encounter, it dies or you cancel it for 0 AP. While Bestial Command lasts, its maximum AP and AP recovery are increased by 2 while your AP recovery is lowered by 2.
descriptionText:
The summon may take basic actions as if it had 2 AP to spend.

In addition, if your summon is under the effects of Independent Action, it gains Bestial Command until the end of the encounter, it dies or you cancel it for 0 AP. While Bestial Command lasts, its maximum AP and AP recovery are increased by 2 while your AP recovery is lowered by 2.
requirementHtml: Can only target your summoned animal.
requirementText: Can only target your summoned animal.

name: Biohacking
descriptionHtml:
At the start of an arc, you can transmute a gene from a Chimera Subrace into your DNA as long as you have a sample (a vial of blood).

Transmuting the gene does not consume the item. Add a single Chimera gene to your gene inventory. 

You can perform this action again for an IP or EP. Biohacking can store genes equal to your gene limit.
descriptionText:
At the start of an arc, you can transmute a gene from a Chimera Subrace into your DNA as long as you have a sample (a vial of blood).

Transmuting the gene does not consume the item. Add a single Chimera gene to your gene inventory.

You can perform this action again for an IP or EP. Biohacking can store genes equal to your gene limit.

name: Blackbird
descriptionHtml:
You deploy a Blackbird, a small artifice drone that outputs a grainy image to a device on your wrist.  The blackbird has a maximum range of 3000ft and can observe major movements and structures such as doors and enemies.  The drone cannot display fine movements or detail such as words in a book without being up close, but can see large signs.  The blackbird is the size of a walnut and is relatively quiet, and can only be heard by those with normal human hearing within 10 ft.

The fuel shell lasts for one flight, up to 15 minutes.  If your Blackbird is lost or damaged, you must create a new one as an errand action before you can use this again.
descriptionText:
You deploy a Blackbird, a small artifice drone that outputs a grainy image to a device on your wrist.  The blackbird has a maximum range of 3000ft and can observe major movements and structures such as doors and enemies.  The drone cannot display fine movements or detail such as words in a book without being up close, but can see large signs.  The blackbird is the size of a walnut and is relatively quiet, and can only be heard by those with normal human hearing within 10 ft.

The fuel shell lasts for one flight, up to 15 minutes.  If your Blackbird is lost or damaged, you must create a new one as an errand action before you can use this again.

name: Blast Away
descriptionHtml: You fire a point blank shot at an enemy unit. The enemy must save against your Potency or be knocked back 5ft and take Light Damage. This ability does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You fire a point blank shot at an enemy unit. The enemy must save against your Potency or be knocked back 5ft and take Light Damage. This ability does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Blast Wave
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light attack that deals Fire damage against every character within 10ft of you. On damage, they are pushed back 10ft. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You may make a Light attack that deals Fire damage against every character within 10ft of you. On damage, they are pushed back 10ft. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Blinding Dust
descriptionHtml: You flap your wings and blow dust in the eyes of the attacker, making them Blinded 6 until the end of their attack. If their attack against you misses, you may Sidestep 5ft.
descriptionText: You flap your wings and blow dust in the eyes of the attacker, making them Blinded 6 until the end of their attack. If their attack against you misses, you may Sidestep 5ft.
requirementHtml: You are the target of an attack.
requirementText: You are the target of an attack.

name: Blocking Move
descriptionHtml:
You move in front of the target and their movement action immediately ends. Until the end of their turn, they are Challenged by you and your next Block action against them costs 0 RP. If they willingly move from you through any method (including teleports) you may make a Heavy attack against them with Sure Hit.

Your movement may ignore Line Movement restrictions for this ability.
descriptionText:
You move in front of the target and their movement action immediately ends. Until the end of their turn, they are Challenged by you and your next Block action against them costs 0 RP. If they willingly move from you through any method (including teleports) you may make a Heavy attack against them with Sure Hit.

Your movement may ignore Line Movement restrictions for this ability.
requirementHtml: You made an opportunity attack against a target moving away from you. Must be mounted.
requirementText: You made an opportunity attack against a target moving away from you. Must be mounted.

name: Blood Drain
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack that deals Dark damage against the target. On damage, you recover HP equal to your Toughness + 3.
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack that deals Dark damage against the target. On damage, you recover HP equal to your Toughness + 3.
requirementHtml: Target must be a living creature. Target cannot be an ally.
requirementText: Target must be a living creature. Target cannot be an ally.

name: Blood Frenzy
descriptionHtml:
You go into a blood frenzy, mindlessly attacking enemies near you.

While the blood frenzy lasts, you must attack the nearest enemy target with a basic unarmed attack. If two targets are equally close, you may choose which one you attack. If no enemies are within range, you must use your movement to move closer to the closest visible enemy until you can attack them.

While under the effect of blood frenzy, you heal for half the damage you deal with your unarmed attacks.

You cannot use Vampire Bite while under the effect of Blood Frenzy.

This effect lasts until all visible enemies are dead or until your mana runs out. At the start of your turn, you lose 2 mana.
descriptionText:

You cannot use Vampire Bite while under the effect of Blood Frenzy.

This effect lasts until all visible enemies are dead or until your mana runs out. At the start of your turn, you lose 2 mana.

name: Blood Shield
descriptionHtml: You grant the target 1 RP that must be spent on the Block action against the triggering attack. They gain a +5 bonus to their Guard for this Block action. After the attack, the target regains HP equal to half the damage blocked (Blocked meaning the damage reduced through block, not necessarily your total block value).

name: Bloodbolt
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target.

Overcharge: You may spend X HP to increase the damage the attack deals by X. X may not exceed your Toughness.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target.

Overcharge: You may spend X HP to increase the damage the attack deals by X. X may not exceed your Toughness.

name: Blue Tide
descriptionHtml:
You create a 15ft radius zone of 1ft of water in a circle around yourself. This zone of water remains stationary at its original position, even after you move.

This zone lasts until the end of the encounter and automatically replenishes itself when Aqua Drill is used inside of it. You may have multiple of these zones active at once.

This zone lasts until the end of the encounter and automatically replenishes itself when Aqua Drill is used inside of it. You may have multiple of these zones active at once.

name: Bolting
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Lightning Damage with a bolt from the sky. On damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus x 3. As the attack from the sky, any cover is calculated from above the target rather than from your path to the target.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Lightning Damage with a bolt from the sky. On damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus x 3. As the attack from the sky, any cover is calculated from above the target rather than from your path to the target.

name: Bone Armor
descriptionHtml: You target and destroy a corpse within range to give yourself Bone Armor, which gives you a +2 bonus to your guard. Bone Armor lasts until the end of the encounter or until you take 2 or more damage from an attack.
descriptionText: You target and destroy a corpse within range to give yourself Bone Armor, which gives you a +2 bonus to your guard. Bone Armor lasts until the end of the encounter or until you take 2 or more damage from an attack.
requirementHtml: Corpse within range.
requirementText: Corpse within range.

name: Bottle Smash
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. After this attack, your improvised weapon breaks.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. After this attack, your improvised weapon breaks.
requirementHtml: Improvised weapon only.
requirementText: Improvised weapon only.

name: Bottle Toss
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. After this attack, your improvised weapon breaks.

name: Boundless Wind Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter the Wind Stance, an unarmed style focusing around aerial combat. While in this stance, you may Hover and Fly up to your speed. If you already have a natural Flying speed or the Flight racial ability, your flying speed is increased  by 10ft.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance or make an attack with anything other than a melee attack or an ability with the Unarmed Strike keyword.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance or make an attack with anything other than a melee attack or an ability with the Unarmed Strike keyword.

name: Break Away
descriptionHtml: You disengage and may move up to half your speed away from the nearest enemy.
descriptionText: You disengage and may move up to half your speed away from the nearest enemy.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Break Free
descriptionHtml: You may use this ability when you would be affected by a Stun, Root, Fear or a similar effect that would prevent you from acting that's inflicted by an enemy. You may immediately enter Rage Stance without spending any AP or RP. You gain immunity to this effect for the duration of the Rage.
descriptionText: You may use this ability when you would be affected by a Stun, Root, Fear or a similar effect that would prevent you from acting that's inflicted by an enemy. You may immediately enter Rage Stance without spending any AP or RP. You gain immunity to this effect for the duration of the Rage.
requirementHtml: Not in Rage Stance.
requirementText: Not in Rage Stance.

name: Brilliance
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target dealing Holy(Light) damage. On damage, inflict Illumination X, where X equals your Focus / 2 (rounded down) until the end of your next turn.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target dealing Holy(Light) damage. On damage, inflict Illumination X, where X equals your Focus / 2 (rounded down) until the end of your next turn.

name: Bring out your dead
descriptionHtml:
You summon 3 zombies, as if you used Raise Undead 3 times. Restrictions on max zombie limit still apply.

Does not require corpses.
descriptionText:
You summon 3 zombies, as if you used Raise Undead 3 times. Restrictions on max zombie limit still apply.

name: Bulk Orders
descriptionHtml: When purchasing five or more of the same item from an NPC or Procurement, reduce the total price by 10%. For commodities, you must purchase at least 4000 units.
descriptionText: When purchasing five or more of the same item from an NPC or Procurement, reduce the total price by 10%. For commodities, you must purchase at least 4000 units.

name: Bullet Magnet
descriptionHtml: Until the start of your next turn, any single target Ranged Weapon Attack made against an ally in range is made against you instead.
descriptionText: Until the start of your next turn, any single target Ranged Weapon Attack made against an ally in range is made against you instead.

name: Bunshin Tai no Jutsu
descriptionHtml:
You create a body double of yourself that has the same stats you do at the time of creation. You and the body double share the same HP, Mana, AP and RP etc and unless stated otherwise your clones are considered you. All effects on you are mirrored on your clone and vice versa, however a clone cannot benefit from Presence Concealment.

When taking an action, you may choose to let the user be yourself or the body double. However, the body double may only use basic abilities and abilities with the Ninjutsu keyword and cannot create more body doubles of itself. 

When you take the movement action or use a non-teleport movement ability, your clone may move for the same amount of distance as you moved.

You may spend 0 AP or 1 RP to dismiss the body double. A clone can never travel more than 300ft from your actual body, but while it lasts you may spend 2 AP to swap locations with it.

A clone lasts until you rest.
descriptionText:

You may spend 0 AP or 1 RP to dismiss the body double. A clone can never travel more than 300ft from your actual body, but while it lasts you may spend 2 AP to swap locations with it.

name: Call of the Grave
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals Dark damage. On hit, if the target is large or smaller, you pull them to you. They are Challenged until the start of your next turn. This ability does not provoke an attack of opportunity.

name: Call to Grace
descriptionHtml: You trigger the effect of Sanctify, healing the target of the attack by your sanctify amount (and reducing the sanctify stacks). If the attack targets multiple creatures, you only heal one.

name: Can't Escape Death
descriptionHtml: You may use this after an enemy leaves your melee range. After the target finishes moving, you may sidestep up to your speed towards them. For 1 RP, you may move double your speed instead.

name: Cat Form
descriptionHtml: You transform into cat form, reducing your Guard to 0 but increasing your Evasion by +3 and Dodge by +6.  Your size is tiny and you are able to occupy the same square as an ally.  While in Cat form the only attack you can make is Light Melee Attack.  If you take damage in Cat Form, you immediately return to your normal form.  You can dispel this form for 0 AP or 1 RP.

name: Catalyze
descriptionHtml: The target must succeed at a Save. On failure, you inflict Stagger II or Sunder II until the end of your next turn.
descriptionText: The target must succeed at a Save. On failure, you inflict Stagger II or Sunder II until the end of your next turn.
requirementHtml: Target is afflicted with your Toxic.

name: Cavalry Charge
descriptionHtml:
You may spend up to 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. You automatically gain the Trample effect as like the Trample ability once you have moved 20ft.

For every 10ft moved, the attack you make as part of the Trample effect gains +1 bonus damage, up to a maximum of +10.
descriptionText:
You may spend up to 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. You automatically gain the Trample effect as like the Trample ability once you have moved 20ft.

For every 10ft moved, the attack you make as part of the Trample effect gains +1 bonus damage, up to a maximum of +10.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Cavalry Heal
descriptionHtml: You heal the target for 11 + (Power x 2). If the target is mounted, their mount gets healed for the same amount.
descriptionText: You heal the target for 11 + (Power x 2). If the target is mounted, their mount gets healed for the same amount.

name: Cave Raider
descriptionHtml: Until the start of your next turn, you gain the ability to climb your speed.  In addition if you have rope, you can tie it to a secure object and you can rappel down a cliffside up to 50ft at the cost of 5ft of movement.
descriptionText: Until the start of your next turn, you gain the ability to climb your speed.  In addition if you have rope, you can tie it to a secure object and you can rappel down a cliffside up to 50ft at the cost of 5ft of movement.

name: Chain Lightning
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target dealing Lightning Damage and inflicting Static X where X equals your Focus x 3. On damage, you may repeat this attack against another target within 30ft of the target without paying additional costs. This attack may repeat multiple times like this.

You cannot target the same creature more than once per use of this ability.
descriptionText:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target dealing Lightning Damage and inflicting Static X where X equals your Focus x 3. On damage, you may repeat this attack against another target within 30ft of the target without paying additional costs. This attack may repeat multiple times like this.

You cannot target the same creature more than once per use of this ability.

name: Channel Eidolon
descriptionHtml: You use the ability granted by your attuned Eidolon. All costs and effects are determined by your attunement.
descriptionText: You use the ability granted by your attuned Eidolon. All costs and effects are determined by your attunement.

name: Channel Eidolon: Distracting Swarm
descriptionHtml:
You summon a distracting swarm around a target. The target immediately loses any Concentration effects and suffers -5 penalty to Perception checks unless they spend 1 RP to sidestep out of the effect. If they did not move, they also cannot use any abilities with the Concentration keyword until they move.

You can only have 1 Distracting Swarm active at the same time.
descriptionText:
You summon a distracting swarm around a target. The target immediately loses any Concentration effects and suffers -5 penalty to Perception checks unless they spend 1 RP to sidestep out of the effect. If they did not move, they also cannot use any abilities with the Concentration keyword until they move.

You can only have 1 Distracting Swarm active at the same time.
requirementHtml: Ixilune attunement.
requirementText: Ixilune attunement.

name: Channel Eidolon: Draw Luck
descriptionHtml:
You draw on your luck, manipulating the circumstances around you to the best possible state. If you are the target of an attack, that attack becomes a 1. If you made a roll, that roll becomes a 20 (despite the pact cost). 

May also be used in situations that don’t have you making a roll, such as flipping a coin, but the act that you’re influencing cannot take more than 5 seconds to complete.

After using this ability, you become temporarily afflicted with bad luck. The GM decides what exactly happens and what triggers it, but it could turn your roll into a 1, make an enemy roll a 20 against you or something related to the environment. After a bad luck action happens, the bad luck is removed.

You cannot use this ability again until after the bad luck has been removed.
descriptionText:

After a bad luck action happens, the bad luck is removed.

You cannot use this ability again until after the bad luck has been removed.

name: Channel Eidolon: Vine Wall Cover
descriptionHtml:
Thick vines sprout from the ground or natural wall as you create a 5x5 wall of vines that is 10ft high. The wall of vines counts as full cover (unless you peek from it) and has HP equal to your Toughness x6. The vines are sturdy enough to stand on.

Lasts for up to 5 minutes and you can only have 5 instances of Vine Wall Cover at one time.
descriptionText:

Lasts for up to 5 minutes and you can only have 5 instances of Vine Wall Cover at one time.
requirementHtml: Pipoltr attunement.
requirementText: Pipoltr attunement.

name: Charge
descriptionHtml:
You may spend 2 or 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. 

After you finish moving, you may spend half of the AP you used on this ability on Light, Heavy or Precise Melee Attacks.
descriptionText:
You may spend 2 or 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement.

After you finish moving, you may spend half of the AP you used on this ability on Light, Heavy or Precise Melee Attacks.

name: Charm
descriptionHtml: The target must make a Save or be charmed by you until the end of the encounter.
descriptionText: The target must make a Save or be charmed by you until the end of the encounter.

name: Check
descriptionHtml:
You move a puppet piece in such a way (following Move Piece rules) that it can attack an enemy if it moves again. It cannot attack with this movement.

At the start of your next turn, you may move that piece as if you used Move Piece without spending AP/Mana or it counting as an ability use.
descriptionText:
You move a puppet piece in such a way (following Move Piece rules) that it can attack an enemy if it moves again. It cannot attack with this movement.

At the start of your next turn, you may move that piece as if you used Move Piece without spending AP/Mana or it counting as an ability use.

name: Chemical Explosive
descriptionHtml: You place a Chemical Explosive package that detonates after one minute. The explosion has a 15 ft radius and deals Double Heavy damage. The package makes an obvious noise after it has been planted that can be heard within the radius. The explosive charge deals 5x damage against inanimate objects. You can create a Chemical Explosive during an interlude phase for free, but can only carry one at a time. The check to disable a Chemical Explosive is equal to 20 + 2 x Power of the creator.
descriptionText: You place a Chemical Explosive package that detonates after one minute. The explosion has a 15 ft radius and deals Double Heavy damage. The package makes an obvious noise after it has been planted that can be heard within the radius. The explosive charge deals 5x damage against inanimate objects. You can create a Chemical Explosive during an interlude phase for free, but can only carry one at a time. The check to disable a Chemical Explosive is equal to 20 + 2 x Power of the creator.

name: Chiburi Noto
descriptionHtml: You clean the blood off your katana and sheath the blade. If your next Iai strike with this weapon during this arc is a hit, its Roll Damage is maximized.
descriptionText: You clean the blood off your katana and sheath the blade. If your next Iai strike with this weapon during this arc is a hit, its Roll Damage is maximized.
requirementHtml: Must have used an ability with the Iaijutsu keyword with the chosen weapon this encounter.
requirementText: Must have used an ability with the Iaijutsu keyword with the chosen weapon this encounter.

name: Chiburi Noto II
descriptionHtml: You clean the blood off your katana and sheath the blade. If your next Iai strike with this weapon during this arc is a hit, its Roll Damage is maximized and it gains Full Pierce.
descriptionText: You clean the blood off your katana and sheath the blade. If your next Iai strike with this weapon during this arc is a hit, its Roll Damage is maximized and it gains Full Pierce.
requirementHtml: Must have used an ability with the Iaijutsu keyword with the chosen weapon this encounter.
requirementText: Must have used an ability with the Iaijutsu keyword with the chosen weapon this encounter.

name: Chilling Cold
descriptionHtml: You can emit a cooling wind within 30ft that counters the effects of most hot weather. You can enable or disable this every 1 second. In addition you gain Elemental Mastery: Frost.
descriptionText: You can emit a cooling wind within 30ft that counters the effects of most hot weather. You can enable or disable this every 1 second. In addition you gain Elemental Mastery: Frost.

name: Circle Swing
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you may move the target to anywhere in your weapon range (Max 10ft) , then push it 5ft. The target must remain at the same height it was before this ability was used. Your next Spell or Channeling Weapon attack this turn costs 1 less AP (Min 0).
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you may move the target to anywhere in your weapon range (Max 10ft) , then push it 5ft. The target must remain at the same height it was before this ability was used. Your next Spell or Channeling Weapon attack this turn costs 1 less AP (Min 0).

name: Circuit Reset
descriptionHtml: You reset your circuits, allowing you to once again benefit from the Circuit effect.
descriptionText: You reset your circuits, allowing you to once again benefit from the Circuit effect.

name: Clearcasting
descriptionHtml: The next Spell you cast this encounter has its mana cost reduced by 2. This cannot reduce the mana cost below 0.
descriptionText: The next Spell you cast this encounter has its mana cost reduced by 2. This cannot reduce the mana cost below 0.

name: Cleave
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. On damage, you deal Half Pierce Physical damage equal to your Power to all other enemies within 5ft of the target.

If you miss the attack and use Aftershock in reaction to this missing, Aftershock mana cost is reduced by 1 for that use.
descriptionText:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. On damage, you deal Half Pierce Physical damage equal to your Power to all other enemies within 5ft of the target.

If you miss the attack and use Aftershock in reaction to this missing, Aftershock mana cost is reduced by 1 for that use.
requirementHtml: Two-Handed weapon only.
requirementText: Two-Handed weapon only.

name: Cloak of Bats
descriptionHtml: You vanish into a swarm of bats and reappear somewhere else within range. If this was used in reaction to an attack, that attack automatically misses you.
descriptionText: You vanish into a swarm of bats and reappear somewhere else within range. If this was used in reaction to an attack, that attack automatically misses you.

name: Cloud Piercing Claw
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, they are knocked airborne 20ft until the end of your turn (if this attack is made outside of your turn, they drop immediately). They are NOT knocked prone from this, but do take fall damage like normal.

You may Sidestep up to 25ft into the air after making this attack, regardless of if you did damage with it.

Combo: If used after entering Boundless Wind Stance, the mana cost of this ability is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, they are knocked airborne 20ft until the end of your turn (if this attack is made outside of your turn, they drop immediately). They are NOT knocked prone from this, but do take fall damage like normal.

You may Sidestep up to 25ft into the air after making this attack, regardless of if you did damage with it.

Combo: If used after entering Boundless Wind Stance, the mana cost of this ability is reduced by 1.

name: Cloudstep
descriptionHtml: You may Sidestep up to half your speed. This movement ignores difficult terrain.
descriptionText: You may Sidestep up to half your speed. This movement ignores difficult terrain.
requirementHtml: Must be the first movement action in your turn.
requirementText: Must be the first movement action in your turn.

name: Code Blue
descriptionHtml:
You may sidestep up to your speed towards an ally and must end this movement within 5ft of them.

Your next Painkiller Injection or the AP spending of First Aid used this turn has its AP cost reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You may sidestep up to your speed towards an ally and must end this movement within 5ft of them.

Your next Painkiller Injection or the AP spending of First Aid used this turn has its AP cost reduced by 1.

name: Combat Chemistry
descriptionHtml:
Can only be used once per encounter. 

Using your knowledge of alchemy, you jury-rig a special item that has the effect of an an elixir, poison, flask or potion with a cost of 300c or lower. 

You can only make the base version of the item with no mods. The item doesn't take up burden, but must be used before the start of your next turn or it is lost. This item can only be used by you.
descriptionText:

You can only make the base version of the item with no mods. The item doesn't take up burden, but must be used before the start of your next turn or it is lost. This item can only be used by you.

name: Comet
descriptionHtml: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Arcane damage.
descriptionText: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Arcane damage.

name: Command Undead
descriptionHtml: You may have one of your Necromancer summons act as if they had spent 1 AP.
descriptionText: You may have one of your Necromancer summons act as if they had spent 1 AP.

name: Compression
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Physical (Crushing) damage.

If the target is Large Size or bigger, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Physical (Crushing) damage.

If the target is Large Size or bigger, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.

name: Concealed Shot
descriptionHtml: You immediately make a new stealth check and remain hidden if enemies fail their perception check.
descriptionText: You immediately make a new stealth check and remain hidden if enemies fail their perception check.

name: Conduit
descriptionHtml:
When Mind Connection is active, you can channel some abilities through others with Mind Connection. You cannot use conduit with abilities that require a physical object to be present, such as a Mystic Eye power or a specific weapon or abilities that require you to interact with a physical object, such as Snatch. Abilities that require your physical body to make an attack, such as Double Punch also don't work.

You still must pay the costs to use the abilities, and your Mind Connection source becomes the origin point of the spell for purposes of range. Abilities with a range of Self cannot be used through Conduit.

Any ability used through Conduit that isn't an Aetherie ability costs +1 AP (or RP) to use.
descriptionText:

Any ability used through Conduit that isn't an Aetherie ability costs +1 AP (or RP) to use.

name: Consecrating Bolt
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On damage, you inflict Sanctify 1
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On damage, you inflict Sanctify 1

name: Consistent Shot
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Precise Attack against the target. This attack deals Heavy Damage instead.

This attack does not gain Pinpoint.
descriptionText:
You may make a Precise Attack against the target. This attack deals Heavy Damage instead.

This attack does not gain Pinpoint.

name: Consume Enemy
descriptionHtml: You eat the body of a deceased enemy, healing you for your Toughness x 2, regaining 1 mana and preventing a single injury.
descriptionText: You eat the body of a deceased enemy, healing you for your Toughness x 2, regaining 1 mana and preventing a single injury.

name: Consume Fire
descriptionHtml:
You gain Consume Fire, which gives you Damage Reduction 100 Fire against the triggering damage. If the attacker is not yourself or from an effect caused by you, you can then spend 2 Mana to heal for the original damage amount, up to 100 HP.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.
descriptionText:
You gain Consume Fire, which gives you Damage Reduction 100 Fire against the triggering damage. If the attacker is not yourself or from an effect caused by you, you can then spend 2 Mana to heal for the original damage amount, up to 100 HP.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.
requirementHtml: You're about to take Fire Damage.
requirementText: You're about to take Fire Damage.

name: Consume Lightning
descriptionHtml:
You gain Consume Lightning, which gives you Damage Reduction 100 Lightning for the triggering damage. If you reduce damage in any way from this ability and the cause of this damage is not you or from an effect caused by you, you gain Lightning Boost. Lightning Boost grants a damage bonus on your next Lightning Elemental Attack equal to the attacker’s power. This damage bonus is doubled on heavy attacks.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.
descriptionText:
You gain Consume Lightning, which gives you Damage Reduction 100 Lightning for the triggering damage. If you reduce damage in any way from this ability and the cause of this damage is not you or from an effect caused by you, you gain Lightning Boost. Lightning Boost grants a damage bonus on your next Lightning Elemental Attack equal to the attacker’s power. This damage bonus is doubled on heavy attacks.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.
requirementHtml: You are about to take Lightning damage
requirementText: You are about to take Lightning damage

name: Consume Wind
descriptionHtml:
You gain Consume Wind, which gives you Damage Reduction 100 Wind for the triggering damage. If you reduce damage in any way from this ability and the cause of this damage is not you or from an effect caused by you, you gain Wind Boost. Wind Boost gives you an increase to your movement speed for the next turn equal to the damage reduced by this ability, rounded down to the nearest multiple of 5.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.

Wind Boost gives you an increase to your movement speed for the next turn equal to the damage reduced by this ability, rounded down to the nearest multiple of 5.

Any on hit effects from the damage do not apply if you took 0 damage from it because of your DR.

requirementText: You are about to take Wind damage.

name: Corona Burst
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Fire damage. For every 20ft of distance the target is away from you, this deals +1 damage. (Up to a maximum of +12)
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Fire damage. For every 20ft of distance the target is away from you, this deals +1 damage. (Up to a maximum of +12)

name: Corpse Domination
descriptionHtml: You raise the target under your command. A target raised in this way is treated as a non-heroic unit that takes its own actions, however it will try to act in a way that is most helpful to you in the fight. The raised target keeps all of its stats and abilities it had in life, though it only starts with half its maximum health (before any reductions) and whatever mana it had left over when it died. This summon lasts until the end of the encounter or until its HP reaches 0, upon which it immediately dies again and cannot be raised again in any way.
descriptionText: You raise the target under your command. A target raised in this way is treated as a non-heroic unit that takes its own actions, however it will try to act in a way that is most helpful to you in the fight. The raised target keeps all of its stats and abilities it had in life, though it only starts with half its maximum health (before any reductions) and whatever mana it had left over when it died. This summon lasts until the end of the encounter or until its HP reaches 0, upon which it immediately dies again and cannot be raised again in any way.

name: Corpse Explosion
descriptionHtml: You detonate 1 of your zombies, making a Light Attack that deals Dark damage against all creatures in range but killing the zombie. You may detonate additional zombies when using this ability to increase the damage this deals by 2 for each additional zombie.
descriptionText: You detonate 1 of your zombies, making a Light Attack that deals Dark damage against all creatures in range but killing the zombie. You may detonate additional zombies when using this ability to increase the damage this deals by 2 for each additional zombie.
requirementHtml: Must have an active zombie from Raise Undead.
requirementText: Must have an active zombie from Raise Undead.

name: Corpse Puppetry
descriptionHtml:
You may control a corpse less than a week old within 30ft of you to perform simple actions, such as moving or talking. 

A corpse used this way has no combat stats and cannot attack.
descriptionText:
You may control a corpse less than a week old within 30ft of you to perform simple actions, such as moving or talking.

A corpse used this way has no combat stats and cannot attack.
requirementHtml: Target must be dead.
requirementText: Target must be dead.

name: Counter Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter a stance in which you freely counterattack against enemies that attack you. After an attack against you has resolved, you may make a Melee Attack of Opportunity against that target. While in this stance, you cannot use the Dodge or Block reactions.

You may spend 0 AP or 1 RP to cancel this stance. It otherwise lasts until you enter another stance.
descriptionText:
You enter a stance in which you freely counterattack against enemies that attack you. After an attack against you has resolved, you may make a Melee Attack of Opportunity against that target. While in this stance, you cannot use the Dodge or Block reactions.

You may spend 0 AP or 1 RP to cancel this stance. It otherwise lasts until you enter another stance.

name: Counter-Potion
descriptionHtml: You may immediately use a Potion, Elixir, Salve, Poison or Flask that is held in your hand.  X is equal to the AP cost of the action.
descriptionText: You may immediately use a Potion, Elixir, Salve, Poison or Flask that is held in your hand.  X is equal to the AP cost of the action.

name: Countershot
descriptionHtml: You may make a Precise Attack against the incoming attack. If your accuracy check matches or beats the enemy’s accuracy check, you shoot down the incoming arrow and the attack is negated.
descriptionText: You may make a Precise Attack against the incoming attack. If your accuracy check matches or beats the enemy’s accuracy check, you shoot down the incoming arrow and the attack is negated.

name: Counterspell
descriptionHtml:
You pay RP equal to half the AP spent on the triggering Spell (rounded up) or equal to the RP spent on the triggering spell and Counter it, canceling its effect without refunding the AP. If the AP cost is higher than your RP, you cannot Counterspell it. 

If used against a non-Grunt target, you must pay 1 mana for each point of Focus that the target has more than you (minimum 0). 

This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity, but cannot be used to Counter Spells that have an AP and RP cost of 0.
descriptionText:
You pay RP equal to half the AP spent on the triggering Spell (rounded up) or equal to the RP spent on the triggering spell and Counter it, canceling its effect without refunding the AP. If the AP cost is higher than your RP, you cannot Counterspell it.

If used against a non-Grunt target, you must pay 1 mana for each point of Focus that the target has more than you (minimum 0).

This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity, but cannot be used to Counter Spells that have an AP and RP cost of 0.

name: Craft Artificer's Glove
descriptionHtml:
You create a personalized Artificer’s Glove that only you have proficiency with.  Choose a glove type with properties of your choosing at the time of creation.  You can modify this glove for an errand action to change the property, but you can only have one property at a time and only one Artificer’s glove at a time.

Gamma Glove (Hacker): Artifice Jamming. For 1 RP you can Jam a small shell artifice within 120ft causing it to malfunction and be unusable until the user spends 1 AP to clear the jam.

Sigma Glove (Combat Artificer): Heat Sink.  0 RP, 1 mana.  Your glove emits frost energy that saps heat from an artifice, allowing it to bypass the once per turn limit a single time. Overcharge: 1 RP, the mana cost becomes 0.

Delta Glove (Specialist):  The glove is specialized for an expertise skill granting you +10 in that skill.  For instance, it might fire an arcane blast to propel you, granting you +10 to jumping. May not choose artisan or gathering skils.
descriptionText:
You create a personalized Artificer’s Glove that only you have proficiency with.  Choose a glove type with properties of your choosing at the time of creation.  You can modify this glove for an errand action to change the property, but you can only have one property at a time and only one Artificer’s glove at a time.

Gamma Glove (Hacker): Artifice Jamming. For 1 RP you can Jam a small shell artifice within 120ft causing it to malfunction and be unusable until the user spends 1 AP to clear the jam.

Sigma Glove (Combat Artificer): Heat Sink.  0 RP, 1 mana.  Your glove emits frost energy that saps heat from an artifice, allowing it to bypass the once per turn limit a single time. Overcharge: 1 RP, the mana cost becomes 0.

Delta Glove (Specialist):  The glove is specialized for an expertise skill granting you +10 in that skill.  For instance, it might fire an arcane blast to propel you, granting you +10 to jumping. May not choose artisan or gathering skils.

name: Craft Pemmican
descriptionHtml:
Errand. You turn up to 1000u of food into 25 Pemmican Bars (40u of food per bar), which are incredibly shelf stable and easy to eat.  They perform about the same as Military Rations but they are wrapped by special leaves that deter pests—useful and consistent adventure food.

You may also use this as an IP action to convert up to 2000u of food into 50 Pemmican bars.
descriptionText:
Errand. You turn up to 1000u of food into 25 Pemmican Bars (40u of food per bar), which are incredibly shelf stable and easy to eat.  They perform about the same as Military Rations but they are wrapped by special leaves that deter pests—useful and consistent adventure food.

You may also use this as an IP action to convert up to 2000u of food into 50 Pemmican bars.

name: Crashing Foam Wave
descriptionHtml: Creates a wave of water originating from a point of water within range.  Shoves an adjacent target of size large or smaller 10ft away from the point of origin.  If the target is on top of the water, you can choose to shove the target in any direction.  You can use either AP or RP for the cost of this ability.
descriptionText: Creates a wave of water originating from a point of water within range.  Shoves an adjacent target of size large or smaller 10ft away from the point of origin.  If the target is on top of the water, you can choose to shove the target in any direction.  You can use either AP or RP for the cost of this ability.

name: Create Talisman
descriptionHtml:
You may create a talisman or scroll by spending an interlude point. Choose an Spell that you know or choose a specialized talisman, such as a Sealing Talisman. You inscribe that Spell onto a piece of paper. A talisman of a Spell allows you to use the Spell at a different time. When you use it, it is consumed. A Spell talisman costs as much AP and mana to use as the original Spell does. 

You may craft up to 5 talismans per interlude point. A secret art talisman takes up 3 of these slots. When crafting, you may make no more than 2 of the same spell. A crafted talisman costs 1 burden to carry with you. A Secret Art talisman costs 2 burden and can only be used through the Secret Talisman ability.

Crafting a talisman costs 100 calligraphy units per AP and Mana of the spell. A spell with no AP or Mana costs 50 units. If the spell has an RP cost and no AP cost, it costs 200u per RP. If the spell has a casting time longer than 4 AP (ie 10 minutes), then treat the spell as having a cost of 4 AP.

Some spells, such as Summon Lesser Eidolon and Summon Eidolon may be unavailable.
descriptionText:
You may create a talisman or scroll by spending an interlude point. Choose an Spell that you know or choose a specialized talisman, such as a Sealing Talisman. You inscribe that Spell onto a piece of paper. A talisman of a Spell allows you to use the Spell at a different time. When you use it, it is consumed. A Spell talisman costs as much AP and mana to use as the original Spell does.

You may craft up to 5 talismans per interlude point. A secret art talisman takes up 3 of these slots. When crafting, you may make no more than 2 of the same spell. A crafted talisman costs 1 burden to carry with you. A Secret Art talisman costs 2 burden and can only be used through the Secret Talisman ability.

Crafting a talisman costs 100 calligraphy units per AP and Mana of the spell. A spell with no AP or Mana costs 50 units. If the spell has an RP cost and no AP cost, it costs 200u per RP. If the spell has a casting time longer than 4 AP (ie 10 minutes), then treat the spell as having a cost of 4 AP.

Some spells, such as Summon Lesser Eidolon and Summon Eidolon may be unavailable.

name: Crescent Sweep
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack against all enemies in range. On damage, a target falls Prone.
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack against all enemies in range. On damage, a target falls Prone.

name: Crimson Enmity
descriptionHtml: When your HP is at or below 50% of your max HP, you gain Crimson Enmity. When you would heal an ally or yourself with an ability from this class (Bloodbinder), you heal for 1.5x that amount.
descriptionText: When your HP is at or below 50% of your max HP, you gain Crimson Enmity. When you would heal an ally or yourself with an ability from this class (Bloodbinder), you heal for 1.5x that amount.

name: Crippling Attack
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack against the target. On damage the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack against the target. On damage the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.

name: Crippling Poison
descriptionHtml:
You slow the target for their movement. 

Overcharge: You may spend 1 additional mana to make it affect a movement not reliant on movement speed, something that moves a fixed distance. The distance moved with that is halved. If that movement had an attack attached that now cannot be made, the ability is NOT refunded.
descriptionText:
You slow the target for their movement.

Overcharge: You may spend 1 additional mana to make it affect a movement not reliant on movement speed, something that moves a fixed distance. The distance moved with that is halved. If that movement had an attack attached that now cannot be made, the ability is NOT refunded.
requirementHtml: Target suffering from your Toxic takes a movement action.
requirementText: Target suffering from your Toxic takes a movement action.

name: Crucified by Radiance
descriptionHtml:
You make a light attack that deals Holy(Light) to any targets in a 5ft wide line. At any point of the line you can draw a second 55ft long perpendicular line centered on that point of the initial line. You make another Light attack against all caught on this second line and on damage you inflict Illumination X where X is your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn.

If a target gets hit by both lines, the second line deals Heavy damage and inflicts your full Focus in Illumination instead.
descriptionText:
You make a light attack that deals Holy(Light) to any targets in a 5ft wide line. At any point of the line you can draw a second 55ft long perpendicular line centered on that point of the initial line. You make another Light attack against all caught on this second line and on damage you inflict Illumination X where X is your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn.

If a target gets hit by both lines, the second line deals Heavy damage and inflicts your full Focus in Illumination instead.

name: Crusader's Advance
descriptionHtml: You teleport to an empty square next to an enemy you marked with the Mark of Justice.
descriptionText: You teleport to an empty square next to an enemy you marked with the Mark of Justice.
requirementHtml: Target has your Mark of Justice on them.
requirementText: Target has your Mark of Justice on them.

name: Culinary Basics
descriptionHtml:
Mushroom Stock
Cost: 15 Crafting Points
Description: 
Turns a Gourmet Base Stock into a Mushroom Stock (does not stack with other stocks), which when added to a cooked meal gives a +1 Focus Food Bonus that lasts for 24 hours. Requires 1 Box of Fresh Mushrooms. 

Meaty Stock
Cost: 15 Crafting Points
Description: 
Turns a Gourmet Base Stock into a Meaty Stock (does not stack with other stocks), which when added to a cooked meal gives a +1 Power Food Bonus that lasts for 24 hours.  Requires 1 Box of Fresh Meat.

Fish Stock
Cost: 15 Crafting Points
Description: 
Turns a Gourmet Base Stock into a Fish Stock (does not stack with other stocks), which when added to a cooked meal gives a +1 Toughness Food Bonus that lasts for 24 hours.  Requires 1 Box of Fresh Fish.

Vegetable Stock
Cost: 15 Crafting Points
Description: 
Turns a Gourmet Base Stock into a Vegetable Stock (does not stack with other stocks), which when added to a cooked meal gives a +1 Agility Food Bonus that lasts for 24 hours.  Requires 1 Box of Fresh Vegetables.

Spicy Stock
Cost: 30 Crafting Points
Description: 
Turns a Gourmet Base Stock into a Spicy Stock (does not stack with other stocks), which when added to a cooked meal gives a +1 Crafting Food Bonus that lasts for 24 hours.  Requires 1 bundle of Spicy Peppers.

Herbal Stock
Cost: 30 Crafting Points
Description: 
Turns a Gourmet Base Stock into a Herbal Stock (does not stack with other stocks), which when added to a cooked meal gives a +1 Gathering Food Bonus that lasts for 24 hours. Requires 1 bundle of Fresh Cooking Herbs. When gathering from a node with a bonus from this stock, you keep the benefit for that entire node unless you go a day without harvesting from that node.

Stir Layered Flavors
Cost: 30 Crafting Points
Description: 
Allows you to add another flavor, allowing you to add a second different flavor.  Choose from Mushroom, Meaty, Fish, Vegetable, Spicy or Herbal—then add the corresponding ingredient.  For example:  A Mushroom stock + Meaty stock becomes a Mushroom-Meaty stock that grants +1 Power / +1 Focus Food Bonus.  

Use Every Last Drop
Cost: 15 Crafting Points
Description:  
Increases the stock yield by 2.

Secret Ingredient
Cost: X Crafting Points
Description: 
You mix a special material into the stock.  Each material has its own crafting point cost.

Create Box or Bundle of Food
Cost: Errand.
Description: 
You create a perfect mix of ingredients that would be worthy of a stock with 500u of matching material.  Example:  500u of Meat can make 1 Box of Fresh Meat.  You can make 5 boxes of any kind for one errand action.
