name: Cure Touch
descriptionHtml: You heal the target for 11 + Power x 2
descriptionText: You heal the target for 11 + Power x 2

name: Cure Touch II
descriptionHtml: You Heal the target for 22 + (4 x Power)
descriptionText: You Heal the target for 22 + (4 x Power)

name: Cure Water
descriptionHtml: You cast this ability on water within range, healing a target within 30ft for 11 + Power x 2. You can use either AP or RP for the cost of this ability.
descriptionText: You cast this ability on water within range, healing a target within 30ft for 11 + Power x 2. You can use either AP or RP for the cost of this ability.

name: Cursed Evil Eye
descriptionHtml:
You open your Cursed Mystic Eye that curses everything in sight.

All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range must make a save against your Potency or take Light Dark(Curse) damage.

Upkeep: 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.
descriptionText:
You open your Cursed Mystic Eye that curses everything in sight.

All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range must make a save against your Potency or take Light Dark(Curse) damage.

Upkeep: 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.

name: Cut Away
descriptionHtml: Instead of rolling a save normally, you may make a Precise Attack against the Potency of the ability instead. If your accuracy roll beats the Potency, you are treated as having passed the save.
descriptionText: Instead of rolling a save normally, you may make a Precise Attack against the Potency of the ability instead. If your accuracy roll beats the Potency, you are treated as having passed the save.
requirementHtml: You are the target of an ability that forces you to make a save.
requirementText: You are the target of an ability that forces you to make a save.

name: Cut Magic
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy Attack against a temporary magic effect. If your accuracy roll is equal or higher than the Potency of the effect, the effect is removed.

Overcharge: You may spend 1 additional AP to turn the Heavy attack into a Precise attack instead.
descriptionText:
You make a Heavy Attack against a temporary magic effect. If your accuracy roll is equal or higher than the Potency of the effect, the effect is removed.

Overcharge: You may spend 1 additional AP to turn the Heavy attack into a Precise attack instead.

name: Cyclone
descriptionHtml: All targets in a 15x15 ft area must make a save against your Potency or be knocked airborne for 10ft, falling Prone once they land.
descriptionText: All targets in a 15x15 ft area must make a save against your Potency or be knocked airborne for 10ft, falling Prone once they land.

name: Dark Barrier
descriptionHtml:
You and up to 4 other willing allies within range take Light Dark damage. Afterwards they gain temporary HP until end of encounter equal to double the damage taken.

You may choose to ignore Dark resistance or damage reduction on your allies for this ability.
descriptionText:
You and up to 4 other willing allies within range take Light Dark damage. Afterwards they gain temporary HP until end of encounter equal to double the damage taken.

You may choose to ignore Dark resistance or damage reduction on your allies for this ability.

name: Dark Bolt
descriptionHtml: You fire a bolt of darkness at a target, making a Light Attack that deals Dark Damage. You may take true damage equal to your Power + 3 to give this ability Full Pierce.
descriptionText: You fire a bolt of darkness at a target, making a Light Attack that deals Dark Damage. You may take true damage equal to your Power + 3 to give this ability Full Pierce.

name: Dark Healing
descriptionHtml:
You take Light (1 AP) or Heavy damage (2 AP), then heal a target within range an amount equal to damage taken.

You may choose to ignore Dark resistance or damage reduction on yourself for this damage.
descriptionText:
You take Light (1 AP) or Heavy damage (2 AP), then heal a target within range an amount equal to damage taken.

You may choose to ignore Dark resistance or damage reduction on yourself for this damage.

name: Darkness
descriptionHtml:
You conjure a 15x15ft area of pure darkness within range. The darkness blocks line of sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Darkness can only see up to 5ft into or out of Darkness. In addition, any targets within the Darkness that do not have Darkvision or a similar ability that lets them see in darkness are considered Blinded 2 (nightvision does not apply).

This lasts for up to 10 minutes and you may end this effect for 0 AP.

The mana cost of this ability is reduced by 2 during the night.
descriptionText:
You conjure a 15x15ft area of pure darkness within range. The darkness blocks line of sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Darkness can only see up to 5ft into or out of Darkness. In addition, any targets within the Darkness that do not have Darkvision or a similar ability that lets them see in darkness are considered Blinded 2 (nightvision does not apply).

This lasts for up to 10 minutes and you may end this effect for 0 AP.

The mana cost of this ability is reduced by 2 during the night.

name: Darkvision
descriptionHtml: You touch an ally and share your Darkvision with them until the end of the encounter, letting them see up 60ft in the darkness.
descriptionText: You touch an ally and share your Darkvision with them until the end of the encounter, letting them see up 60ft in the darkness.

name: Darkvision (passive)
descriptionHtml: You gain 60ft darkvision, allowing you to see perfectly in the dark even without a source of light.
descriptionText: You gain 60ft darkvision, allowing you to see perfectly in the dark even without a source of light.

name: Deadly Venom
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you worsen the target’s Toxic, letting it stack and adding +1 stack to it. Stacks a maximum of 3 times.

A Toxic with more than 1 stack deals damage at the end of the target’s turn rather than the start.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you worsen the target’s Toxic, letting it stack and adding +1 stack to it. Stacks a maximum of 3 times.

A Toxic with more than 1 stack deals damage at the end of the target’s turn rather than the start.
requirementHtml: Must be made with a melee weapon or with a Set of Missiles, Throwing Weapon or Thrown attack with small weapon only.
requirementText: Must be made with a melee weapon or with a Set of Missiles, Throwing Weapon or Thrown attack with small weapon only.

name: Death Mark
descriptionHtml: You mentally mark a target for death by applying Death Mark, opening them up to your Assassin abilities. When you reduce a character marked by Death Mark to 0 HP or lower, you may move up to your Speed and take the Hide action for 0 RP. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You mentally mark a target for death by applying Death Mark, opening them up to your Assassin abilities. When you reduce a character marked by Death Mark to 0 HP or lower, you may move up to your Speed and take the Hide action for 0 RP. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Death Perception
descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of all living units within range until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). Only affects unit in your line of sight when you use this ability, if more enemies join the fight later they are not affected until you use this ability again.
descriptionText: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of all living units within range until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). Only affects unit in your line of sight when you use this ability, if more enemies join the fight later they are not affected until you use this ability again.

name: Decipher Magic
descriptionHtml:
You may start a skill challenge against a magic effect you can see in an attempt to understand it.  

You are able to disable tier 1 bounded fields with this ability.
descriptionText:
You may start a skill challenge against a magic effect you can see in an attempt to understand it.

You are able to disable tier 1 bounded fields with this ability.

name: Deckbreaker
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you inflict Offstep on the target for the next attack against it.

If the target is inflicted with Stagger, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.

If you're under the effects of Exposing Edge, this attack gains Lock On.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you inflict Offstep on the target for the next attack against it.

If the target is inflicted with Stagger, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.

If you're under the effects of Exposing Edge, this attack gains Lock On.
requirementHtml: One-Handed weapons only.
requirementText: One-Handed weapons only.

name: Deconstruction
descriptionHtml:
By spending an Interlude Point, you deconstruct a basic item into materials. You gain 500 matching crafting material per ingot or block used in the item. If the item does not use ingots, you instead get 1 matching crafting material per clim value of the item.

Regardless of the material used in the item, you will only gain the base price amount even if using upgraded materials and all alloys and upgrades are lost.  You can deconstruct up to 5 basic items for 1 interlude point.

Alternatively instead of 1 basic item, you can transmute up to 1000u of random junk into up to 250u of usable basic (ie: Iron, Pine etc) Blacksmithing Materials, Armorsmithing Materials, Carpentry Materials, Calligraphy Material, Magical Fuel Materials or Medical Materials units at a 4:1 ratio.

You can also use Deconstruction as an Errand Action, but the deconstruction limit is reduced to 1 basic item instead of 5 basic items.
descriptionText:
By spending an Interlude Point, you deconstruct a basic item into materials. You gain 500 matching crafting material per ingot or block used in the item. If the item does not use ingots, you instead get 1 matching crafting material per clim value of the item.

You can also use Deconstruction as an Errand Action, but the deconstruction limit is reduced to 1 basic item instead of 5 basic items.

name: Decree
descriptionHtml:
You command the target to Approach or Flee.

The target must make a Save or be forced to obey your chosen command, immediately moving up to their speed towards you (if you chose approach) or away from you (if you chose flee).
descriptionText:
You command the target to Approach or Flee.

The target must make a Save or be forced to obey your chosen command, immediately moving up to their speed towards you (if you chose approach) or away from you (if you chose flee).

name: Defensive Flexibility
descriptionHtml:
You react to the triggering attack with the opposite reaction you used to meet the requirement of this ability. (IE if you used Dodge as your last reaction, you use the Block reaction for this).

The first time each encounter your RP goes below half your maximum RP, you regain the Circuit benefit on this.
descriptionText:
You react to the triggering attack with the opposite reaction you used to meet the requirement of this ability. (IE if you used Dodge as your last reaction, you use the Block reaction for this).

The first time each encounter your RP goes below half your maximum RP, you regain the Circuit benefit on this.
requirementHtml: Must be the target of an attack and must have reacted to the previous attack against you with the Dodge or Block action.
requirementText: Must be the target of an attack and must have reacted to the previous attack against you with the Dodge or Block action.

name: Delay Time
descriptionHtml:
You choose one or more negative effects on the target that would trigger at the start or end of their turn. They trigger on the turn after the turn they would normally trigger instead. 

You may only delay an effect once, but you are able to delay Stasis even though the target is normally immune to all abilities.

Start of turn effects still trigger at the start of the turn and end of turn effects still trigger at the end of the turn.
descriptionText:
You choose one or more negative effects on the target that would trigger at the start or end of their turn. They trigger on the turn after the turn they would normally trigger instead.

You may only delay an effect once, but you are able to delay Stasis even though the target is normally immune to all abilities.

Start of turn effects still trigger at the start of the turn and end of turn effects still trigger at the end of the turn.

name: Delayed Hit
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target, but don’t deal damage. On hit, even if it was guarded, the target takes Heavy Damage at the start of your next turn. (This delayed damage is calculated of the target’s Guard at the time it’s applied, not when the attack hit)
descriptionText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target, but don’t deal damage. On hit, even if it was guarded, the target takes Heavy Damage at the start of your next turn. (This delayed damage is calculated of the target’s Guard at the time it’s applied, not when the attack hit)

name: Demonblood Regeneration
descriptionHtml:
You heal faster than those of other races. You gain the following benefits:

  • When using Grit, you heal for 6 HP instead.
  • When using Second Wind, you heal for an additional 3 HP.
descriptionText:
You heal faster than those of other races. You gain the following benefits:

- When using Grit, you heal for 6 HP instead.
- When using Second Wind, you heal for an additional 3 HP.

name: Dense Frame
descriptionHtml: When you would be pushed back by an effect, you are shoved for 5ft less.
descriptionText: When you would be pushed back by an effect, you are shoved for 5ft less.

name: Dense Mana
descriptionHtml: You augment your next ability, increasing the Potency of your next ability by 2.
descriptionText: You augment your next ability, increasing the Potency of your next ability by 2.

name: Density Break
descriptionHtml: You make a Precise attack that deals damage equal to the target’s Toughness.
descriptionText: You make a Precise attack that deals damage equal to the target’s Toughness.

name: Despair of Isolation
descriptionHtml:
Everyone within your Mist of the Vale becomes Slowed until the end of their next turn. They must also make a Save or become Dazed until the end of their next turn. On failure, they also cannot target allies with friendly effects while in the mist until the end of their next turn.

You may spend 1 Mana to exclude allies from this attack.
descriptionText:
Everyone within your Mist of the Vale becomes Slowed until the end of their next turn. They must also make a Save or become Dazed until the end of their next turn. On failure, they also cannot target allies with friendly effects while in the mist until the end of their next turn.

You may spend 1 Mana to exclude allies from this attack.
requirementHtml: Mist of the Vale must be active.
requirementText: Mist of the Vale must be active.

name: Destroy
descriptionHtml: The target must make a Save or take Heavy Dark(Curse) damage.
descriptionText: The target must make a Save or take Heavy Dark(Curse) damage.

name: Destroy Ground
descriptionHtml:
You destroy natural earth with magical speed, creating up to a 10ft x 10ft x 10ft hole in most natural earth. Those caught in the effect may spend 1 RP to Sidestep 5ft out of the effect. All caught in the effect fall down 10ft into the hole and take falling damage as normal.

The spell requires natural ground to be below the touching surface to function. It may work on the bottom floor of a house, but will fail if used higher up or in some dungeons
descriptionText:

The spell requires natural ground to be below the touching surface to function. It may work on the bottom floor of a house, but will fail if used higher up or in some dungeons

name: Destroying Angel
descriptionHtml: You make a Precise Attack against an enemy unit within range, dealing Poison Damage. On damage, if the enemy is a Grunt, they are immediately reduced to negative their Max HP and die. On Killing Blow, the current host of Spore Symbiote is healed for 5 + Power x 2.
descriptionText: You make a Precise Attack against an enemy unit within range, dealing Poison Damage. On damage, if the enemy is a Grunt, they are immediately reduced to negative their Max HP and die. On Killing Blow, the current host of Spore Symbiote is healed for 5 + Power x 2.

name: Detailed Finish
descriptionHtml: Make a crafting check. Upgrade the dice to 2d8.
descriptionText: Make a crafting check. Upgrade the dice to 2d8.
requirementHtml: This is your last crafting dice. Costs 1 Crafting Dice.
requirementText: This is your last crafting dice. Costs 1 Crafting Dice.

name: Deus Vult
descriptionHtml:
Can use with active Holy Orders. Your next basic attack or Ave Maria against your Holy Order gains the Lock On and Shieldbreaker keywords against your Holy Order.

Must be used before you make an attack and cannot be used in reaction to an ongoing attack.
descriptionText:
Can use with active Holy Orders. Your next basic attack or Ave Maria against your Holy Order gains the Lock On and Shieldbreaker keywords against your Holy Order.

Must be used before you make an attack and cannot be used in reaction to an ongoing attack.
requirementHtml: A target of your Holy Order.
requirementText: A target of your Holy Order.

name: Devastating Strike
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target.
requirementHtml: Target must have 0 RP remaining.
requirementText: Target must have 0 RP remaining.

name: Devastating Strike II
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. The dice are maximized instead of rolling.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target. The dice are maximized instead of rolling.
requirementHtml: The target has no RP.
requirementText: The target has no RP.

name: Devastating Strike III
descriptionHtml: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target.
requirementHtml: Target must have 0 RP remaining and must be marked by Death Mark. One-handed weapons only.
requirementText: Target must have 0 RP remaining and must be marked by Death Mark. One-handed weapons only.

name: Devil's Blow
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack does NOT have Full Pierce.

If you roll a 1 on the accuracy check, you take full pierce damage of same the type as the attack equal to the damage roll of the attack. You also regain the mana spent on this.
descriptionText:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack does NOT have Full Pierce.

If you roll a 1 on the accuracy check, you take full pierce damage of same the type as the attack equal to the damage roll of the attack. You also regain the mana spent on this.

name: Devil's Curse
descriptionHtml:
The attacker takes damage equal to the damage roll of the triggering attack. They cannot Dodge or Block this damage.

Does not work against Secret Arts, Climax Arts or similar level abilities.
descriptionText:
The attacker takes damage equal to the damage roll of the triggering attack. They cannot Dodge or Block this damage.

Does not work against Secret Arts, Climax Arts or similar level abilities.
requirementHtml: An enemy accuracy check against you rolls a 1.
requirementText: An enemy accuracy check against you rolls a 1.

name: Dharani: Blooming Conciousness
descriptionHtml:
You release all gathered harmony as petals of radiant light that spiral outward from your body.

You consume all Harmony stacks and 1 mana per stack to heal all allies within range for (6 + Your focus) / 2 for each stack consumed.

If you do not have enough mana for all stacks, this ability instead consumes stacks equal to the mana you can spend.
descriptionText:
You release all gathered harmony as petals of radiant light that spiral outward from your body.

You consume all Harmony stacks and 1 mana per stack to heal all allies within range for (6 + Your focus) / 2 for each stack consumed.

If you do not have enough mana for all stacks, this ability instead consumes stacks equal to the mana you can spend.
requirementHtml: Must be in Luminous Form Stance and have 5 stacks of Harmony.
requirementText: Must be in Luminous Form Stance and have 5 stacks of Harmony.

name: Dimensional Armory Expansion
descriptionHtml: Your burden limit for your Dimensional Armory is increased by 4.  Ahead of time, you designate one armor, one cloak and one weapon/shield or two weapons or one two-handed weapon that are inside of your Dimensional Armory as a dimensional set, this process takes 15 minutes of concentration.  You can only have one dimensional set at a time.
descriptionText: Your burden limit for your Dimensional Armory is increased by 4.  Ahead of time, you designate one armor, one cloak and one weapon/shield or two weapons or one two-handed weapon that are inside of your Dimensional Armory as a dimensional set, this process takes 15 minutes of concentration.  You can only have one dimensional set at a time.

name: Dirge of Despair
descriptionHtml:
All enemies within range must make a save against your Potency or become affected by this Song. While affected, you may subtract 1d4 from a single roll they make until the start of your next turn. You may choose to add this after seeing the roll.

Upkeep: At the start of your next turn and every turn thereafter, you may spend 1 AP to continue this performance. Enemies that successfully made their save, do not have to save again against this continued performance, but those who were affected continue to be affected.
descriptionText:
All enemies within range must make a save against your Potency or become affected by this Song. While affected, you may subtract 1d4 from a single roll they make until the start of your next turn. You may choose to add this after seeing the roll.

Upkeep: At the start of your next turn and every turn thereafter, you may spend 1 AP to continue this performance. Enemies that successfully made their save, do not have to save again against this continued performance, but those who were affected continue to be affected.

name: Disarming Attack
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you Disarm the target until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you Disarm the target until the start of your next turn.

name: Disarming Shot
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. If the attack beat the passive evasion of the target (before Dodge bonuses), you Disarm the target until the start of your next turn. The target may spend 1 RP to avoid the disarm effect. This is in addition to any RP the target may spend to avoid the attack itself.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. If the attack beat the passive evasion of the target (before Dodge bonuses), you Disarm the target until the start of your next turn. The target may spend 1 RP to avoid the disarm effect. This is in addition to any RP the target may spend to avoid the attack itself.

name: Discern Immunities
descriptionHtml:
You look at a single target and glean what its resistances are until the end of the encounter. When you are about to use an ability with a negative effect that would be passively negated by the target, you become aware of this and may cancel your action.

Does not apply if the target has an active ability that can remove it, such as a paladin’s Paragon of Virtue for example.
descriptionText:
You look at a single target and glean what its resistances are until the end of the encounter. When you are about to use an ability with a negative effect that would be passively negated by the target, you become aware of this and may cancel your action.

Does not apply if the target has an active ability that can remove it, such as a paladin’s Paragon of Virtue for example.

name: Dispel Magic
descriptionHtml: You dispel a temporary magic effect from an area or target. All non-permanent effects within range that are created by an ability with the Spell or Enchantment keyword are affected. Spells that do not have a time limit listed or create a permanent effect such as a Geomancer's fissure are not affected. Bounded Fields and Secret Arts cannot be removed with Dispel Magic.
descriptionText: You dispel a temporary magic effect from an area or target. All non-permanent effects within range that are created by an ability with the Spell or Enchantment keyword are affected. Spells that do not have a time limit listed or create a permanent effect such as a Geomancer's fissure are not affected. Bounded Fields and Secret Arts cannot be removed with Dispel Magic.

name: Disrupt Ki
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, if they have any Concentration ability active, that ability immediately ends as if they had chosen to drop it.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, if they have any Concentration ability active, that ability immediately ends as if they had chosen to drop it.

name: Divine Barrage
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target and instruct others to follow your lead.

X allies other than you within 30ft of you may also make a Light attack against the same target.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target and instruct others to follow your lead.

X allies other than you within 30ft of you may also make a Light attack against the same target.

name: Divine Guard
descriptionHtml: You may immediately use the Block action to guard against the triggering attack with a +5 bonus to Guard.
descriptionText: You may immediately use the Block action to guard against the triggering attack with a +5 bonus to Guard.
requirementHtml: Must be transformed by Divine Release and targeted by an attack.
requirementText: Must be transformed by Divine Release and targeted by an attack.

name: Divine Might
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack against the target.
requirementHtml: Must be transformed by Divine Release.
requirementText: Must be transformed by Divine Release.

name: Divine Providence
descriptionHtml:
When you use this ability you choose one of the following effects:

 

Divine Protection: You are protected from harm through divine protection, gaining 100 damage reduction against the next source of damage you take.

Fortune: When used for this effect, this ability becomes Instant. You may reroll your last d20 and take the new result.

Health: You heal someone (or yourself) within touching distance for 15 hp.

Light: You summon a bright light at your position that shines a bright light up to 30ft around you. You may detonate this light by spending 0 AP to Daze all enemies within its range.

 

Once you use this ability, you may not use it again until after a rest.

name: Divine Release
descriptionHtml:
Demons can feed on their own lifeforce to release a brilliant display of divine powers. Horns can elongate, fangs might grow, eyes glow and even wings can sprout as the Demon realizes their Divine Roots.

Upkeep: 11 HP

You transform into your new form and take 11 true damage. You may end this form at any time by spending 0 RP. While the form lasts you gain the following benefits:

Fallen Guard: When you take the Block basic action, you gain an additional +5 to guard.
Fallen Alacrity: You gain +5 movement speed and the ability to fly.
Fallen Might: You gain +1 AP at the start of your turn.
Fallen Conviction: When you are reduced to 0 HP, you do not enter the downed state. You still receive the wounded status. While at or below 0 HP, the upkeep for this ability is increased to 16. If you end this ability while at or below 0 HP, you are immediately placed into the downed state. If your HP become equal to or lower than your negative maximum HP, you are immediately incapacitated and this ability ends.

Once you use this ability, you cannot do so again until you finish an interlude rest phase.

name: Divine Smite
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Holy Damage against the target. If your target’s HP is lower than the max damage your attack would deal, this attack gains Full Pierce and does maximum damage instead of rolling.

This calculation only involves your base damage (Base weapon damage + the power). Any other effects added to the damage such as Heavy Blade's bonus damage, Anathema on target etc do not affect the calculation and aren't maximized.

name: Divine Smite II
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Holy Damage against the target. On damage, you may give yourself or an ally within 30ft temporary HP equal your 5+Power until the end of the encounter.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Holy Damage against the target. On damage, you may give yourself or an ally within 30ft temporary HP equal your 5+Power until the end of the encounter.

name: Divine Storm
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack with your weapon against the target of your Mark of Justice.

You then make a Light attack against all other enemies within 5ft and push them back 10ft, regardless of whether the attack hit or not. This light attack is not made with your weapon and always does the damage type of your god (as determined by your Holy weapon key ability).

requirementHtml: Target has your Mark of Justice on them.

name: Divining Petalfall
descriptionHtml: Make a gathering check with a +5 bonus. If the final dice value is even, add it to Node Points. If it’s odd, add it to Lucky Points.
descriptionText: Make a gathering check with a +5 bonus. If the final dice value is even, add it to Node Points. If it’s odd, add it to Lucky Points.

name: Doctor Jekyll
descriptionHtml: You draw and either drink a Potion or Elixir, or throw one to a willing ally within 30ft who immediately drinks it.
descriptionText: You draw and either drink a Potion or Elixir, or throw one to a willing ally within 30ft who immediately drinks it.

name: Dog Form
descriptionHtml:
You transform into your Dog Form, becoming a medium size dog. You lose 2 guard and 4 block, but gain a +1 Size bonus to Evasion and Dodge.

While in Dog Form, you can only make melee unarmed attacks and you are considered proficient in these attacks. 

If you take damage in Dog Form, you immediately return to your normal form. You can dispel this form for 0 AP or 1 RP.

If you take damage in Dog Form, you immediately return to your normal form. You can dispel this form for 0 AP or 1 RP.

name: Doom
descriptionHtml: The target must make a Save. On failure, they take additional light damage the next time they take damage that isn't true damage.
descriptionText: The target must make a Save. On failure, they take additional light damage the next time they take damage that isn't true damage.

name: Double Elements
descriptionHtml: Your next Elemental Strike or Elemental Sweep ability used this turn may add in the effect of another element. This element must be one you have mastered and different from the effect that's already dealt by the attack.
descriptionText: Your next Elemental Strike or Elemental Sweep ability used this turn may add in the effect of another element. This element must be one you have mastered and different from the effect that's already dealt by the attack.

name: Double Palm Strike
descriptionHtml: You attack the target for Light Damage. On damage, the target is moved up to 15ft away from you (At least 5 feet).
descriptionText: You attack the target for Light Damage. On damage, the target is moved up to 15ft away from you (At least 5 feet).

name: Double Punch
descriptionHtml:
You may make two Light Attacks against the same target.

You may not make a dual wield attack until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText:
You may make two Light Attacks against the same target.

You may not make a dual wield attack until the start of your next turn.
requirementHtml: Must not have made a dual wield attack this turn.
requirementText: Must not have made a dual wield attack this turn.

name: Double Slam
descriptionHtml:
You may make up to 2 Light attacks against the target, paying 1 AP and 1 Mana for each. On damage of either hit, the target becomes Unbalanced. If the target is already unbalanced, they are knocked prone.

If you are wielding only 1 Two-Handed weapon, you are limited to 1 attack.

name: Downburst
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Wind damage against the target. On damage, the target immediately plummets to the ground and takes falling damage. This falling damage cannot be negated through the use of abilities that would normally negate falling damage.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Wind damage against the target. On damage, the target immediately plummets to the ground and takes falling damage. This falling damage cannot be negated through the use of abilities that would normally negate falling damage.
requirementHtml: Target must be Flying.
requirementText: Target must be Flying.

name: Downburst II
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Wind damage against the target. On damage, the target immediately plummets to the ground and takes falling damage. This falling damage cannot be negated through the use of abilities that would normally negate falling damage.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Wind damage against the target. On damage, the target immediately plummets to the ground and takes falling damage. This falling damage cannot be negated through the use of abilities that would normally negate falling damage.

name: Draconic Presence
descriptionHtml: You gain a +10 bonus to Negotiation and Intimidation checks against Grunts and against Heroics that have a lower Spirit Core than you.
descriptionText: You gain a +10 bonus to Negotiation and Intimidation checks against Grunts and against Heroics that have a lower Spirit Core than you.

name: Dragon Breaks The Ranks
descriptionHtml:
You gain Flight and surround yourself in fire, then Sidestep to a point in a direct line. You destroy low cover you pass through, though the GM may rule that some cover is too sturdy to be destroyed. In either case, you continue until you reach the target and may make a single melee Heavy Attack against an enemy in range with your weapon. Any other characters in your path may spend 1 RP to move 5ft out of your charge or take Light Fire Damage.

If you have an element mastered, you may change the Fire damage of this ability to the element you have mastered.

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Dragon's Breath
descriptionHtml: You exhale a devastating breath attack, making a ranged Light attack against all targets in a 30ft long 60 degree cone. This attack deals the same type of damage as your element chosen in Ryujin's Mastery.
descriptionText: You exhale a devastating breath attack, making a ranged Light attack against all targets in a 30ft long 60 degree cone. This attack deals the same type of damage as your element chosen in Ryujin's Mastery.

name: Dragonfire Dive
descriptionHtml: You jump to the target, not provoking any attacks of opportunity, and attacking the target plus all other creatures within 5ft of the target for Heavy Fire Damage.
descriptionText: You jump to the target, not provoking any attacks of opportunity, and attacking the target plus all other creatures within 5ft of the target for Heavy Fire Damage.

name: Dramatic Death
descriptionHtml:
You fall prone and may immediately use the Play Dead action. You may use your Art(Mime) for this roll instead of Deception.

At the start of your turn, you may stop playing dead and immediately stand up from prone for 0 AP.
descriptionText:

name: Draw Elements II
descriptionHtml: You may choose an element. Until the start of your next turn, you are considered to have mastered that element.
descriptionText: You may choose an element. Until the start of your next turn, you are considered to have mastered that element.

name: Draw-In
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, they are pulled up to 5ft towards you.

Combo: If used after Lunge, the range of this attack and the pullback distance are doubled. This consumes the Lunge effect.

name: Driftwind Evasion
descriptionHtml:
You take the Dodge action against the attack and gain a Windflow bonus to your Dodge equal to your Windflow stacks.

Afterwards, you lose all Windflow stacks.

name: Dualcast
descriptionHtml: You immediately repeat the last used ability with the same target. Any cost must be paid as normal.
descriptionText: You immediately repeat the last used ability with the same target. Any cost must be paid as normal.
requirementHtml: Must be used immediately after successfully using an ability with the spell keyword.
requirementText: Must be used immediately after successfully using an ability with the spell keyword.

name: Duelist Blow
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Your next Block or Dodge reaction against that target costs 0 RP. This benefit disappears when you use an RP ability against a target other than the target of this ability.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Your next Block or Dodge reaction against that target costs 0 RP. This benefit disappears when you use an RP ability against a target other than the target of this ability.

name: Dullahan's Mount
descriptionHtml:
You conjure up a black horse that becomes part of you. You immediately mount when using this ability and upon dismounting, the horse vanishes. While mounted, your movement speed is increased by 30ft and you are considered a large creature, but you may only move in a straight line. When attempting to move through 5ft wide spaces, it is considered difficult terrain for you. You also suffer a -10 penalty to most finesse athletics checks as well as climbing and swimming checks while mounted.

Any attack against the horse is considered an attack against you instead. As the horse is considered part of you, any displacement or teleport abilities move the horse alongside with you. You may dismount by spending 0 AP.
descriptionText:
You conjure up a black horse that becomes part of you. You immediately mount when using this ability and upon dismounting, the horse vanishes. While mounted, your movement speed is increased by 30ft and you are considered a large creature, but you may only move in a straight line. When attempting to move through 5ft wide spaces, it is considered difficult terrain for you. You also suffer a -10 penalty to most finesse athletics checks as well as climbing and swimming checks while mounted.

Any attack against the horse is considered an attack against you instead. As the horse is considered part of you, any displacement or teleport abilities move the horse alongside with you. You may dismount by spending 0 AP.

name: Duplicate
descriptionHtml:
You attempt to analyze the spell and duplicate it. After the triggering spell resolves, immediately cast a copy of it. You must select a valid target for this copy, pay any additional mana cost originally on the spell as well as pay any costs that are not AP or RP. Failure to do so will make the duplicated spell fizzle, dissipating the magic harmlessly into the air.

Upon successfully copying the spell, it resolves with the same damage and effects as the original spell, though using your stats to resolve them.

The cost is 1 RP for a 0-2 AP spell or 2 RP for a 3-4 AP spell. Spells with a higher cost cannot be duplicated.

Secret Arts and Esoteric Arts also cannot be duplicated and upon attempting to do so, this ability is canceled and any cost refunded. Unique spells by heroic or boss enemies may also be impossible to duplicate (GM's discretion).

name: Dust Kick
descriptionHtml:
You kick the ground in front of you, causing a veil of dust to appear. The target becomes Blinded 3 until the attack resolves. If the triggering attack misses, you kick the target and may push it 5ft into any horizontal direction.

If under the effects of Exposing Edge, you apply Blinded 5 instead.

requirementHtml: Must be within 5ft of the ground. An ally or you are being attacked by an enemy in range.

name: Eagle Hunt
descriptionHtml: You leap up to 30ft into the air and then horizontally up to twice your Speed, this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. You may use Silentium at any point during the movement, gaining the Combo bonus.
descriptionText: You leap up to 30ft into the air and then horizontally up to twice your Speed, this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. You may use Silentium at any point during the movement, gaining the Combo bonus.

name: Earth Armor
descriptionHtml: You touch a willing ally’s armor and enchant it with earthen power. Until the end of the encounter, it grants a +1 guard and +4 block bonus.
descriptionText: You touch a willing ally’s armor and enchant it with earthen power. Until the end of the encounter, it grants a +1 guard and +4 block bonus.

name: Earth Infusion
descriptionHtml:
You surround a willing target in mud and rocks, changing their typing to Earth II. 

As an Earth II type, they take half damage from Lightning and Earth damage or attacks with the Lightning or Earth keyword unless that attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Wind damage or attacks with the Wind keyword.

name: Earth Shield
descriptionHtml: You grant the target 1 RP they must spend on the Block action against the triggering attack. They gain a bonus to their Block for this action equal to your focus x 2.
descriptionText: You grant the target 1 RP they must spend on the Block action against the triggering attack. They gain a bonus to their Block for this action equal to your focus x 2.
requirementHtml: An ally within range is the target of a melee attack and/or physical attack.
requirementText: An ally within range is the target of a melee attack and/or physical attack.

name: Earthen Divide
descriptionHtml:
You create a wall up to 20ft high, 5ft wide and 20ft long in a straight line. Each Segment of the wall has HP equal to 20 + Focus.

Overcharge: You may spend X mana to increase the length by 20 x Xft.
descriptionText:

name: Earthen Guardian
descriptionHtml: You jump and sidestep towards the attacked ally and the triggering attack resolves against you instead. You automatically take the Block action against this attack.
descriptionText: You jump and sidestep towards the attacked ally and the triggering attack resolves against you instead. You automatically take the Block action against this attack.
requirementHtml: In Steadfast Earth Stance, ally within range is the target of an attack.
requirementText: In Steadfast Earth Stance, ally within range is the target of an attack.

name: Eclipse Breaker
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack against all targets in a 15x15ft line.

You must choose the line direction when starting the ability.
descriptionText:
You make a Heavy attack against all targets in a 15x15ft line.

You must choose the line direction when starting the ability.

name: Efficient Strike
descriptionHtml: Make a gathering check and apply it to NP. If this maxes node points, all overflow is converted into lucky points.

name: Elbow Uppercut
descriptionHtml: You attack the target for Heavy Damage. Combo: If used after an ability with the Unarmed Strike keyword, this ability gains Full Pierce.
descriptionText: You attack the target for Heavy Damage. Combo: If used after an ability with the Unarmed Strike keyword, this ability gains Full Pierce.

name: Elemental Bolt
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. The damage type is chosen at the type of casting and must be that of an element you have mastered. 

On damage, inflict an effect based on the damage type of this attack:

Arcane: The target loses 1 Mana
Fire: The target becomes Burning X, where X is your Focus x 3.
Water: The target becomes Soaked X, where X is your Focus, until they take lightning damage.
Lightning: The target becomes Static X, where X equals your Focus x 3.
Frost: The target becomes Slowed until the start of your next turn.
Earth: The target becomes afflicted with Sunder X, where X equals your Focus, for the next damage they take.
Wind: You push the target 10ft.
Holy: The target becomes inflicted with Illumination X, where X is your focus / 2.
Dark: The target becomes inflicted with Blinded X, where X is your focus, for their next attack.

descriptionHtml: You cause your attack to burst into the target causing them to take additional damage of that element equal to 2d4 + Focus.

name: Elemental Convergence
descriptionHtml:
You may choose 1 element from Arcane, Fire, Water, Frost, Wind, Lightning or Earth. Until the end of the encounter, you are considered to have mastered that element.

You may swap this element once per turn for 1 Mana.

name: Elemental Strike
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, your attack applies an additional effect based on one of your attack's damage type. (If you are able to have multiple damage types on the attack such as through Holy weapon, you may pick any of the effects).


Arcane: The target loses 1 mana. 
Fire: The target becomes Burning X, where X equals your Power x 3. 
Water: The target becomes Soaked X, where X equals your power/2 (rounded down), until they take Lightning damage.
Lightning: The target is afflicted with Static X, where X equals your Power x 3
Earth/Frost: The target becomes Slowed until the start of your next turn.
Wind: You may push the target back 10ft. 
Holy: You gain temporary hit points equal to your Power + 5.
Dark: The target becomes Blinded 5 until after their next attack.

Holy: You gain temporary hit points equal to your Power+5.

name: Emergency Maneuvers
descriptionHtml: When you fail a check when operating an airship, you may use this to reroll the check. You must accept the new result and cannot reroll it again.
descriptionText: When you fail a check when operating an airship, you may use this to reroll the check. You must accept the new result and cannot reroll it again.

name: Emergency Recall
descriptionHtml: You give your summon 100 Damage Reduction against the attack. Afterwards, if it is still alive, it is immediately unsummoned.
descriptionText: You give your summon 100 Damage Reduction against the attack. Afterwards, if it is still alive, it is immediately unsummoned.
requirementHtml: Your summon from Summon Animal is the target of an attack.
requirementText: Your summon from Summon Animal is the target of an attack.

name: Emergency Shield
descriptionHtml: The target gains temporary HP equal to 7 + Power.
descriptionText: The target gains temporary HP equal to 7 + Power.

name: Empower Mana Shield
descriptionHtml: You spend X mana to add X*8 to the value of your mana shield until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You spend X mana to add X*8 to the value of your mana shield until the start of your next turn.

name: Empty Body
requirementHtml: You failed a saving throw.
requirementText: You failed a saving throw.

name: En-dama
descriptionHtml:
You throw a smoke bomb on the ground within range that blocks line of sight in a 5ft radius (15x15 area total) of where it was thrown. Targets inside or within 5ft of the smoke can only see up to 5ft into or out of the smoke.

If you’re inside of it at the point it's thrown, you may immediately gain the Hiding state from anyone you have cover or concealment from.

The smoke lasts until the start of your next turn. When it ends, if you are inside your smoke, you may immediately move up to your speed and you are considered hidden up until you finish that movement. If you end your movement in cover, you keep being Hidden from people you have cover from.
descriptionText:
You throw a smoke bomb on the ground within range that blocks line of sight in a 5ft radius (15x15 area total) of where it was thrown. Targets inside or within 5ft of the smoke can only see up to 5ft into or out of the smoke.

If you’re inside of it at the point it's thrown, you may immediately gain the Hiding state from anyone you have cover or concealment from.

The smoke lasts until the start of your next turn. When it ends, if you are inside your smoke, you may immediately move up to your speed and you are considered hidden up until you finish that movement. If you end your movement in cover, you keep being Hidden from people you have cover from.

name: Enduring Warmth
descriptionHtml: You can emit comforting heat within 30feet that counters the effects of most cold weather. You can activate or deactivate this heat every 1 second.
descriptionText: You can emit comforting heat within 30feet that counters the effects of most cold weather. You can activate or deactivate this heat every 1 second.

name: Energy Drain
descriptionHtml: You deal Light true damage to a willing ally other than yourself. You gain Haste, which gives you 2 AP for the rest of this turn. A target can only be affected by haste once per turn.
descriptionText: You deal Light true damage to a willing ally other than yourself. You gain Haste, which gives you 2 AP for the rest of this turn. A target can only be affected by haste once per turn.

name: Envenom Weapon
descriptionHtml:
You enchant your weapon with a minor venom, making your attacks deal 1 additional full pierce Poison damage when you hit an enemy.

Lasts until the end of the encounter.
descriptionText:
You enchant your weapon with a minor venom, making your attacks deal 1 additional full pierce Poison damage when you hit an enemy.

Lasts until the end of the encounter.

name: Eternal Mirane Cage
descriptionHtml: Instead of killing the target, they are reduced to negative their Max HP +1. The target is encased in Magical Ice for 10 years, rooted on the location and cannot be moved.  The Ice never melts despite temperature and can only be dispelled by Higher Order Magic (such as a Divine Arms), or by you. The Spell effect ends if you die. You can extend the duration of the Frost by 10 years for every 2 mana spent.
descriptionText: Instead of killing the target, they are reduced to negative their Max HP +1. The target is encased in Magical Ice for 10 years, rooted on the location and cannot be moved.  The Ice never melts despite temperature and can only be dispelled by Higher Order Magic (such as a Divine Arms), or by you. The Spell effect ends if you die. You can extend the duration of the Frost by 10 years for every 2 mana spent.
requirementHtml: Use when an ally attack would kill a target and target is not an ally.
requirementText: Use when an ally attack would kill a target and target is not an ally.

name: Eternal Vigil
descriptionHtml: While in statue mode and sleeping, you make perception checks as if you were awake.
descriptionText: While in statue mode and sleeping, you make perception checks as if you were awake.

name: Evasive Maneuver
descriptionHtml:
You Sidestep 5ft in any direction.

When used on your turn, you may spend 1 mana and 0 AP on this ability instead.
descriptionText:
You Sidestep 5ft in any direction.

When used on your turn, you may spend 1 mana and 0 AP on this ability instead.

name: Evil Eye of Death
descriptionHtml:
You open your Mystic Eye, focus it on a single target and they instantly die.

Upkeep: 3 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack against a new target.
descriptionText:
You open your Mystic Eye, focus it on a single target and they instantly die.

Upkeep: 3 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack against a new target.
requirementHtml: Target must be a grunt.
requirementText: Target must be a grunt.

name: Evil Eye of Fear
descriptionHtml:
You open your Mystic Eye and inflict fear on everything in sight.

All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range must make a save against your potency or become Shaken until the start of your next turn.

Upkeep: 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.
descriptionText:
You open your Mystic Eye and inflict fear on everything in sight.

All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range must make a save against your potency or become Shaken until the start of your next turn.

Upkeep: 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.

name: Evil Eye of Lethargy
descriptionHtml:
You open your Mystic Eye and inflict lethargy on everything in sight.

All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range become Slowed until the start of your next turn, unless they spent 1 RP to resist the effect.

Upkeep: 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.
descriptionText:
You open your Mystic Eye and inflict lethargy on everything in sight.

All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range become Slowed until the start of your next turn, unless they spent 1 RP to resist the effect.

Upkeep: 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.

name: Excavation Crash
descriptionHtml: Choose one adjacent location 5ft from the target. The target may immediately use a move action for 0 RP to move there if they wish, you cannot make an attack of opportunity during Excavation Crash. If the target does not move to the location, make a heavy attack against them.
descriptionText: Choose one adjacent location 5ft from the target. The target may immediately use a move action for 0 RP to move there if they wish, you cannot make an attack of opportunity during Excavation Crash. If the target does not move to the location, make a heavy attack against them.

name: Execute Heretic
descriptionHtml: You deal damage to the target equal to their max HP.
descriptionText: You deal damage to the target equal to their max HP.
requirementHtml: Target must be downed.
requirementText: Target must be downed.

name: Expert Farmer
descriptionHtml:
Greater Infuse Qi
Keywords: Rapid
Description: 
You infuse one of the planted herbs with Qi, upgrading it from rare to mystic and adding 20 to its difficulty.

Bountiful Harvest II
Keywords: Rapid
Description: 
You bless one of the planted seeds that grants Food units or Alchemy materials. It grants 4 times that amount and you add 10 to its difficulty. Does not stack.
descriptionText:
Greater Infuse Qi
Keywords: Rapid
Description:
You infuse one of the planted herbs with Qi, upgrading it from rare to mystic and adding 20 to its difficulty.

Bountiful Harvest II
Keywords: Rapid
Description:
You bless one of the planted seeds that grants Food units or Alchemy materials. It grants 4 times that amount and you add 10 to its difficulty. Does not stack.

name: Expertise Study (Armorsmithing)
descriptionHtml:
You gain 5 Expertise Points in 2 different armorsmithing crafts. You also gain wielding proficiency in Heavy Armor or Greatshields.

In addition, you always gain the expertise bonus when crafting an armor for yourself. An armor crafted this way cannot be worn by other creatures and is effectively valued at 0 clim.
descriptionText:
You gain 5 Expertise Points in 2 different armorsmithing crafts. You also gain wielding proficiency in Heavy Armor or Greatshields.

In addition, you always gain the expertise bonus when crafting an armor for yourself. An armor crafted this way cannot be worn by other creatures and is effectively valued at 0 clim.

name: Expertise Study (Artificing)
descriptionHtml: You gain 5 expertise points in 3 different Artificing crafts.  You also gain one basic weapon proficiency or one specialized weapon proficiency of your choice.
descriptionText: You gain 5 expertise points in 3 different Artificing crafts.  You also gain one basic weapon proficiency or one specialized weapon proficiency of your choice.

name: Expertise Study (Blacksmithing)
descriptionHtml: You gain 5 Expertise Points in 3 different blacksmithing crafts. You also gain wielding proficiency in one smithing melee weapon of your choice. You may select specialized weapons with this.
descriptionText: You gain 5 Expertise Points in 3 different blacksmithing crafts. You also gain wielding proficiency in one smithing melee weapon of your choice. You may select specialized weapons with this.

name: Expertise Study (Carpentry)
descriptionHtml: You gain 5 Expertise Points in 3 different carpentry crafts.  You also gain wielding proficiency in one carpentry weapon of your choice or artifice chainsaws.
descriptionText: You gain 5 Expertise Points in 3 different carpentry crafts.  You also gain wielding proficiency in one carpentry weapon of your choice or artifice chainsaws.

name: Explosive Advance
descriptionHtml: You immediately activate Horse Step Acceleration and it becomes active for the entire first round of combat.  Immediately make up to 1 AP of movement actions.
descriptionText: You immediately activate Horse Step Acceleration and it becomes active for the entire first round of combat.  Immediately make up to 1 AP of movement actions.

name: Explosive Ward
descriptionHtml: A ward that can be placed on a door or medium-sized container of some sort. If other than you knowingly tries to open the door or container in any way (whether normal opening, attacking it etc), the ward triggers creating a loud noise and dealing Heavy Fire Damage to all creatures in a 10ft radius around the container. All items inside the container (if any) also take this damage. Once triggered, the bounded field vanishes. Casting this takes 10 minutes of uninterrupted casting. You may at the time of casting choose a number of people equal to your Focus that can also open the container or door without triggering the ward. If not triggered, Explosive Ward lasts until you remove it. For each Explosive Ward you maintain your maximum mana is reduced by 2. This is considered a tier 2 ward.
descriptionText: A ward that can be placed on a door or medium-sized container of some sort. If other than you knowingly tries to open the door or container in any way (whether normal opening, attacking it etc), the ward triggers creating a loud noise and dealing Heavy Fire Damage to all creatures in a 10ft radius around the container. All items inside the container (if any) also take this damage. Once triggered, the bounded field vanishes. Casting this takes 10 minutes of uninterrupted casting. You may at the time of casting choose a number of people equal to your Focus that can also open the container or door without triggering the ward. If not triggered, Explosive Ward lasts until you remove it. For each Explosive Ward you maintain your maximum mana is reduced by 2. This is considered a tier 2 ward.

name: Exposing Edge
descriptionHtml:
You sharpen your blades, enhancing the effects of your debuffs.

Upkeep: You may spend 1 AP or 1 mana to continue the effect.
descriptionText:
You sharpen your blades, enhancing the effects of your debuffs.

Upkeep: You may spend 1 AP or 1 mana to continue the effect.

name: Exposing Stab
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you may use your Devastating Strike against the target until the end of your turn as if the target had 0 RP.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you may use your Devastating Strike against the target until the end of your turn as if the target had 0 RP.

name: Extending Spear
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against all targets in a line up to the range.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against all targets in a line up to the range.
requirementHtml: Polearm only.
requirementText: Polearm only.

name: Extra Arms
descriptionHtml: Your next interact with object costs 1 less AP.
descriptionText: Your next interact with object costs 1 less AP.

name: Fading Counter
descriptionHtml: When the enemy attacks you in melee, they instead attack an illusionary clone, missing you. You may then immediately attack the enemy with a basic Light Melee Attack. You may then move up to 5ft in any direction and this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: When the enemy attacks you in melee, they instead attack an illusionary clone, missing you. You may then immediately attack the enemy with a basic Light Melee Attack. You may then move up to 5ft in any direction and this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Fae Knight Style: Carapace
descriptionHtml:
One of your Fluttering Blades returns to you and interferes with the attack. You may take the dodge or block action against the attack. 

This cancels Fluttering Blade on that weapon.
descriptionText:
One of your Fluttering Blades returns to you and interferes with the attack. You may take the dodge or block action against the attack.

This cancels Fluttering Blade on that weapon.
requirementHtml: Heavy Spin Fluttering Blade Active and target of an attack.
requirementText: Heavy Spin Fluttering Blade Active and target of an attack.

name: Fae Knight Style: Devouring Locust
descriptionHtml: Your Fluttering Blade moves in a straight line up to 60ft. Make a light attack that affects every target that the Blade passes through.
descriptionText: Your Fluttering Blade moves in a straight line up to 60ft. Make a light attack that affects every target that the Blade passes through.
requirementHtml: An active Fluttering Blade within range.
requirementText: An active Fluttering Blade within range.

name: Fae Knight Style: Gadfly
descriptionHtml:
Sends a Fluttering Blade to harass the target within 90ft of you, making a light attack against them. 

The Fluttering Blade then occupies the same space as the target and follows them throughout all movement, including teleportation. 

Gadfly makes an attack of opportunity every time the target attacks a target besides Gadfly. You can upgrade this attack of opportunity to a heavy attack for 1 RP or 1 Mana.
descriptionText:
Sends a Fluttering Blade to harass the target within 90ft of you, making a light attack against them.

The Fluttering Blade then occupies the same space as the target and follows them throughout all movement, including teleportation.

Gadfly makes an attack of opportunity every time the target attacks a target besides Gadfly. You can upgrade this attack of opportunity to a heavy attack for 1 RP or 1 Mana.
requirementHtml: Fluttering Blade Active
requirementText: Fluttering Blade Active

name: Fae Knight Style: Megasoma
descriptionHtml:
You direct a Heavy Spin Fluttering Blade at a target within 30ft of you, making a Heavy attack and cancelling Fluttering Blade on that weapon afterwards.

Cannot be used on a Fluttering Blade that was created this turn.
descriptionText:
You direct a Heavy Spin Fluttering Blade at a target within 30ft of you, making a Heavy attack and cancelling Fluttering Blade on that weapon afterwards.

Cannot be used on a Fluttering Blade that was created this turn.
requirementHtml: Heavy Spin Fluttering Blade active from last turn
requirementText: Heavy Spin Fluttering Blade active from last turn

name: Fae Knight Style: Oak Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter Fae Knight Style: Oak Stance. Weapons with Fluttering Blade can move up to 20ft as a part of an attack. 

Your Fluttering Blade does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText:
You enter Fae Knight Style: Oak Stance. Weapons with Fluttering Blade can move up to 20ft as a part of an attack.

Your Fluttering Blade does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Fae Knight Style: Petal Swirl Flash
descriptionHtml:
You teleport to an enemy within range.

Make a melee Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise attack (2 AP) against that enemy. Afterwards, you regain the use of your Faerie Flash allowing you to use it again this encounter.
descriptionText:
You teleport to an enemy within range.

Make a melee Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise attack (2 AP) against that enemy. Afterwards, you regain the use of your Faerie Flash allowing you to use it again this encounter.

name: Fae Knight Style: Second Plague
descriptionHtml:
Your Fluttering Blade returns to your hand in the fastest possible path (typically a straight line), it avoids obstacles in the most direct way possible. Make a light attack that affects every target that the blade passes through. Deactivates Fluttering Blade when it returns to you.

Combo: If used after Devouring Locust, reduce the AP cost by 1.
descriptionText:
Your Fluttering Blade returns to your hand in the fastest possible path (typically a straight line), it avoids obstacles in the most direct way possible. Make a light attack that affects every target that the blade passes through. Deactivates Fluttering Blade when it returns to you.

Combo: If used after Devouring Locust, reduce the AP cost by 1.
requirementHtml: An active Fluttering Blade within range and in Oak Stance. Must have a hand available to catch the weapon.
requirementText: An active Fluttering Blade within range and in Oak Stance. Must have a hand available to catch the weapon.

name: Fae Knight Style: Willow Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter Fae Knight Style: Willow Stance. Increasing your Fluttering Blade Limit to 2. Shields can be used as Fluttering Blades while in Willow Stance. 

For 1 mana, all Fluttering Blades created in Willow Stance this turn can be enhanced with Heavy Spin, allowing them to be used for some Willow abilities but they no longer gain your focus as extra evasion.  Heavy Spin blades also deal 5d6 upgraded heavy attack damage, even if they were originally a one-handed weapon.
descriptionText:
You enter Fae Knight Style: Willow Stance. Increasing your Fluttering Blade Limit to 2. Shields can be used as Fluttering Blades while in Willow Stance.

For 1 mana, all Fluttering Blades created in Willow Stance this turn can be enhanced with Heavy Spin, allowing them to be used for some Willow abilities but they no longer gain your focus as extra evasion.  Heavy Spin blades also deal 5d6 upgraded heavy attack damage, even if they were originally a one-handed weapon.

name: Faerie Eyes: Calling
descriptionHtml: You activate your Faerie Eyes, charming a target to move their Speed towards you. If your Focus is higher than the target’s the target moves up to its speed towards you. The target immediately stops their movement if they are going to take damage from further movement. Against Grunts, this attack always hits regardless of Focus, costs 0 mana, and the target will continue to move even if it will take damage.
descriptionText: You activate your Faerie Eyes, charming a target to move their Speed towards you. If your Focus is higher than the target’s the target moves up to its speed towards you. The target immediately stops their movement if they are going to take damage from further movement. Against Grunts, this attack always hits regardless of Focus, costs 0 mana, and the target will continue to move even if it will take damage.

name: Faerie Flash
descriptionHtml: You Teleport up to twice your Speed to an unoccupied space that you can see. Can only be used once per encounter.
descriptionText: You Teleport up to twice your Speed to an unoccupied space that you can see. Can only be used once per encounter.

name: Faerie Flash II
descriptionHtml:
You Teleport up to twice your Speed to an unoccupied space that you can see.

If you gain an effect that would lets you regain the use of Faerie Flash and you use Faerie Flash II that turn, instead reduce the mana cost of this ability by 1 (to a minimum of 0).
descriptionText:
You Teleport up to twice your Speed to an unoccupied space that you can see.

If you gain an effect that would lets you regain the use of Faerie Flash and you use Faerie Flash II that turn, instead reduce the mana cost of this ability by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

name: Faerie Light Eyes:  Empty
descriptionHtml:
You lock eyes with an enemy, casting an illusion onto the target’s mind. Name an ability that the target had previously used in the current encounter. The target forgets the target ability, being unable to use it completely while the Illusion is in effect. This ability cannot target Secret Arts, Climax Arts or Esoteric Arts. Only one target may be under the effect of this illusion at a time. If the target is non-heroic and under the effect of Faerie Light Eyes: Hold Person, instead the target immediately is rendered insane permanently. An insane target takes no further combat actions.

If used on a grunt under the effects of Hold Person, they do not need to meet the normal requirements for this ability.

Does not work against Boss type enemies. Some abilities such as those granted by items, passives or racial abilities (such as flight) also cannot be removed by this ability (GM's discretion).
descriptionText:

The target forgets the target ability, being unable to use it completely while the Illusion is in effect. This ability cannot target Secret Arts, Climax Arts or Esoteric Arts. requirementHtml: Enemy has used the target ability
requirementText: Enemy has used the target ability

name: Faerie Light Eyes: Golden Illusion
descriptionHtml:
You copy the target’s ability that was forgotten and add it to your abilities until the end of the encounter. You must still fulfill all requirements to use this skill. This ability is generated from illusions and gains the keyword, Illusion. You can only have one Golden Illusion ability at a time.

If the target stops being affected by Empty, you lose your Golden Illusion ability.
descriptionText:
You copy the target’s ability that was forgotten and add it to your abilities until the end of the encounter. You must still fulfill all requirements to use this skill. This ability is generated from illusions and gains the keyword, Illusion. You can only have one Golden Illusion ability at a time.

If the target stops being affected by Empty, you lose your Golden Illusion ability.

name: Faerie Light Eyes: Hold Person
descriptionHtml: You gaze into the target’s eyes and stun them for 1 turn, reducing their AP and RP to 0. While stunned, the target can also not take any actions.
descriptionText: You gaze into the target’s eyes and stun them for 1 turn, reducing their AP and RP to 0. While stunned, the target can also not take any actions.
requirementHtml: Target must be a grunt and have eyes.
requirementText: Target must be a grunt and have eyes.

name: Faerie Light Eyes: Time Dilation
descriptionHtml: Flooding your eyes with magic, you cast a self Illusion causes time slow down. You use the Dodge action with a Dodge bonus equal to 2X.
descriptionText: Flooding your eyes with magic, you cast a self Illusion causes time slow down. You use the Dodge action with a Dodge bonus equal to 2X.
requirementHtml: You are the target of a single-target attack.
requirementText: You are the target of a single-target attack.

name: Faithful Shield
descriptionHtml:
You may use Shelter once at 0 RP cost if the target is your Soulmate. This effect lasts until the start of your next turn.

Overcharge: You may spend 4 AP on this ability to instead gain 2 free uses of Shelter.

These free uses ignore the normal limitation of using an ability only once per turn.
descriptionText:
You may use Shelter once at 0 RP cost if the target is your Soulmate. This effect lasts until the start of your next turn.

Overcharge: You may spend 4 AP on this ability to instead gain 2 free uses of Shelter.

These free uses ignore the normal limitation of using an ability only once per turn.

name: Fan of Knives
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against all enemies in range. This is considered a Ranged Weapon Attack that does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against all enemies in range. This is considered a Ranged Weapon Attack that does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
requirementHtml: Throwing Weapon, Set of Missiles or Thrown attack only.
requirementText: Throwing Weapon, Set of Missiles or Thrown attack only.

name: Farming Basics
descriptionHtml:
Spiritual Ground
Cost: 1 Interlude Point
Description: 
You infuse the land with your spiritual energy, creating up to 10 plots of land suitable for farming. These plots of lands can grow food and herbs at an accelerated rate and allow the planting of tier 1 rare herbs.

All plots of land must be filled with seeds before they begin growing. 

After creating a spiritual ground, you may immediately use Sow Seeds in it for 0 IP.

You can only have 1 spiritual ground at the same time.

Sow Seeds
Cost: 1 Interlude Point
Description: 
You may plant seeds in plots of land. You may plant 1 set of seeds in each plot of land you can work.

Harvest
Cost: 1 Interlude Point
Description: 
You harvest the planted seeds or take care of the plants not ready to be harvested yet. Do a crafting session. Your crafting score is the total value of seeds you can harvest or take care of.

If your crafting score is not high enough to harvest or take care of all seeds you planted, you must give up on some of the seeds. Starting from the seed with the highest difficulty, you drop seeds until your total crafting score matches or exceeds the total difficulty of the seeds.

Infuse Qi
Keywords: Rapid
Description: 
You infuse one of the planted herbs with Qi, upgrading it from common to rare and adding 10 to its difficulty.

Bountiful Harvest
Keywords: Rapid
Description: 
You bless one of the planted seeds that grants Food units or Alchemy materials. It grants double that amount and you add 5 to its difficulty. Does not stack.
