name: Fast Dimensional Equip
descriptionHtml:
You summon an item from your dimensional armory into your hand. You can also send a held weapon (not wielded or carried by another creature) under your full control to your Dimensional Armory and swap it with another from your Dimensional Armory.  

You may use 1 RP to activate this ability. If you do, the Mana cost is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You summon an item from your dimensional armory into your hand. You can also send a held weapon (not wielded or carried by another creature) under your full control to your Dimensional Armory and swap it with another from your Dimensional Armory.

You may use 1 RP to activate this ability. If you do, the Mana cost is reduced by 1.
requirementHtml: You have a Dimension Armory active.
requirementText: You have a Dimension Armory active.

name: Feeding Frenzy
descriptionHtml:
You may use this after reducing an enemy’s hit points to 0 or less.

You may immediately use your Vampire Bite ability for 0 RP against the enemy you downed.
descriptionText:
You may use this after reducing an enemy’s hit points to 0 or less.

You may immediately use your Vampire Bite ability for 0 RP against the enemy you downed.
requirementHtml: Must be under the effects of Blood Frenzy.
requirementText: Must be under the effects of Blood Frenzy.

name: Feign Death
descriptionHtml: The first time you enter the Downed state in an encounter, you may use Play Dead as a reaction for 0 RP. In addition, you gain a +10 bonus to playing dead.
descriptionText: The first time you enter the Downed state in an encounter, you may use Play Dead as a reaction for 0 RP. In addition, you gain a +10 bonus to playing dead.

name: Feigned Retreat
descriptionHtml:
All allies in a 15x15ft square within range may Sidestep up to their speed towards you. 

If they successfully left an enemy’s melee range and are not in an enemy’s melee range after moving, then the first time an enemy enters their melee range before the start of their next turn, they may make an Attack of Opportunity against that enemy.
descriptionText:
All allies in a 15x15ft square within range may Sidestep up to their speed towards you.

If they successfully left an enemy’s melee range and are not in an enemy’s melee range after moving, then the first time an enemy enters their melee range before the start of their next turn, they may make an Attack of Opportunity against that enemy.

name: Feint
descriptionHtml: You target an enemy. If the target is a Grunt or you have higher Agility than the target, then they cannot make an attack of opportunity against you until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You target an enemy. If the target is a Grunt or you have higher Agility than the target, then they cannot make an attack of opportunity against you until the start of your next turn.

name: Feinting Stab
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If they react to it in any way, you may cancel your attack on them and instead make it against a different enemy in range. Any RP spent by the first target is not refunded.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If they react to it in any way, you may cancel your attack on them and instead make it against a different enemy in range. Any RP spent by the first target is not refunded.
requirementHtml: At least two enemies within range.
requirementText: At least two enemies within range.

name: Felling Strike
descriptionHtml: Make a heavy attack against a target enemy that is no larger than large size category. On damage, sidestep to any unoccupied space next to the target, of the same elevation as the target, and knockback the target 10ft.
descriptionText: Make a heavy attack against a target enemy that is no larger than large size category. On damage, sidestep to any unoccupied space next to the target, of the same elevation as the target, and knockback the target 10ft.
requirementHtml: Axe, Chainsaw and Giant Scissors Only
requirementText: Axe, Chainsaw and Giant Scissors Only

name: Field Medic
descriptionHtml: Medical and Surgery kits (including any upgraded versions) you carry have their burden reduced by 1, down to a minimum of 0.
descriptionText: Medical and Surgery kits (including any upgraded versions) you carry have their burden reduced by 1, down to a minimum of 0.

name: Fiery Rebirth
descriptionHtml:
You regain HP until you are at 1 HP, stand up from prone and deal Light full pierce fire damage to all enemies within 5ft of you.

All buffs and debuffs on you are removed.

After using this ability, the mortal wound condition is removed from you and you cannot use Fiery Rebirth again for the rest of the arc.
descriptionText:
You regain HP until you are at 1 HP, stand up from prone and deal Light full pierce fire damage to all enemies within 5ft of you.

All buffs and debuffs on you are removed.

After using this ability, the mortal wound condition is removed from you and you cannot use Fiery Rebirth again for the rest of the arc.
requirementHtml: You’ve suffered a mortal wound.
requirementText: You’ve suffered a mortal wound.

name: Fight or Flight
descriptionHtml:
Fight: You immediately gain 2 AP that can be used on basic abilities, but lose 1 RP.

Flight: You immediately gain 1 RP, but recover 2 less AP on your next turn.

You regain the use of this ability after the Encounter Conclusion phase.
descriptionText:
Fight: You immediately gain 2 AP that can be used on basic abilities, but lose 1 RP.

Flight: You immediately gain 1 RP, but recover 2 less AP on your next turn.

You regain the use of this ability after the Encounter Conclusion phase.

name: Fireball
descriptionHtml: You hurl a Fireball at a 15x15ft area, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in the area.
descriptionText: You hurl a Fireball at a 15x15ft area, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in the area.

name: Fireball Barrage
descriptionHtml: You hurl three Fireballs at three separate 15x15ft areas, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in each area. Each unit can only be attacked once per use of this ability, even if hit by multiple fireballs.
descriptionText: You hurl three Fireballs at three separate 15x15ft areas, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in each area. Each unit can only be attacked once per use of this ability, even if hit by multiple fireballs.

name: Fireball II
descriptionHtml: You hurl a Fireball at a 15x15ft area, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in the area. On damage, they become Burning X where X equals your Power x 3 Overcharge: You may spend extra mana to increase the size of the area. Every mana spent increases the size by 5ft.
descriptionText: You hurl a Fireball at a 15x15ft area, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in the area. On damage, they become Burning X where X equals your Power x 3 Overcharge: You may spend extra mana to increase the size of the area. Every mana spent increases the size by 5ft.

name: First Aid
descriptionHtml:
You grant an ally First Aid X, where X is the damage they took.

When an ally has First Aid applied by you, you may spend 1 AP while within 5ft of them to remove all First Aid and heal the target for your Focus up to the First Aid value.
descriptionText:
You grant an ally First Aid X, where X is the damage they took.

When an ally has First Aid applied by you, you may spend 1 AP while within 5ft of them to remove all First Aid and heal the target for your Focus up to the First Aid value.
requirementHtml: An ally is damaged
requirementText: An ally is damaged

name: First Response
descriptionHtml: If you have a Medical Kit, you may use your encounter conclusion to give the Second Wind encounter conclusion effect to someone else. You heal for an additional 1d6 (+3 from your Demonblood Regeneration if you have it) when doing this.
descriptionText: If you have a Medical Kit, you may use your encounter conclusion to give the Second Wind encounter conclusion effect to someone else. You heal for an additional 1d6 (+3 from your Demonblood Regeneration if you have it) when doing this.

name: Fissure
descriptionHtml:
You slam the ground and create a 15ft wide fissure up to the target point. Those at the edges of the spell’s range may spend 1 RP to Sidestep 5ft out of the effect. All caught in the effect fall down 20ft into the fissure and take falling damage as normal.

The spell requires natural ground to be below the touching surface to function. It may work on the bottom floor of a house, but will fail if used higher up or in some dungeons.
descriptionText:
You slam the ground and create a 15ft wide fissure up to the target point. Those at the edges of the spell’s range may spend 1 RP to Sidestep 5ft out of the effect. All caught in the effect fall down 20ft into the fissure and take falling damage as normal.

The spell requires natural ground to be below the touching surface to function. It may work on the bottom floor of a house, but will fail if used higher up or in some dungeons.
requirementHtml: Special
requirementText: Special

name: Flame Infusion
descriptionHtml: You surround a willing target in searing flames, changing their typing to Fire II. As a Fire II type, they take half damage from Fire and Frost Damage or attacks with the Fire or Frost keywords unless that attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Water Damage or attacks with the Water keyword. While the ward lasts, they also gain immunity to Burning. The ward lasts until the end of the encounter or until their type is overwritten by a more powerful type.
descriptionText: You surround a willing target in searing flames, changing their typing to Fire II. As a Fire II type, they take half damage from Fire and Frost Damage or attacks with the Fire or Frost keywords unless that attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Water Damage or attacks with the Water keyword. While the ward lasts, they also gain immunity to Burning. The ward lasts until the end of the encounter or until their type is overwritten by a more powerful type.

name: Flame Shield
descriptionHtml: The attacker immediately takes Light Fire Damage.
descriptionText: The attacker immediately takes Light Fire Damage.

name: Flame Wall
descriptionHtml: You create a wall of Fire that is 30ft long, 5ft wide and 30ft high. This wall must be a straight line. Anyone passing through the wall or starting their turn in it takes Heavy Fire Damage. The wall lasts for 10 minutes or until canceled. Those in the wall when it is casted, may spend 1 RP to sidestep out of the wall. A person can only take this damage once per round.
descriptionText: You create a wall of Fire that is 30ft long, 5ft wide and 30ft high. This wall must be a straight line. Anyone passing through the wall or starting their turn in it takes Heavy Fire Damage. The wall lasts for 10 minutes or until canceled. Those in the wall when it is casted, may spend 1 RP to sidestep out of the wall. A person can only take this damage once per round.

name: Flame Weapon
descriptionHtml: You touch one willing ally’s or your own weapon and enchant it with Fire. Until the end of the encounter, the weapon deals Fire Damage and grants a +1 Power Enchantment.
descriptionText: You touch one willing ally’s or your own weapon and enchant it with Fire. Until the end of the encounter, the weapon deals Fire Damage and grants a +1 Power Enchantment.

name: Flash Bomb
descriptionHtml: You throw a Flash Bomb at a point within range that explodes in an 25x25 area centered on that point. All targets within the area must save against Potency or become Dazed.
descriptionText: You throw a Flash Bomb at a point within range that explodes in an 25x25 area centered on that point. All targets within the area must save against Potency or become Dazed.

name: Flash Cut
descriptionHtml: You draw your katana and attack with such Speed it becomes impossible to perceive, making a Heavy Attack against the target, after which you resheathe the weapon. This ability does not break the Iai state.
descriptionText: You draw your katana and attack with such Speed it becomes impossible to perceive, making a Heavy Attack against the target, after which you resheathe the weapon. This ability does not break the Iai state.
requirementHtml: Katana only, must be in Iai state.
requirementText: Katana only, must be in Iai state.

name: Flash Star Style Secret Art: Twin Nova Pursuit
descriptionHtml: You teleport to the target and then knock them 25ft in any horizontal direction.  You then teleport in a straight line to them again and make a Heavy attack.  If the attack is responded to with any RP action, knock them straight back 25ft again, teleport in a straight line to them and make another Heavy attack.
descriptionText: You teleport to the target and then knock them 25ft in any horizontal direction.  You then teleport in a straight line to them again and make a Heavy attack.  If the attack is responded to with any RP action, knock them straight back 25ft again, teleport in a straight line to them and make another Heavy attack.
requirementHtml: Light sword, Longsword, Katana, dueling weapon only.
requirementText: Light sword, Longsword, Katana, dueling weapon only.

name: Flash Star Style: Photon Line
descriptionHtml:
You sidestep exactly 25ft in a straight line in any direction and can move over gaps of terrain as long as you end on solid ground. You make a Light attack against all targets that are in your path.  If only one target is in your path, make a Heavy attack instead.

If you were flying at least 10ft above the ground when using this ability, you do not need to end on solid ground.
descriptionText:
You sidestep exactly 25ft in a straight line in any direction and can move over gaps of terrain as long as you end on solid ground. You make a Light attack against all targets that are in your path.  If only one target is in your path, make a Heavy attack instead.

If you were flying at least 10ft above the ground when using this ability, you do not need to end on solid ground.
requirementHtml: Can move 25ft in a straight line. Light sword, longsword, katana, dueling weapon only.
requirementText: Can move 25ft in a straight line. Light sword, longsword, katana, dueling weapon only.

name: Flash Star Style: Starlight Crescent Reversal
descriptionHtml: You take advantage of the slow windup of the enemy’s attack, countering with a Light attack of your own. You may still Dodge or Block the triggering attack after this counter.
descriptionText: You take advantage of the slow windup of the enemy’s attack, countering with a Light attack of your own. You may still Dodge or Block the triggering attack after this counter.
requirementHtml: You are targeted by a heavy attack. Light sword, Longsword, Katana, dueling weapon only.
requirementText: You are targeted by a heavy attack. Light sword, Longsword, Katana, dueling weapon only.

name: Flash Star Style: Thunderbolt Slash
descriptionHtml:
You slash the target in a thunderbolt pattern, making a 3-hit attack.  Make 3 separate Light attacks against the target.  

Combo: If used immediately after Flash Star Style: Photon Line, mana cost reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You slash the target in a thunderbolt pattern, making a 3-hit attack.  Make 3 separate Light attacks against the target.

Combo: If used immediately after Flash Star Style: Photon Line, mana cost reduced by 1.
requirementHtml: Light sword, Longsword, Katana, dueling weapon only.
requirementText: Light sword, Longsword, Katana, dueling weapon only.

name: Flight
descriptionHtml:
You gain controlled Flight up to your speed. If you take damage while flying higher than 5ft above the ground, your altitude drops by 20ft. If this would reduce your altitude to the point where you touch the ground, you become rooted and cannot fly again until the end of your next turn. If the attack that reduced your HP came from a flying creature other than yourself, you do not lose altitude.

When you end your turn within 5ft of the ground, Flight ends.
descriptionText:
You gain controlled Flight up to your speed. If you take damage while flying higher than 5ft above the ground, your altitude drops by 20ft. If this would reduce your altitude to the point where you touch the ground, you become rooted and cannot fly again until the end of your next turn. If the attack that reduced your HP came from a flying creature other than yourself, you do not lose altitude.

When you end your turn within 5ft of the ground, Flight ends.

name: Flower Squirt
descriptionHtml: You press your flower and make a Light attack against the target that deals Water damage. On damage they are Soaked for X, where X equals your Focus until the next time they take Lightning damage.
descriptionText: You press your flower and make a Light attack against the target that deals Water damage. On damage they are Soaked for X, where X equals your Focus until the next time they take Lightning damage.

name: Flowing Kick
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Combo: If used after an unarmed attack misses, reduce the AP cost of this by 1.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Combo: If used after an unarmed attack misses, reduce the AP cost of this by 1.

name: Flowing Wind Strike
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target that deals additional damage equal to double your Windflow stacks. Afterwards, you lose all Windflow stacks.

Afterwards, you may Sidestep 5ft though this movement does not give a Windflow stack.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target that deals additional damage equal to double your Windflow stacks. Afterwards, you lose all Windflow stacks.

Afterwards, you may Sidestep 5ft though this movement does not give a Windflow stack.
requirementHtml: Must have moved at least 10ft before using this.
requirementText: Must have moved at least 10ft before using this.

name: Flushing Shot
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. The target may choose to sidestep out of cover from your attack to automatically avoid the attack. Otherwise, the attack gains Sure Hit.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. The target may choose to sidestep out of cover from your attack to automatically avoid the attack. Otherwise, the attack gains Sure Hit.
requirementHtml: Target must be in Low or High cover.
requirementText: Target must be in Low or High cover.

name: Fluttering Blade
descriptionHtml:
You infuse a melee weapon that you are familiar with (belongs to you and was originally in your combat inventory at the start of the encounter) with magic, causing it to float into the air that listens to your directions.  You can have one Fluttering Blade at a time. 

When a Fluttering Blade weapon is hit by an attack, it drops to the ground and becomes inert.

Fluttering Blade has a base evasion of 7+Your Agility. Instead of moving, you can instead direct your Fluttering Blade to move, it has a base movement speed of 30ft. You can also direct your Fluttering Blade to attack within range. It can make basic Heavy, Light and Precise attacks as well as special Fae Knight attacks.
descriptionText:
You infuse a melee weapon that you are familiar with (belongs to you and was originally in your combat inventory at the start of the encounter) with magic, causing it to float into the air that listens to your directions.  You can have one Fluttering Blade at a time.

When a Fluttering Blade weapon is hit by an attack, it drops to the ground and becomes inert.

Fluttering Blade has a base evasion of 7+Your Agility. Instead of moving, you can instead direct your Fluttering Blade to move, it has a base movement speed of 30ft. You can also direct your Fluttering Blade to attack within range. It can make basic Heavy, Light and Precise attacks as well as special Fae Knight attacks.

name: Fly
descriptionHtml: You or the creature you touch gains Fly, which gives them controlled Flight, Hover and their movement speed is doubled while flying until the end of the encounter. If they take damage while flying higher than 5ft above the ground, their altitude drops by 20ft. If this would reduce their altitude to the point where they touch the ground, they become rooted and cannot fly again until the end of their next turn. If the attack that reduced your HP came from an flying creature other than yourself, you do not lose altitude.
descriptionText: You or the creature you touch gains Fly, which gives them controlled Flight, Hover and their movement speed is doubled while flying until the end of the encounter. If they take damage while flying higher than 5ft above the ground, their altitude drops by 20ft. If this would reduce their altitude to the point where they touch the ground, they become rooted and cannot fly again until the end of their next turn. If the attack that reduced your HP came from an flying creature other than yourself, you do not lose altitude.

name: Flyby Attack
descriptionHtml: You sidestep up to your speed. At any point during this movement, you may spend 1 AP to make a Light attack with a weapon or spend 2 AP to make a Heavy attack with a weapon. After this attack, you may change the direction in which you spend the rest of your movement.
descriptionText: You sidestep up to your speed. At any point during this movement, you may spend 1 AP to make a Light attack with a weapon or spend 2 AP to make a Heavy attack with a weapon. After this attack, you may change the direction in which you spend the rest of your movement.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted on a flying mount.
requirementText: Must be mounted on a flying mount.

name: Flying Kick
descriptionHtml: You may Sidestep next to the target within range and make a Light Attack against it. You gain Flight for this movement. Combo: Your Strike of Still Water has its AP cost reduced by 1.
descriptionText: You may Sidestep next to the target within range and make a Light Attack against it. You gain Flight for this movement. Combo: Your Strike of Still Water has its AP cost reduced by 1.

name: Focused Detonation
descriptionHtml: Make a gathering check against either Node or Lucky points. If this strike would max it out, you may instead leave it at 1 away from completion and you gain +1 Strike Dice
descriptionText: Make a gathering check against either Node or Lucky points. If this strike would max it out, you may instead leave it at 1 away from completion and you gain +1 Strike Dice
requirementHtml: Must in a gathering session.
requirementText: Must in a gathering session.

name: Focused Power
descriptionHtml: When you’re about to take the extra damage from Inexorable Shadow Stance, you may choose to maximize the damage instead of rolling. Affects both the self damage and the damage you deal with it.
descriptionText: When you’re about to take the extra damage from Inexorable Shadow Stance, you may choose to maximize the damage instead of rolling. Affects both the self damage and the damage you deal with it.
requirementHtml: Must be in Inexorable Shadow Stance.
requirementText: Must be in Inexorable Shadow Stance.

name: Forager's Eye
descriptionHtml:
Initiate a sight and sound based search for hidden plants, fungi, creatures or living enemy units in a 30x30 area within range.  You become automatically aware of the targeted species of plants, fungi or creatures or you can choose to be aware of all hostile enemy units.  You must have line of sight to the target in order to spot them.  After revealing the target your Lifebeat Sense gains (if used immediately after):

Combo:  If used after Forager's Eye, the AP and mana cost of this is reduced by 1 and the target's location is known to you and your allies until the end of your next turn. This removes Hiding from them.
descriptionText:
Initiate a sight and sound based search for hidden plants, fungi, creatures or living enemy units in a 30x30 area within range.  You become automatically aware of the targeted species of plants, fungi or creatures or you can choose to be aware of all hostile enemy units. requirementHtml: Can see or hear the target category.
requirementText: Can see or hear the target category.

name: Forest Walker
descriptionHtml: You ignore difficult terrain created by vines, foliage and similar natural phenomena.
descriptionText: You ignore difficult terrain created by vines, foliage and similar natural phenomena.

name: Foretell
descriptionHtml:
You receive a vision of the near future. Roll a d20 and store that number. When you or your allies are going to roll that dice type, you can instead replace it with your dice roll, you then lose your Foretell dice. You can only have one Foretell dice at a time, casting Foretell again overwrites the previous dice. Foretel dice last until the end of your next turn.

After rolling, you may spend 1 mana to reroll the dice once. After doing this, you can't do so again for this use of the ability.
descriptionText:
You receive a vision of the near future. Roll a d20 and store that number. When you or your allies are going to roll that dice type, you can instead replace it with your dice roll, you then lose your Foretell dice. You can only have one Foretell dice at a time, casting Foretell again overwrites the previous dice. Foretel dice last until the end of your next turn.

After rolling, you may spend 1 mana to reroll the dice once. After doing this, you can't do so again for this use of the ability.

name: Forged Knowledge
descriptionHtml: Using your knowledge of weapons, you infuse the strongest point of your weapon with mana and then strike at the perfect angle dealing maximum weapon damage.  Maximize one damage dice for the attack.
descriptionText: Using your knowledge of weapons, you infuse the strongest point of your weapon with mana and then strike at the perfect angle dealing maximum weapon damage.  Maximize one damage dice for the attack.
requirementHtml: Attack must be made with a weapon you crafted.
requirementText: Attack must be made with a weapon you crafted.

name: Forged Knowledge II
descriptionHtml: Your bond with the weapon allows you to infuse it with mana at a crucial point. Use when determining attack damage, maximize all weapon dice for that attack.
descriptionText: Your bond with the weapon allows you to infuse it with mana at a crucial point. Use when determining attack damage, maximize all weapon dice for that attack.
requirementHtml: You or an ally attacked with a weapon you crafted.
requirementText: You or an ally attacked with a weapon you crafted.

descriptionHtml:
Blacksmith’s Modification B
Cost: X Crafting Points
Description: 
You add an B-Type modification to the weapon or tool. See the Universal Weapon or Crafting mods page as well as the individual weapon page for details. Each modification has its own cost.

name: Forked Lightning
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack against two different targets who can be no further than 20ft apart, dealing Lightning Damage and on damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus x 2.
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack against two different targets who can be no further than 20ft apart, dealing Lightning Damage and on damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus x 2.

name: Forward Momentum
descriptionHtml: Until the start of your next turn, on damage of every melee attack you make, you may push the target back 5ft. You must then move 5ft towards that target (if possible to do safely) without provoking attacks of opportunity. This only works with attacks that target a single enemy.
descriptionText: Until the start of your next turn, on damage of every melee attack you make, you may push the target back 5ft. You must then move 5ft towards that target (if possible to do safely) without provoking attacks of opportunity. This only works with attacks that target a single enemy.

name: Four Field System
descriptionHtml: Make a crafting check. Afterwards, whenever you use an ability for crafting that you haven’t used before in this crafting session, it gains a +2 bonus to the crafting points it gives.
descriptionText: Make a crafting check. Afterwards, whenever you use an ability for crafting that you haven’t used before in this crafting session, it gains a +2 bonus to the crafting points it gives.
requirementHtml: Must be in a crafting session and costs 1 crafting dice.
requirementText: Must be in a crafting session and costs 1 crafting dice.

name: Four Point Strike
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you apply Wave Palm II. 

Combo: If used after Two Point Strike or against a target afflicted with Wave Palm I, the mana cost is reduced by 2 and the AP cost by 1. If the target is afflicted with Wave Palm I, you apply Wave Palm III instead of Wave Palm II.

Wave Palm increases the mana cost of the afflicted target’s next action that uses mana by an amount equal to the amount of stacks applied. If the triggering attack makes the number of total stacks exceed the target's current mana, they lose mana equal to the amount of total stacks and take true damage equal to triple this amount. Wave Palm does not stack with itself, use only the higher value.

If the target has no mana, they immediately take true damage as if their stacks exceeded their current mana.

When the Wave Palm effect triggers, either by increasing the mana cost or by dealing the true damage, the Wave Palm effect is removed.
descriptionText:
You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you apply Wave Palm II.

Combo: If used after Two Point Strike or against a target afflicted with Wave Palm I, the mana cost is reduced by 2 and the AP cost by 1. If the target is afflicted with Wave Palm I, you apply Wave Palm III instead of Wave Palm II.

Wave Palm increases the mana cost of the afflicted target’s next action that uses mana by an amount equal to the amount of stacks applied. If the triggering attack makes the number of total stacks exceed the target's current mana, they lose mana equal to the amount of total stacks and take true damage equal to triple this amount. Wave Palm does not stack with itself, use only the higher value.

If the target has no mana, they immediately take true damage as if their stacks exceeded their current mana.

When the Wave Palm effect triggers, either by increasing the mana cost or by dealing the true damage, the Wave Palm effect is removed.

name: Frost Coffin
descriptionHtml: You cast a Spell that flash freezes a target Grunt, killing them instantly and creates a two Glacial Wall cube stack at their location. These cubes have HP equal to 15 + Focus. These structures can function as cover. Ice wall segments take double damage from Fire Attacks.
descriptionText: You cast a Spell that flash freezes a target Grunt, killing them instantly and creates a two Glacial Wall cube stack at their location. These cubes have HP equal to 15 + Focus. These structures can function as cover. Ice wall segments take double damage from Fire Attacks.

name: Frost Driver
descriptionHtml:
You send ice spikes along the ground towards a single target, making a Heavy attack that deals Frost Damage. This cannot hit a target higher than 5ft above the ground. On hit, the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.  If the target is already Slowed, they instead become Rooted, making them unable to move until the end of their next turn.

Combo: When used after Icicle Nail or White Thunder hits, reduce the mana cost to 0.
descriptionText:
You send ice spikes along the ground towards a single target, making a Heavy attack that deals Frost Damage. This cannot hit a target higher than 5ft above the ground. On hit, the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.  If the target is already Slowed, they instead become Rooted, making them unable to move until the end of their next turn.

Combo: When used after Icicle Nail or White Thunder hits, reduce the mana cost to 0.

name: Full Bloom
descriptionHtml: You consume Regrowth on the target, removing the buff and healing the target immediately for twice its regular value.
descriptionText: You consume Regrowth on the target, removing the buff and healing the target immediately for twice its regular value.
requirementHtml: Target ally must have Regrowth on them.
requirementText: Target ally must have Regrowth on them.

name: Full Dimensional Equip
descriptionHtml: You swap your armor, cloak and weapons currently wielded with a dimensional set.  The weapon and armor you had equipped as you used to this ability become a Dimensional Set, allowing you to switch back to it.
descriptionText: You swap your armor, cloak and weapons currently wielded with a dimensional set.  The weapon and armor you had equipped as you used to this ability become a Dimensional Set, allowing you to switch back to it.
requirementHtml: You have a Dimensional Armory active.
requirementText: You have a Dimensional Armory active.

name: Full Power Swing
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy attack that does double heavy damage.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy attack that does double heavy damage.
requirementHtml: Two-handed weapons only.
requirementText: Two-handed weapons only.

name: G. Shift
descriptionHtml:
You take 11 true damage, then choose to either lose 1 RP or reduce your AP by 1 for your first turn. 

You temporarily mutate your body, granting an effect similar to one of the following Alchemy Elixirs:  Rabbit, Reaper, Shark, Tunnel, Bull, Bear. This effect does not stack with their corresponding Elixir Effect. This effect cannot be dispelled and lasts until the end of the encounter.
descriptionText:
You take 11 true damage, then choose to either lose 1 RP or reduce your AP by 1 for your first turn.

You temporarily mutate your body, granting an effect similar to one of the following Alchemy Elixirs:  Rabbit, Reaper, Shark, Tunnel, Bull, Bear. This effect does not stack with their corresponding Elixir Effect. This effect cannot be dispelled and lasts until the end of the encounter.

name: Gale-Wind Aura
descriptionHtml: You project a Gale-Wind Aura around yourself that increases the movement speed of allies (excluding yourself) within 60ft of you by 20ft. An ally that starts their movement in the Aura, keeps the Speed increase for that move even if they leave the aura. Upkeep: You must spend 1 AP at the start of each turn or the aura fades.
descriptionText: You project a Gale-Wind Aura around yourself that increases the movement speed of allies (excluding yourself) within 60ft of you by 20ft. An ally that starts their movement in the Aura, keeps the Speed increase for that move even if they leave the aura. Upkeep: You must spend 1 AP at the start of each turn or the aura fades.

name: Gene Activation
descriptionHtml:
You transmute yourself, consuming a gene. You transform,  granting yourself a single chimera racial ability that corresponds with the gene. 

You are transformed until the end of your next turn. Doing this consumes the gene from your DNA. You can deactivate the transformation for 0 RP.

You cannot obtain and use abilities that require an IP or EP to use through this ability.
descriptionText:
You transmute yourself, consuming a gene. You transform,  granting yourself a single chimera racial ability that corresponds with the gene.

You are transformed until the end of your next turn. Doing this consumes the gene from your DNA. You can deactivate the transformation for 0 RP.

You cannot obtain and use abilities that require an IP or EP to use through this ability.
requirementHtml: Must have the required Gene in your gene inventory.
requirementText: Must have the required Gene in your gene inventory.

name: Genjutsu Kai
descriptionHtml: You focus your internal energies and dispel any Illusions affecting you or an ally within 5ft of you.
descriptionText: You focus your internal energies and dispel any Illusions affecting you or an ally within 5ft of you.
requirementHtml: Target is under the effects of an Illusion.
requirementText: Target is under the effects of an Illusion.

name: Glacial Bastion
descriptionHtml:
You encase yourself in a Glacial Wall that fills your space until the start of your next turn, making you untargetable for attacks during the duration. This Glacial Wall has HP equal to 20 + Focus, any remaining damage is transferred to you (mitigated by your armor).  While encased, you can cast White Thunder on your encased Ice for 1 RP which removes Glacial Bastion. Other than White Thunder, you cannot take any other actions while under the effect of Glacial Bastion.   

This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText:

name: Glacial Wall
descriptionHtml: You create 4 * X connected ice structures that are 5ft x 5ft cubes that last for up to 24 hours. These cubes have HP equal to 20 + Focus. These structures can function as low cover. Ice Wall segments take double damage from Fire Attacks.
descriptionText: You create 4 * X connected ice structures that are 5ft x 5ft cubes that last for up to 24 hours. These cubes have HP equal to 20 + Focus. These structures can function as low cover. Ice Wall segments take double damage from Fire Attacks.

name: Gleaming Cut
descriptionHtml: You attack with blades of pure light making a light attack against the target, dealing Holy(Light) damage. On damage, inflict Illumination  X where X equals your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn.
descriptionText: You attack with blades of pure light making a light attack against the target, dealing Holy(Light) damage. On damage, inflict Illumination  X where X equals your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn.

name: Glide
descriptionHtml: You slow down your falling speed to 15ft per round and you are able to move horizontally as if normally moving. If you hit the ground while Glide is active, you do not take any falling damage and this effect ends.
descriptionText: You slow down your falling speed to 15ft per round and you are able to move horizontally as if normally moving. If you hit the ground while Glide is active, you do not take any falling damage and this effect ends.

name: Glittershards
descriptionHtml: Numerous sparkling arcane crystals swarm the area and block line of sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Glittershards can only see up to 5ft into or out of Glittershards. Glittershards lasts for up to 10 minutes and you can only have 1 Glittershards active at a time. You can end this effect for 0 AP on your turn.
descriptionText: Numerous sparkling arcane crystals swarm the area and block line of sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Glittershards can only see up to 5ft into or out of Glittershards. Glittershards lasts for up to 10 minutes and you can only have 1 Glittershards active at a time. You can end this effect for 0 AP on your turn.

name: Gloom Infusion
descriptionHtml:
You surround a willing target in gloom and shadow, changing their typing to Dark II. As a Dark II type, they take half damage from Dark Damage or attacks with the Dark keywords, unless the attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Holy Damage or attacks with the Holy keyword. While the ward lasts, they also gain 60 feet Darkvision and a +4 bonus to saves against mind affecting effects. 

The ward lasts until the end of the encounter or until their type is overwritten by a more powerful type.
descriptionText:
You surround a willing target in gloom and shadow, changing their typing to Dark II. As a Dark II type, they take half damage from Dark Damage or attacks with the Dark keywords, unless the attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Holy Damage or attacks with the Holy keyword. While the ward lasts, they also gain 60 feet Darkvision and a +4 bonus to saves against mind affecting effects.

The ward lasts until the end of the encounter or until their type is overwritten by a more powerful type.

name: Gnome Claws
descriptionHtml: You burrow into natural earth ground, granting Burrow, making you move underground at your normal speed.  While you are not attacking, you gain a +10/+20 bonus to your dodge except against other burrowed creatures. Using any action except movement or basic defenses cancels Gnome Claws.  Canceling Gnome Claws with a melee attack grants a +2 Accuracy Bonus to the attack.
descriptionText: You burrow into natural earth ground, granting Burrow, making you move underground at your normal speed.  While you are not attacking, you gain a +10/+20 bonus to your dodge except against other burrowed creatures. Using any action except movement or basic defenses cancels Gnome Claws.  Canceling Gnome Claws with a melee attack grants a +2 Accuracy Bonus to the attack.

name: Good Fortune
descriptionHtml:
You always seem to find money in inexplicable ways.

At the end of an Interlude phase, you gain 500 Clim per Interlude Point spent during the phase.
descriptionText:
You always seem to find money in inexplicable ways.

At the end of an Interlude phase, you gain 500 Clim per Interlude Point spent during the phase.

name: Goring Charge
descriptionHtml:
You lower your head and charge in a direction with your horns. You move X times your speed in a straight line. If you move at least 15 feet, you make a Heavy attack against the first target in your path. They may sidestep this attack for 1 RP.

If a target sidesteps your attack, you continue charging for your maximum distance or until you hit an object. If you charge into another creature, you make a Heavy attack against them as well and the process continues. You do not provoke attacks of opportunity from creatures that sidestepped your attack for this movement.

If the object you charge into is destroyable, the GM may also ask you to make a Heavy attack against it.

These attacks are considered unarmed attacks that you are proficient in, even if you normally wouldn't be. It does not benefit from any sort of gauntlet bonuses.
descriptionText:

These attacks are considered unarmed attacks that you are proficient in, even if you normally wouldn't be. It does not benefit from any sort of gauntlet bonuses.

name: Graceful Landing
descriptionHtml: You gain Graceful Landing until the start of your next turn, treating all fall distance as 50ft lower.
descriptionText: You gain Graceful Landing until the start of your next turn, treating all fall distance as 50ft lower.

name: Graceful Service
descriptionHtml:
You assist a target character, giving them 1 additional encounter conclusion action.

This uses up your own encounter conclusion action.
descriptionText:
You assist a target character, giving them 1 additional encounter conclusion action.

This uses up your own encounter conclusion action.

name: Grand Theft Horse
descriptionHtml:
The target must make a save against your Potency or be immediately dismounted and knocked prone next to their mount. You may then spend 0 RP to immediately mount it.

Does not work against creatures that are considered a mount by themselves such as Dullahans or Centaurs.
descriptionText:
The target must make a save against your Potency or be immediately dismounted and knocked prone next to their mount. You may then spend 0 RP to immediately mount it.

Does not work against creatures that are considered a mount by themselves such as Dullahans or Centaurs.
requirementHtml: Target must be mounted.
requirementText: Target must be mounted.

name: Gravitational Push
descriptionHtml: You push the target 20ft or pull it 20ft towards you.
descriptionText: You push the target 20ft or pull it 20ft towards you.

name: Gravity Crush
descriptionHtml: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Physical (Crushing) damage.
descriptionText: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Physical (Crushing) damage.

name: Greater Imbue Weapon
descriptionHtml: You may enchant your weapon as though you had used Imbue Weapon, but it also gains a +1 Power bonus in addition to the normal benefits. If you are not holding the enchanted weapon at the start of your turn, your weapon loses this benefit.
descriptionText: You may enchant your weapon as though you had used Imbue Weapon, but it also gains a +1 Power bonus in addition to the normal benefits. If you are not holding the enchanted weapon at the start of your turn, your weapon loses this benefit.

name: Grindstone Echo
descriptionHtml: You make a crafting check. You may choose the dice result from a previous check this crafting session and use that as your roll value.
descriptionText: You make a crafting check. You may choose the dice result from a previous check this crafting session and use that as your roll value.
requirementHtml: Must be in a crafting session.
requirementText: Must be in a crafting session.

name: Grudge
descriptionHtml: You curse the attacker and make a Light attack that deals Dark(Curse) damage against them.
descriptionText: You curse the attacker and make a Light attack that deals Dark(Curse) damage against them.
requirementHtml: An enemy hits you with an attack.
requirementText: An enemy hits you with an attack.

name: Guard Dog
descriptionHtml:
You redirect the attack towards you instead of your ally and may take the Block action against it for 0 RP.

You may use this even if you’re also a target of the attack and both attacks will resolve against you. Your Block action works against both of these attacks.
descriptionText:
You redirect the attack towards you instead of your ally and may take the Block action against it for 0 RP.

You may use this even if you’re also a target of the attack and both attacks will resolve against you. Your Block action works against both of these attacks.
requirementHtml: An ally within range is the target of an attack.
requirementText: An ally within range is the target of an attack.

name: Guided Aim
descriptionHtml: You gain a bonus to your next accuracy roll equal to the mana spent on this ability. If the attack is a Precise Attack, the bonus gained is doubled.
descriptionText: You gain a bonus to your next accuracy roll equal to the mana spent on this ability. If the attack is a Precise Attack, the bonus gained is doubled.

name: Half Restore
descriptionHtml: You heal your summoned animal for 11 + Power x 2 HP. It also removes 1 negative effect from it. If the amount healed exceeds the target’s maximum HP, any extra HP is converted into temporary HP.
descriptionText: You heal your summoned animal for 11 + Power x 2 HP. It also removes 1 negative effect from it. If the amount healed exceeds the target’s maximum HP, any extra HP is converted into temporary HP.
requirementHtml: Can only target your summoned animal.
requirementText: Can only target your summoned animal.

name: Hammer and Nail
descriptionHtml: Make a light attack against the target with Sure Hit and Full Pierce.
descriptionText: Make a light attack against the target with Sure Hit and Full Pierce.
requirementHtml: An ally dealt damage to a target that didn't take a defense action.
requirementText: An ally dealt damage to a target that didn't take a defense action.

name: Hardening Fist
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, you gain Hardening Fist, which gives +2 guard and +8 Block, but lose 4 evasion (including dodge) until the start of your next turn.

Combo: If used after Steadfast Earth Stance, the mana cost is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, you gain Hardening Fist, which gives +2 guard and +8 Block, but lose 4 evasion (including dodge) until the start of your next turn.

Combo: If used after Steadfast Earth Stance, the mana cost is reduced by 1.

name: Harvest Moon
descriptionHtml:
You call down a harvest moon over the area that shines in a 60ft radius around yourself. 

All allies in range may spend 2 Mana at the start of their turn to heal for 15 HP.

All enemies starting their turn in its range must make a Save against your potency or become slowed.

You may end this ability early by choosing to make a 0 AP heavy attack against an enemy slowed by this ability. This attack must be made with a Scythe. On killing blow of that attack, you recover 1 mana.

Upkeep: You must spend 1 mana at the start of your turn to continue this effect.
descriptionText:
You call down a harvest moon over the area that shines in a 60ft radius around yourself.

All allies in range may spend 2 Mana at the start of their turn to heal for 15 HP.

All enemies starting their turn in its range must make a Save against your potency or become slowed.

You may end this ability early by choosing to make a 0 AP heavy attack against an enemy slowed by this ability. This attack must be made with a Scythe. On killing blow of that attack, you recover 1 mana.

Upkeep: You must spend 1 mana at the start of your turn to continue this effect.

name: Haste
descriptionHtml: Grants the target Haste, granting them 2 AP for the rest of this turn.  A target can only be affected by haste once per turn.
descriptionText: Grants the target Haste, granting them 2 AP for the rest of this turn.  A target can only be affected by haste once per turn.

name: Haunting Bark
descriptionHtml: You bark at an enemy forcing them to make a Save or become shaken until the end of their next turn. The third time in a combat you use this against the same target, they also take Light Full Pierce Lightning damage in addition to the shaken effect if they fail their save.
descriptionText: You bark at an enemy forcing them to make a Save or become shaken until the end of their next turn. The third time in a combat you use this against the same target, they also take Light Full Pierce Lightning damage in addition to the shaken effect if they fail their save.
requirementHtml: Must be in Dog Form.
requirementText: Must be in Dog Form.

name: Headless
descriptionHtml: Critical hits rolled against you do not gain Full Pierce and do not automatically deal maximum damage.
descriptionText: Critical hits rolled against you do not gain Full Pierce and do not automatically deal maximum damage.

name: Headwind
descriptionHtml:
You project an aura around you that hinders the movements of enemies. 

All enemies that start their movement within 30ft of you become slowed. If an enemy takes a Move basic action outside of your zone and spends more than 1 AP, they are still slowed after calculating each individual AP spent on the move.

Upkeep: 1 AP
descriptionText:
You project an aura around you that hinders the movements of enemies.

All enemies that start their movement within 30ft of you become slowed. If an enemy takes a Move basic action outside of your zone and spends more than 1 AP, they are still slowed after calculating each individual AP spent on the move.

Upkeep: 1 AP

name: Healing Seed
descriptionHtml:
The next time Regrowth naturally triggers on that ally and heals them, it also removes all stacks of a debuff on the target.

If the debuff has Persist, you pay this additional mana cost when the Regrowth triggers and not upon using this ability.
descriptionText:
The next time Regrowth naturally triggers on that ally and heals them, it also removes all stacks of a debuff on the target.

If the debuff has Persist, you pay this additional mana cost when the Regrowth triggers and not upon using this ability.
requirementHtml: Target ally must have Regrowth on them.
requirementText: Target ally must have Regrowth on them.

name: Heavenfall Descent
descriptionHtml:
You crash to the ground without taking falling damage and make a Light attack against all enemies within 5ft of you.

May target a point on the floor as long as it’s within 20ft of you horizontally.
descriptionText:
You crash to the ground without taking falling damage and make a Light attack against all enemies within 5ft of you.

May target a point on the floor as long as it’s within 20ft of you horizontally.
requirementHtml: Must be airborne and between 20ft and 120ft above the ground.
requirementText: Must be airborne and between 20ft and 120ft above the ground.

name: Heavenly Lightning Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter the Heavenly Lightning Stance, a stance that lets you move with the unpredictability of the heavens. For your first movement of your turn, you may pass through enemies and your movement becomes a Sidestep.

If you have mastered Sky Talon Style, entering this stance also counts as your Wind Stance.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance or make an attack with anything other than a melee attack or an ability with the Unarmed Strike keyword.
descriptionText:
You enter the Heavenly Lightning Stance, a stance that lets you move with the unpredictability of the heavens. For your first movement of your turn, you may pass through enemies and your movement becomes a Sidestep.

If you have mastered Sky Talon Style, entering this stance also counts as your Wind Stance.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance or make an attack with anything other than a melee attack or an ability with the Unarmed Strike keyword.

name: Heavy Trample
descriptionHtml: When using Trample, you may use your Toughness for the damage roll instead of your mount’s power.
descriptionText: When using Trample, you may use your Toughness for the damage roll instead of your mount’s power.

name: Helix Siphon
descriptionHtml:
When you make a melee attack against an enemy that is a Chimera, you copy some of their DNA, granting you a gene for any ability of their race.

This gene is temporary and only lasts until the end of combat. Alternatively, you can touch an ally Chimera or downed enemy and copy a single gene.
descriptionText:
When you make a melee attack against an enemy that is a Chimera, you copy some of their DNA, granting you a gene for any ability of their race.

This gene is temporary and only lasts until the end of combat. Alternatively, you can touch an ally Chimera or downed enemy and copy a single gene.
requirementHtml: Melee attack deals damage against a known Chimera.
requirementText: Melee attack deals damage against a known Chimera.

name: Hibernate
descriptionHtml: When you take the rest IP action, the temporary HP gained is doubled. When you rest during the night as a rest action, you recover an additional toughness HP.
descriptionText: When you take the rest IP action, the temporary HP gained is doubled. When you rest during the night as a rest action, you recover an additional toughness HP.

name: Hidden Wards
descriptionHtml: You may choose to hide your Bounded Fields when casting them by making a Stealth check. The casted ward uses the result of your Stealth check. Hidden Bounded Fields cannot be seen with Sense Magic without a successful perception or insight check.
descriptionText: You may choose to hide your Bounded Fields when casting them by making a Stealth check. The casted ward uses the result of your Stealth check. Hidden Bounded Fields cannot be seen with Sense Magic without a successful perception or insight check.

name: Hide in bush
descriptionHtml: You take the Hide action and are considered to be in cover for the purposes of remaining stealthed. This lasts until you take any action or speak.
descriptionText: You take the Hide action and are considered to be in cover for the purposes of remaining stealthed. This lasts until you take any action or speak.
requirementHtml: Must be in natural terrain.
requirementText: Must be in natural terrain.

name: Hide in Shadows
descriptionHtml:
You jump into a target’s shadow. If you were hidden before using this ability, you remain hidden inside the shadow. Else, the target or any other enemy may attack the shadow as if they were attacking you. If you take damage, you are forced out. While you’re inside the shadow, you travel with the target when it moves, including if it teleports, but cannot take actions other than exiting it.

You may exit the shadow willingly for 0 RP. When you exit it, if you were hidden, your next basic attack that turn against the target whose shadow you were hiding in gains Full Pierce.
descriptionText:
You jump into a target’s shadow. If you were hidden before using this ability, you remain hidden inside the shadow. Else, the target or any other enemy may attack the shadow as if they were attacking you. If you take damage, you are forced out. While you’re inside the shadow, you travel with the target when it moves, including if it teleports, but cannot take actions other than exiting it.

You may exit the shadow willingly for 0 RP. When you exit it, if you were hidden, your next basic attack that turn against the target whose shadow you were hiding in gains Full Pierce.
requirementHtml: Must be day.
requirementText: Must be day.

name: High Power Shell
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. On damage, they are pushed back 10ft.

You are pushed back 5ft away from the target regardless of whether it hits or not.
descriptionText:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. On damage, they are pushed back 10ft.

You are pushed back 5ft away from the target regardless of whether it hits or not.
requirementHtml: Cannon only.
requirementText: Cannon only.

name: Highly Sensitive to Magic
descriptionHtml: You may enter the Aetherie class without meeting its requirements and the cost for doing so is reduced by 100 exp.
descriptionText: You may enter the Aetherie class without meeting its requirements and the cost for doing so is reduced by 100 exp.

name: Hit & Run
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, you may move up to your speed.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, you may move up to your speed.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Holy Declaration
descriptionHtml: You take the Block action against the attack. Afterwards, you challenge all enemies within 5ft of you until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You take the Block action against the attack. Afterwards, you challenge all enemies within 5ft of you until the start of your next turn.

name: Holy Light
descriptionHtml: You Heal the target for 8 + Power
descriptionText: You Heal the target for 8 + Power

name: Holy Orders
descriptionHtml:
You target an enemy unit within range, causing the target to become your Holy Order until the start of your next turn. 

While active, only your Holy Order may be chosen as the target for any offensive ability, or must be included as a target to use an offensive action. 

If you make an attack of opportunity against your Holy Order, or if they move away from you while in your melee range, you can Sidestep up to twice your Speed towards them for 0 RP after their movement finishes.

Can only be used on your turn before you use an offensive action.
descriptionText:
You target an enemy unit within range, causing the target to become your Holy Order until the start of your next turn.

While active, only your Holy Order may be chosen as the target for any offensive ability, or must be included as a target to use an offensive action.

If you make an attack of opportunity against your Holy Order, or if they move away from you while in your melee range, you can Sidestep up to twice your Speed towards them for 0 RP after their movement finishes.

Can only be used on your turn before you use an offensive action.

name: Holy Shield
descriptionHtml:
Your gain Holy Shield, which gives your next Block action gains a +2 guard bonus (not doubled again). If you reduce the damage you take with your next Block action to 0, you gain 3 temporary HP.

Overcharge: You may spend up to 3 additional AP on this ability. Each extra AP spent increases the Guard bonus and temporary HP gained by 3.
descriptionText:
Your gain Holy Shield, which gives your next Block action gains a +2 guard bonus (not doubled again). If you reduce the damage you take with your next Block action to 0, you gain 3 temporary HP.

Overcharge: You may spend up to 3 additional AP on this ability. Each extra AP spent increases the Guard bonus and temporary HP gained by 3.

name: HONK!
descriptionHtml: You place a clown nose on the target and honk it. The target must succeed at a Save or become challenged by you until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You place a clown nose on the target and honk it. The target must succeed at a Save or become challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

name: Horse Body
descriptionHtml:
You may carry an ally on your back without lowering your movement speed and your Burden is increased by 2. However, you are considered a large creature. When attempting to move through 5ft wide spaces, it is considered difficult terrain for you and many humanoid buildings will struggle to accommodate you. You also suffer a -10 penalty on most finesse athletics checks, as well as a -10 penalty on climbing and swimming checks.

Picking up an ally takes 1 AP and they cannot take AP actions while on your back. You or they may spend 1 AP to dismount and act like normal.
descriptionText:
You may carry an ally on your back without lowering your movement speed and your Burden is increased by 2. However, you are considered a large creature. When attempting to move through 5ft wide spaces, it is considered difficult terrain for you and many humanoid buildings will struggle to accommodate you. You also suffer a -10 penalty on most finesse athletics checks, as well as a -10 penalty on climbing and swimming checks.

Picking up an ally takes 1 AP and they cannot take AP actions while on your back. You or they may spend 1 AP to dismount and act like normal.

name: Horse Step Acceleration
descriptionHtml: You gain Horse Step Acceleration until the start of your next turn, which increases movement speed by 30.  All of your movement is now Line Movement (You may only move in a straight line when making a movement action).
descriptionText: You gain Horse Step Acceleration until the start of your next turn, which increases movement speed by 30.  All of your movement is now Line Movement (You may only move in a straight line when making a movement action).

name: Horse Whistle
descriptionHtml: Your mount (the last mount you were riding on this arc) may sidestep up to its speed towards you and it gains Trample (as per the ability, if you have it) for this movement. If this movement moves your mount onto your square, you may mount it for 0 RP. If you were prone and mount your mount, you are no longer prone.
descriptionText: Your mount (the last mount you were riding on this arc) may sidestep up to its speed towards you and it gains Trample (as per the ability, if you have it) for this movement. If this movement moves your mount onto your square, you may mount it for 0 RP. If you were prone and mount your mount, you are no longer prone.
requirementHtml: Must NOT be mounted.
requirementText: Must NOT be mounted.

name: Hover
descriptionHtml: You can passively hover up to 5ft above the ground. While hovering, you are not an eligible target for abilities that require a target to be flying or airborne unless you'd meet those conditions normally.
descriptionText: You can passively hover up to 5ft above the ground. While hovering, you are not an eligible target for abilities that require a target to be flying or airborne unless you'd meet those conditions normally.

name: Hug tight
descriptionHtml: You deal Light Damage to the target.
descriptionText: You deal Light Damage to the target.
requirementHtml: Enemy Unit Affected By Just A Hug.
requirementText: Enemy Unit Affected By Just A Hug.

name: Human Adaptability
descriptionHtml:
As an errand action, you may refund an ability and choose to learn another ability. You cannot pick an ability that makes you ineligible for any of your prerequisites. Your new ability must cost the same as your unlearned one, or you must pay additional normal EXP to make up for the cost difference. If you choose to unlearn a class and learn a new one with this ability, you must spend IP for that new class as normal. Any previous IP spent on learning the class you unlearn is NOT refunded.

If you choose to refund primary stats, secondary stats or skill points and then level up the class again, you must put those points back in the same things you originally put them in.

Does not work on breakthroughs.
descriptionText:
As an errand action, you may refund an ability and choose to learn another ability. You cannot pick an ability that makes you ineligible for any of your prerequisites.
