If you choose to refund primary stats, secondary stats or skill points and then level up the class again, you must put those points back in the same things you originally put them in.

Does not work on breakthroughs.

name: Hunting Wolf
descriptionHtml: You may move towards the target as if you had spent X AP on movement. Your movement speed is doubled for this movement.
descriptionText: You may move towards the target as if you had spent X AP on movement. Your movement speed is doubled for this movement.
requirementHtml: The target enemy is below half HP.
requirementText: The target enemy is below half HP.

name: Hyphal Force
descriptionHtml:
Your spore symbiote surges the host’s muscles with temporary power. When the host of Spore Symbiote is making a melee attack, increase the damage by your Light Attack Damage. The extra damage dealt is Earth Damage.

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText:
Your spore symbiote surges the host’s muscles with temporary power. When the host of Spore Symbiote is making a melee attack, increase the damage by your Light Attack Damage. The extra damage dealt is Earth Damage.

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
requirementHtml: The host of your Spore Symbiote is making a melee attack.
requirementText: The host of your Spore Symbiote is making a melee attack.

name: Iai Strike
descriptionHtml: You draw your weapon and attack with lightning speed, making a Heavy Attack. You lose the Sheathed state afterwards.
descriptionText: You draw your weapon and attack with lightning speed, making a Heavy Attack. You lose the Sheathed state afterwards.
requirementHtml: Katana only. Must be in the Iai state.
requirementText: Katana only. Must be in the Iai state.

name: Icicle Nail
descriptionHtml: You fire a shard of ice at a target unit, making a Light Attack that deals Frost Damage. On hit, the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.
descriptionText: You fire a shard of ice at a target unit, making a Light Attack that deals Frost Damage. On hit, the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.

name: Ignite
descriptionHtml: You may use this as a reaction after you deal Fire Damage to an enemy to set them on fire, causing them to become Burning X, where X equals your Power x 3. Overcharge: You may target additional enemies with this ability if you hit them with the same ability or attack. You may pay 1 mana per target beyond the first to also affect them with this ability.
descriptionText: You may use this as a reaction after you deal Fire Damage to an enemy to set them on fire, causing them to become Burning X, where X equals your Power x 3. Overcharge: You may target additional enemies with this ability if you hit them with the same ability or attack. You may pay 1 mana per target beyond the first to also affect them with this ability.

name: Illuminating Flash
descriptionHtml: You select a point within range. All targets in a 15x15 area centered on the point must make a save against your Potency or be inflicted with Illumination X where X  your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn. They also become Blinded 5 for their next attack.
descriptionText: You select a point within range. All targets in a 15x15 area centered on the point must make a save against your Potency or be inflicted with Illumination X where X  your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn. They also become Blinded 5 for their next attack.

name: Imaginary Consumables
descriptionHtml:
You ‘draw’ an imaginary basic consumable alchemy item or minor item that can cost no more than 100c per mana spent on this ability and no more than 500c total. 

This consumable works like regular consumables would, but only you can use it, normal people can’t see it and it doesn’t work with abilities that require you to use real consumables like counter-potion.

Any items created with this ability only last until the end of the encounter, or for 5 minutes outside of one.
descriptionText:
You ‘draw’ an imaginary basic consumable alchemy item or minor item that can cost no more than 100c per mana spent on this ability and no more than 500c total.

This consumable works like regular consumables would, but only you can use it, normal people can’t see it and it doesn’t work with abilities that require you to use real consumables like counter-potion.

Any items created with this ability only last until the end of the encounter, or for 5 minutes outside of one.

name: Imaginary Weapon
descriptionHtml:
You ‘draw’ an imaginary weapon or shield in which you are proficient. 

This weapon works exactly like a normal weapon would, but only you can wield it and normal people can't see it.
descriptionText:
You ‘draw’ an imaginary weapon or shield in which you are proficient.

This weapon works exactly like a normal weapon would, but only you can wield it and normal people can't see it.

name: Improvised Defense
requirementHtml: You become the target of an attack.
requirementText: You become the target of an attack.

name: In The Zone
descriptionHtml: You add a crafting check to the item. This craft gains a +X bonus where X is equal to the amount of crafting dice spent this session.
descriptionText: You add a crafting check to the item. This craft gains a +X bonus where X is equal to the amount of crafting dice spent this session.
requirementHtml: Must be in a crafting session. Costs 1 Crafting Dice
requirementText: Must be in a crafting session. Costs 1 Crafting Dice

name: Incendiary Ray
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack that deals Fire damage against all targets in a 10ft wide line up to the range. On damage, inflict Burning X where X is your Power x 3.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack that deals Fire damage against all targets in a 10ft wide line up to the range. On damage, inflict Burning X where X is your Power x 3.

name: Increased Reach
descriptionHtml: The range of the next Spell you cast is doubled. Only works on Spells that have a range listed in ft.
descriptionText: The range of the next Spell you cast is doubled. Only works on Spells that have a range listed in ft.

name: Independent Action
descriptionHtml:
Your animal summoned through the Summon Animal ability gains the ability to act independently. It acts at initiative 0, though you may still control its action. A summon with Independent Action starts with 2 AP and 1 RP and may use those as normal. If they have an ability that costs mana, then you still have to pay that mana cost.

While it is under the effects of Independent Action, you cannot command your summon through the use of your own AP.

A summon targeted by this ability takes up 2 slots towards the summon limit. If this would put you past your limit, you cannot use this ability.
descriptionText:
Your animal summoned through the Summon Animal ability gains the ability to act independently. It acts at initiative 0, though you may still control its action. A summon with Independent Action starts with 2 AP and 1 RP and may use those as normal. If they have an ability that costs mana, then you still have to pay that mana cost.

While it is under the effects of Independent Action, you cannot command your summon through the use of your own AP.

A summon targeted by this ability takes up 2 slots towards the summon limit. If this would put you past your limit, you cannot use this ability.
requirementHtml: Can only target your summoned animal.
requirementText: Can only target your summoned animal.

name: Inexorable Shadow Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter a stance that enhances your attacks at the cost of your own life. Whenever you hit an enemy with an unarmed attack, you may deal Light or Heavy true damage to yourself to increase the damage of the attack by the same amount. This may be done after reactions to the attack have been declared, though an enemy may still choose to react to it again or differently afterwards.

If used with an attack that hits more than 1 target, this extra damage only applies to one of the damage rolls.

You may do this effect twice per round. If an enemy dodges to make you miss and refund the effect, it still counts as one of your uses. When enhanced, these attacks gain the Augment keyword.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance.
descriptionText:
You enter a stance that enhances your attacks at the cost of your own life. Whenever you hit an enemy with an unarmed attack, you may deal Light or Heavy true damage to yourself to increase the damage of the attack by the same amount. This may be done after reactions to the attack have been declared, though an enemy may still choose to react to it again or differently afterwards.

If used with an attack that hits more than 1 target, this extra damage only applies to one of the damage rolls.

You may do this effect twice per round. If an enemy dodges to make you miss and refund the effect, it still counts as one of your uses. When enhanced, these attacks gain the Augment keyword.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance.

name: Infernal Bastion
descriptionHtml: You surround yourself with flames and take the Block action against the attack. If you reduce damage of this attack to 0, inflict Burning X on the target where X is your focus x 3.
descriptionText: You surround yourself with flames and take the Block action against the attack. If you reduce damage of this attack to 0, inflict Burning X on the target where X is your focus x 3.
requirementHtml: You are targeted by a melee attack.
requirementText: You are targeted by a melee attack.

name: Inspired Finish
descriptionHtml: Make a crafting check. The dice is upgraded to 3d10 and you still add your crafting bonus to this. The crafting immediately ends after using this ability and you may not spend Crafting Points to add artisan bonuses, alloys or similar things.
descriptionText: Make a crafting check. The dice is upgraded to 3d10 and you still add your crafting bonus to this. The crafting immediately ends after using this ability and you may not spend Crafting Points to add artisan bonuses, alloys or similar things.
requirementHtml: This is your last crafting dice. Costs 1 Crafting Dice.
requirementText: This is your last crafting dice. Costs 1 Crafting Dice.

name: Inspiring Song
descriptionHtml:
All allies within range (including yourself) may add 1d4 to a single roll they make until the start of your next turn. They may choose to add this after seeing the roll.

Upkeep: At the start of your next turn and every turn thereafter, you may spend 1 AP to continue this performance, granting all allies within range the benefit once again.
descriptionText:
All allies within range (including yourself) may add 1d4 to a single roll they make until the start of your next turn. They may choose to add this after seeing the roll.

Upkeep: At the start of your next turn and every turn thereafter, you may spend 1 AP to continue this performance, granting all allies within range the benefit once again.

name: Instinct
descriptionHtml:
The first time per encounter that you are attacked by a Stealth attack, that attack does not gain the Trick Attack benefit. If you become the target of an attack while you're surprised, you may still react to it and any special properties of an attack that require you to be unaware of the attack (such as Killshot) do not apply to it. 

In addition, when you are about to take an action that leads to grave harm or death (example: The enemy has an instant death ability), you can receive a premonition from the DM.
descriptionText:
The first time per encounter that you are attacked by a Stealth attack, that attack does not gain the Trick Attack benefit. If you become the target of an attack while you're surprised, you may still react to it and any special properties of an attack that require you to be unaware of the attack (such as Killshot) do not apply to it.

In addition, when you are about to take an action that leads to grave harm or death (example: The enemy has an instant death ability), you can receive a premonition from the DM.

name: Intercept
descriptionHtml:
You move towards an ally, Sidestepping them 5ft in a direction of their choice and occupying their square. The triggering attack is made against you and you automatically take the Block action against it.

Mounted move rules apply to your movement for this action.
descriptionText:
You move towards an ally, Sidestepping them 5ft in a direction of their choice and occupying their square. The triggering attack is made against you and you automatically take the Block action against it.

Mounted move rules apply to your movement for this action.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted and an ally is the target of an attack.
requirementText: Must be mounted and an ally is the target of an attack.

name: Into the Fray
descriptionHtml: You may move up to twice your movement speed. You must end this movement in range to make a melee attack against an enemy. Can only be used on your turn.
descriptionText: You may move up to twice your movement speed. You must end this movement in range to make a melee attack against an enemy. Can only be used on your turn.

name: Invisible Wall
descriptionHtml: You create an invisible 5ft wide and high wall within range. It gives Low Cover, but it counts as High Cover against the first ranged attacks the wall gives cover from.
descriptionText: You create an invisible 5ft wide and high wall within range. It gives Low Cover, but it counts as High Cover against the first ranged attacks the wall gives cover from.

name: Judgement Shot
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target.

Afterwards, an ally other than you within 30ft of you may make a Light attack against the target. They may spend 1 RP to make this a Heavy or Precise attack instead.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target.

Afterwards, an ally other than you within 30ft of you may make a Light attack against the target. They may spend 1 RP to make this a Heavy or Precise attack instead.

name: Jump
descriptionHtml: You leap up to 30ft into the air and then Sidestep up to twice your Speed. You may use Skydive at any point during this movement.
descriptionText: You leap up to 30ft into the air and then Sidestep up to twice your Speed. You may use Skydive at any point during this movement.

name: Jump Back
descriptionHtml: You Jump Back to your previous location. This movement does not provoke any attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You Jump Back to your previous location. This movement does not provoke any attacks of opportunity.

name: Just a hug
descriptionHtml:
You coil and grapple a non-heroic enemy that is not larger than you, rooting both of you and rendering the target incapable of any attacks.  You automatically guard against any attacks made towards the target as if using Block.  You can also use this on a willing ally target.

The target may spend 1 Ap or 1 RP to attempt to escape, granting them escape power equal to their power.  Further escape attempts continue to add escape power.  When the escape power is equal to 8, then the target successfully escapes.  You may end this effect at any time for 0 RP.
descriptionText:
You coil and grapple a non-heroic enemy that is not larger than you, rooting both of you and rendering the target incapable of any attacks.  You automatically guard against any attacks made towards the target as if using Block.  You can also use this on a willing ally target.

The target may spend 1 Ap or 1 RP to attempt to escape, granting them escape power equal to their power.  Further escape attempts continue to add escape power.  When the escape power is equal to 8, then the target successfully escapes.  You may end this effect at any time for 0 RP.

name: Justice Blade
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.

name: Kage Bunshin: Kyomei
descriptionHtml: Your clone assists in the preparation of your next Ninjutsu, reducing the AP cost of it by 1.
descriptionText: Your clone assists in the preparation of your next Ninjutsu, reducing the AP cost of it by 1.
requirementHtml: You must have a Bunshin clone active and within range.
requirementText: You must have a Bunshin clone active and within range.

name: Kage Shuriken no Jutsu
descriptionHtml: You attack by throwing two weapons at the target, one hidden in the shadow of the other. Both of these are considered Light Attacks. If you fail your Accuracy roll on the first one, the second gains Sure Hit.
descriptionText: You attack by throwing two weapons at the target, one hidden in the shadow of the other. Both of these are considered Light Attacks. If you fail your Accuracy roll on the first one, the second gains Sure Hit.

name: Kawarimi no Jutsu
descriptionHtml: The triggering attack automatically misses and you may move up to your Speed without provoking attacks of opportunity. You then gain the Hiding state from anyone you have cover or concealment from.
descriptionText: The triggering attack automatically misses and you may move up to your Speed without provoking attacks of opportunity. You then gain the Hiding state from anyone you have cover or concealment from.

name: Ki Blast
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals Arcane damage.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals Arcane damage.

name: Ki Blast II
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) Attack against the target. This attack deals Arcane Damage.
descriptionText: You may make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) Attack against the target. This attack deals Arcane Damage.

name: Ki Burst
descriptionHtml:
Your attack deals an extra X damage.

If used with a basic attack or double punch, deal 2X extra damage instead up to a maximum of +10 damage. Only affects 1 damage roll even if an attack makes multiple attacks.
descriptionText:
Your attack deals an extra X damage.

If used with a basic attack or double punch, deal 2X extra damage instead up to a maximum of +10 damage. Only affects 1 damage roll even if an attack makes multiple attacks.

name: Ki Circulation
descriptionHtml: You cycle the Ki inside your body and purge it from negative energy. You remove Bleeding, Shaken, Unbalanced or any Poison effect from yourself.
descriptionText: You cycle the Ki inside your body and purge it from negative energy. You remove Bleeding, Shaken, Unbalanced or any Poison effect from yourself.

name: Ki Recovery
descriptionHtml: You spend your Encounter Conclusion action to regain 2 mana.
descriptionText: You spend your Encounter Conclusion action to regain 2 mana.

name: Ki Sense
descriptionHtml: You send out your Ki and become aware of any creatures without presence concealment within 40ft of you, giving you a rough idea of their location. This does not remove Hiding from them, but their attacks against you do not gain Trick Attack or any other stealth or surprise bonuses until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You send out your Ki and become aware of any creatures without presence concealment within 40ft of you, giving you a rough idea of their location. This does not remove Hiding from them, but their attacks against you do not gain Trick Attack or any other stealth or surprise bonuses until the start of your next turn.

name: Kibaku Fuda Shuriken
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack by throwing a weapon with an explosive tag attached at a target. Regardless of whether it hits, the target and others within 5ft of the target must then make a save against Potency or take Light Fire Damage.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack by throwing a weapon with an explosive tag attached at a target. Regardless of whether it hits, the target and others within 5ft of the target must then make a save against Potency or take Light Fire Damage.

name: Killshot
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals double Heavy Damage instead.

If fired in the first round of combat while all enemies are unaware of you, the target has to spend an additional RP to react to your attack. This stacks with the Trick Attack keyword, but is ineffective against abilities that negate surprise or stealth attacks such as Instinct.
descriptionText:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals double Heavy Damage instead.

If fired in the first round of combat while all enemies are unaware of you, the target has to spend an additional RP to react to your attack. This stacks with the Trick Attack keyword, but is ineffective against abilities that negate surprise or stealth attacks such as Instinct.

name: Kiri-tsuke
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you regain the Iai state.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you regain the Iai state.

name: Kiri-tsuke II
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you regain the Iai state. Combo: If used after Iai Strike, the AP cost is reduced by 1.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you regain the Iai state. Combo: If used after Iai Strike, the AP cost is reduced by 1.

name: Kneel
descriptionHtml: The target must make a Save or fall prone.
descriptionText: The target must make a Save or fall prone.

name: Knockback Shot
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target is pushed back 20ft.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target is pushed back 20ft.

name: Knockout Punch
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On damage if the enemy is a Grunt, they immediately drop to 0 HP and fall unconscious.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On damage if the enemy is a Grunt, they immediately drop to 0 HP and fall unconscious.

name: Kugeki-zan
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target.
requirementHtml: Target must have 0 RP remaining.
requirementText: Target must have 0 RP remaining.

name: Last Rites
descriptionHtml: You deal +1 damage to undead creatures. This is increased to a +2 bonus on Heavy attacks.
descriptionText: You deal +1 damage to undead creatures. This is increased to a +2 bonus on Heavy attacks.

name: Last Stand
descriptionHtml: Until the start of your next turn, you may use the Block action for 0 RP and you gain additional Guard equal to the mana spent on this ability. Once you use this ability, you cannot use it again in this encounter.
descriptionText: Until the start of your next turn, you may use the Block action for 0 RP and you gain additional Guard equal to the mana spent on this ability. Once you use this ability, you cannot use it again in this encounter.

name: Lay on Hands
descriptionHtml: You Heal the target for 4 + Power. Overcharge: You may spend an additional mana to remove a negative effect from the target. Injuries and Mortal Wounds cannot be removed with this.
descriptionText: You Heal the target for 4 + Power. Overcharge: You may spend an additional mana to remove a negative effect from the target. Injuries and Mortal Wounds cannot be removed with this.

name: Leashing
descriptionHtml: You teleport your summoned animal to an empty square within 5ft of you.
descriptionText: You teleport your summoned animal to an empty square within 5ft of you.
requirementHtml: Can only target your summoned animal.
requirementText: Can only target your summoned animal.

name: Leg Sweep
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, the target falls Prone.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, the target falls Prone.

name: Lengthened Incantation
descriptionHtml:
You lengthen the time it takes to cast your next Spell to empower it. You may add 2 AP to the cost of your next spell with the Spell gaining additional Light Damage on it. If you cannot pay this AP cost this turn, the Spell also gains the Setup keyword.

If the Spell has multiple attack rolls or different damage rolls, this bonus only applies to one of them.

However, if the spell is a Scattering AoE spell then the bonus damage applies to all targets of that spell. If that Scattering spell hits a target more than once it only applies to one damage roll. If the spell lasts for multiple turns, it only applies to the initial casting.
descriptionText:
You lengthen the time it takes to cast your next Spell to empower it. You may add 2 AP to the cost of your next spell with the Spell gaining additional Light Damage on it. If you cannot pay this AP cost this turn, the Spell also gains the Setup keyword.

If the Spell has multiple attack rolls or different damage rolls, this bonus only applies to one of them.

However, if the spell is a Scattering AoE spell then the bonus damage applies to all targets of that spell. If that Scattering spell hits a target more than once it only applies to one damage roll. If the spell lasts for multiple turns, it only applies to the initial casting.

name: Lifebeat Sense
descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of the target until the end of combat.  (The DM should enable health bars for the unit, or you can ask for an approximate percentage). In addition, the target is afflicted by Expose 1, reducing the target’s crit threshold by 1. (20 to crit becomes 19.) Expose is removed once the target is critically hit (regardless of if they defend or not)
descriptionText: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of the target until the end of combat.  (The DM should enable health bars for the unit, or you can ask for an approximate percentage). In addition, the target is afflicted by Expose 1, reducing the target’s crit threshold by 1. (20 to crit becomes 19.) Expose is removed once the target is critically hit (regardless of if they defend or not)

name: Lifesense
descriptionHtml:
You know the direction your Soulmate is in and if you’re within 300 feet of them, you know their exact location.

You also know their current HP, Mana and RP.
descriptionText:
You know the direction your Soulmate is in and if you’re within 300 feet of them, you know their exact location.

You also know their current HP, Mana and RP.

name: Light Work
descriptionHtml: Only usable as the first crafting action. All material costs are doubled and all produced items are doubled. You may only use basic crafting actions for the rest of the craft. Make a crafting attempt.
descriptionText: Only usable as the first crafting action. All material costs are doubled and all produced items are doubled. You may only use basic crafting actions for the rest of the craft. Make a crafting attempt.
requirementHtml: Costs 1 Crafting Dice.
requirementText: Costs 1 Crafting Dice.

name: Light's Care
descriptionHtml: At the end of combat you may use 1 Encounter Conclusion action to heal a single target for 11 + Power x 2 and grant them First Aid. First Aid: The target can expend an Encounter Conclusion Action to prevent one injury to themself.
descriptionText: At the end of combat you may use 1 Encounter Conclusion action to heal a single target for 11 + Power x 2 and grant them First Aid. First Aid: The target can expend an Encounter Conclusion Action to prevent one injury to themself.

name: Lightning Lariat
descriptionHtml:
You gather lightning energy and move up to your speed in a direct line and make a Heavy attack against a target. If you moved more than 60ft before making the attack, your attack gains the Trick Attack keyword.

Overcharge: You may spend X mana to move an additional 2 x X times your speed. 

Combo: If used after Heavenly Lightning Stance or Secret Art: Lightning Release, the mana cost is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You gather lightning energy and move up to your speed in a direct line and make a Heavy attack against a target. If you moved more than 60ft before making the attack, your attack gains the Trick Attack keyword.

Overcharge: You may spend X mana to move an additional 2 x X times your speed.

Combo: If used after Heavenly Lightning Stance or Secret Art: Lightning Release, the mana cost is reduced by 1.

name: Lightning Rod
descriptionHtml: You gain Damage Reduction 100 Lightning for the triggering attack. If you reduce damage in any way from this ability and the attacker isn't you, you gain a Power Bonus on your next Lightning Elemental Attack equal to the attacker’s Power.
descriptionText: You gain Damage Reduction 100 Lightning for the triggering attack. If you reduce damage in any way from this ability and the attacker isn't you, you gain a Power Bonus on your next Lightning Elemental Attack equal to the attacker’s Power.

name: Lightning Weapon
descriptionHtml: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Lightning Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare you chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.
descriptionText: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Lightning Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare you chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

name: Line of Death
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. Overcharge: You may spend 1 additional mana and AP to make another Light Attack against the same target.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. Overcharge: You may spend 1 additional mana and AP to make another Light Attack against the same target.
requirementHtml: Slashing weapons only.
requirementText: Slashing weapons only.

name: Living Lightning
descriptionHtml: You turn into a spark of lightning as you move. For this movement action, you deal Light Lightning damage to all creatures you pass through.
descriptionText: You turn into a spark of lightning as you move. For this movement action, you deal Light Lightning damage to all creatures you pass through.
requirementHtml: Not mounted and must move entirely in a straight line.
requirementText: Not mounted and must move entirely in a straight line.

name: Localized Collapse
descriptionHtml:
You target a 15x15ft square. All in the area take damage equal to your Focus / 2. If a creature occupies multiple squares in your target square, they take damage for each square they occupy.

A creature caught in it may spend 1 RP to avoid the effect.
descriptionText:
You target a 15x15ft square. All in the area take damage equal to your Focus / 2. If a creature occupies multiple squares in your target square, they take damage for each square they occupy.

A creature caught in it may spend 1 RP to avoid the effect.

name: Long Toss
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack has triple the range it would normally have.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack has triple the range it would normally have.
requirementHtml: Throwing Weapon, Set of Missiles or Thrown attack only.
requirementText: Throwing Weapon, Set of Missiles or Thrown attack only.

name: Lord of Mercenary
descriptionHtml:
At the start of a new adventure, you can hire an NPC to help you for the entire adventure. You can also use this ability at other times that the DM allows you to. When you summon them, choose a name and appearance for the character unless the DM does.

The cost is per week and depends on the NPC. If your hired help dies, you cannot use this ability until you complete a new separate adventure. This ability counts as 1 towards your summon limit as long as the mercenary is in your employ, unless specified. These mercs can be modified through Expert Summoner breakthrough, but this must be done the moment you hire them.

Refer to the Monster guide for stats of mercenaries. The mercenaries and costs are:
Archer: 250/ Week
Acolyte: 750c / Week
Tank: 500c / Week
Apprentice: 750c/ Week
Rogue: 200c / Week
Brute: 200c / Week
descriptionText:

name: Loyalty
descriptionHtml: When standing within 5ft of a heroic ally, your Guard is increased by 1 and your Block is increased by 2.
descriptionText: When standing within 5ft of a heroic ally, your Guard is increased by 1 and your Block is increased by 2.

name: Luminous Form Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter the Luminous Form Stance and create the Threads of Light. These manifest spiritual cloth, spectral arms or something similar that enhances your reach.

While in this stance, you gain an additional 10ft range on your unarmed attacks and your threatened range becomes 5-15ft. Whenever you deal damage to an enemy with an unarmed strike ability (not basic attacks), you gain 1 stack of Harmony up to a maximum of 5. You cannot gain more than 1 Harmony per use of ability.

When you leave this stance all stacks are lost.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance or you willingly move, with the exception of movement abilities with the unarmed strike keyword. Abilities from allies that allow you to move, such as Gravitional Ki, count as willing movement.
descriptionText:
You enter the Luminous Form Stance and create the Threads of Light. These manifest spiritual cloth, spectral arms or something similar that enhances your reach.

While in this stance, you gain an additional 10ft range on your unarmed attacks and your threatened range becomes 5-15ft. Whenever you deal damage to an enemy with an unarmed strike ability (not basic attacks), you gain 1 stack of Harmony up to a maximum of 5. You cannot gain more than 1 Harmony per use of ability.

When you leave this stance all stacks are lost.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance or you willingly move, with the exception of movement abilities with the unarmed strike keyword. Abilities from allies that allow you to move, such as Gravitional Ki, count as willing movement.

name: Lunge
descriptionHtml: The attack range of your next basic Light, Heavy or Precise Attack with a melee weapon is doubled.
descriptionText: The attack range of your next basic Light, Heavy or Precise Attack with a melee weapon is doubled.

name: Mage Armor
descriptionHtml:
You gain magical Light Armor, Medium Armor or Heavy Armor until the end of the encounter. This function just as normal armor of that type would, giving the same benefits and penalties. Does not stack with other armor, apply the effects of the Mage Armor This magical armor does not require proficiency of any sort and does not cost any Burden to wear and carry.

You may apply the effects of Barrier, Fortress, Manaweave, Protective Coating or Spidersilk to this armor (It must still meet the requirements, you cannot put fortress on a light armor for example). This can only be done when you first apply it, not if you later change your armor during combat.

If Mage Armor is active, you may spend 2 AP to change its type or to remove it.
descriptionText:

If Mage Armor is active, you may spend 2 AP to change its type or to remove it.

name: Magic Blast
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Arcane damage.

If you have an element mastered, you may change the damage of this spell to that element.
descriptionText:

descriptionHtml:
You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Arcane damage.

If you have an element mastered, you may change the damage of this spell to that element.

name: Magic Missile
descriptionHtml:
You fire a highly accurate blast of arcane energy at the target, making a Precise Attack that deals Arcane damage against the target

This attack does not gain Pinpoint.
descriptionText:
You fire a highly accurate blast of arcane energy at the target, making a Precise Attack that deals Arcane damage against the target

name: Magic Missile II
descriptionHtml: You fire a highly accurate blast of arcane energy at the target, making a Precise Attack that deals Arcane damage against the target
descriptionText: You fire a highly accurate blast of arcane energy at the target, making a Precise Attack that deals Arcane damage against the target

name: Malevolent Phantasm
descriptionHtml: You siphon the energy lost from your allies and make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals Dark Damage.
descriptionText: You siphon the energy lost from your allies and make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals Dark Damage.
requirementHtml: An ally (including yourself) took damage on your turn.
requirementText: An ally (including yourself) took damage on your turn.

name: Mana Burst
descriptionHtml:
You augment your next attack, increasing accuracy by 3 and dealing 3 bonus damage on hit.

You may use AP for this attack instead.
descriptionText:
You augment your next attack, increasing accuracy by 3 and dealing 3 bonus damage on hit.

You may use AP for this attack instead.

name: Mana Razor
descriptionHtml:
Until the end of your turn you gain Mana Razor granting your basic melee attacks an additional 30ft range. Augmenting melee attacks with this ability makes them into ranged attacks. If using a Two-Handed melee weapon with Mana Razor, gain an additional 45ft range instead.

Overcharge: You may spend 1 mana to have this also affect basic ranged attacks and to remove the Quick keyword from it.
descriptionText:
Until the end of your turn you gain Mana Razor granting your basic melee attacks an additional 30ft range. Augmenting melee attacks with this ability makes them into ranged attacks. If using a Two-Handed melee weapon with Mana Razor, gain an additional 45ft range instead.

Overcharge: You may spend 1 mana to have this also affect basic ranged attacks and to remove the Quick keyword from it.

name: Mana Shield
descriptionHtml:
You use your Encounter Start action to give yourself Mana Shield, which gives you Temporary HP equal to your Toughness + 3 or Focus + 3 (whichever is higher). 

Wearing armor reduces this to 2/3rd, 1/3rd or 0 if wearing Light, Medium or Heavy Armor respectively. While Mana Shield is active, you do not provoke attacks of opportunity from casting Spells from enemies that are Challenged by you.

Until the end of the encounter, at the start of your turn you may spend 1 mana to restore your Mana Shield to its maximum value. (With similarly reduced values for wearing armor)

If you did not use this as an encounter start, you may also spend 1 AP and 1 Mana to activate this.
descriptionText:
You use your Encounter Start action to give yourself Mana Shield, which gives you Temporary HP equal to your Toughness + 3 or Focus + 3 (whichever is higher).

Wearing armor reduces this to 2/3rd, 1/3rd or 0 if wearing Light, Medium or Heavy Armor respectively. While Mana Shield is active, you do not provoke attacks of opportunity from casting Spells from enemies that are Challenged by you.

Until the end of the encounter, at the start of your turn you may spend 1 mana to restore your Mana Shield to its maximum value. (With similarly reduced values for wearing armor)

If you did not use this as an encounter start, you may also spend 1 AP and 1 Mana to activate this.

name: Mana Sight
descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate mana percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable mana bar for the unit).
descriptionText: You can assess the approximate mana percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable mana bar for the unit).

name: Mantra: Flowing Perception
descriptionHtml:
You extend your Threads of Light and make an unarmed light attack against a target within range. On damage, you may pull yourself towards the target and sidestep to the nearest square within 5ft of them.

You may also use this on ally. If you do, this always hits and deals no damage. It still gives you a stack of Harmony.
descriptionText:

You may also use this on ally. If you do, this always hits and deals no damage. It still gives you a stack of Harmony.
requirementHtml: Must be in Luminous Form Stance.
requirementText: Must be in Luminous Form Stance.

name: Mantra: Pure Intentions
descriptionHtml:
You wrap your Threads of Light around the chosen ally and channel your Harmony into them.

You may spend up to 5 stacks of Harmony and 1 mana per stack you consume to heal an ally within range for 3+Focus for each stack.
descriptionText:
You wrap your Threads of Light around the chosen ally and channel your Harmony into them.

You may spend up to 5 stacks of Harmony and 1 mana per stack you consume to heal an ally within range for 3+Focus for each stack.
requirementHtml: Must have at least 1 stack of Harmony.
requirementText: Must have at least 1 stack of Harmony.

name: Mark of Justice
descriptionHtml:
You mark a single enemy, inflicting Mark of Justice on them. A marked enemy’s movement speed is reduced to 20ft. Abilities that allow for movement cannot move the target for more than 20ft per use. Secret Arts and Esoteric Arts are not affected by this. You can only have a single enemy marked by this at the same time. It lasts until the end of the encounter. Does not work on vehicles.

A marked target may spend 1 mana per AP/RP of the action (with a minimum of 1 mana even for 0 AP abilities) to temporarily ignore the restricting effect for a movement action.
descriptionText:
You mark a single enemy, inflicting Mark of Justice on them. A marked enemy’s movement speed is reduced to 20ft. Abilities that allow for movement cannot move the target for more than 20ft per use. Secret Arts and Esoteric Arts are not affected by this. You can only have a single enemy marked by this at the same time. It lasts until the end of the encounter. Does not work on vehicles.

A marked target may spend 1 mana per AP/RP of the action (with a minimum of 1 mana even for 0 AP abilities) to temporarily ignore the restricting effect for a movement action.

name: Mashup
descriptionHtml: You may activate another song with the Idol keyword. This song’s AP cost is reduced by 2 and this song may go past your regular maximum song limits.
descriptionText: You may activate another song with the Idol keyword. This song’s AP cost is reduced by 2 and this song may go past your regular maximum song limits.
requirementHtml: Must have at least 1 song with Idol keyword active.
requirementText: Must have at least 1 song with Idol keyword active.

name: Master of the Empty Sky
descriptionHtml: When flying, you gain a +2 Cover bonus to your Evasion and Dodge against ranged attacks.
descriptionText: When flying, you gain a +2 Cover bonus to your Evasion and Dodge against ranged attacks.

name: Maximum Dose
descriptionHtml: You maximize the damage they take from your Toxic.
descriptionText: You maximize the damage they take from your Toxic.
requirementHtml: Target takes damage from your Toxic
requirementText: Target takes damage from your Toxic

name: Measured Collapse
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack is always considered to have rolled a 2 for accuracy instead of rolling the d20.

Against creatures that are large size, gain a +2 bonus. If they are huge size, gain a +4 bonus.
descriptionText:

name: Memory of the Grove
descriptionHtml: After making a gathering check, you may choose to reroll the die. If you do, store the original die result. You may replace a future gathering die result (before bonus) with the stored value.
descriptionText: After making a gathering check, you may choose to reroll the die. If you do, store the original die result. You may replace a future gathering die result (before bonus) with the stored value.
requirementHtml: Usable after making a gathering a check.
requirementText: Usable after making a gathering a check.

name: Meteor Cleave
descriptionHtml:
You sidestep up to 10ft towards the target and make a melee Heavy attack against them. 

On damage, if your power is equal or higher than the target's, they are knocked Prone.
descriptionText:
You sidestep up to 10ft towards the target and make a melee Heavy attack against them.

On damage, if your power is equal or higher than the target's, they are knocked Prone.
requirementHtml: Two-Handed melee weapon only.
requirementText: Two-Handed melee weapon only.

name: Mighty Leap
descriptionHtml: You jump to a target within range and may make a Light attack against them. All enemies within 5ft of the target must make a save or become Unbalanced.
descriptionText: You jump to a target within range and may make a Light attack against them. All enemies within 5ft of the target must make a save or become Unbalanced.
requirementHtml: Two-Handed melee weapons only.
requirementText: Two-Handed melee weapons only.

name: Mind Connection
descriptionHtml:
You physically touch up to five willing people, granting them Mind Connection—creating a mind link through you.  While linked, each creature can speak through telepathy to all other creatures linked to the same caster.  Mind Connection has unlimited duration but also reduces your maximum mana by 1, this effect lasts until you cancel Mind Connection.  Mind Connection has a maximum range of 500 ft—breaking this range doesn’t cancel the spell but interrupts the signal until within range again.

While Mind Connection lasts, you may spend 1 AP to transfer view through the eyes of one of the people connected with the mind link.
descriptionText:
You physically touch up to five willing people, granting them Mind Connection—creating a mind link through you.  While linked, each creature can speak through telepathy to all other creatures linked to the same caster.  Mind Connection has unlimited duration but also reduces your maximum mana by 1, this effect lasts until you cancel Mind Connection.  Mind Connection has a maximum range of 500 ft—breaking this range doesn’t cancel the spell but interrupts the signal until within range again.

While Mind Connection lasts, you may spend 1 AP to transfer view through the eyes of one of the people connected with the mind link.

name: Mind's Eye
descriptionHtml: You may ask the GM for the rough best course of action during an encounter based on the information you have. The GM should answer truthfully, but does not need to go in depth. (For example: Retreat, kill the grunts, focus the boss, use magic attacks etc).
descriptionText: You may ask the GM for the rough best course of action during an encounter based on the information you have. The GM should answer truthfully, but does not need to go in depth. (For example: Retreat, kill the grunts, focus the boss, use magic attacks etc).

name: Mining Expertise
descriptionHtml: You may unlock the miner class for 0 EXP. You must still spend the IP on it.
descriptionText: You may unlock the miner class for 0 EXP. You must still spend the IP on it.

name: Miracle: Sanctuary
descriptionHtml: You create an immobile sphere of protection in a 5ft radius that prevents all entry into and out of it. The Shield has health points equal to 20 + Toughness x 8. Attacks and Magical Effects cannot be casted out of or into the Sanctuary, which functions as line-of-sight blocking for the purposes of abilities. Sanctuary lasts until the start of your next turn unless you pay Upkeep (1 Mana). The Spell also ends when the Shield’s health points are reduced to zero. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You create an immobile sphere of protection in a 5ft radius that prevents all entry into and out of it. The Shield has health points equal to 20 + Toughness x 8. Attacks and Magical Effects cannot be casted out of or into the Sanctuary, which functions as line-of-sight blocking for the purposes of abilities. Sanctuary lasts until the start of your next turn unless you pay Upkeep (1 Mana). The Spell also ends when the Shield’s health points are reduced to zero. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Misdirected Blow
descriptionHtml:
You may take the Dodge action. If the attack is successfully avoided, the attack is then made against an enemy within 5ft of you and using the same accuracy roll. This enemy must be different from the one making the attack. The new target may react to this attack as normal.

Does not work against Secret Art or Esoteric Art level attacks.
descriptionText:
You may take the Dodge action. If the attack is successfully avoided, the attack is then made against an enemy within 5ft of you and using the same accuracy roll. This enemy must be different from the one making the attack. The new target may react to this attack as normal.

Does not work against Secret Art or Esoteric Art level attacks.
requirementHtml: You are the target of an attack and have a different enemy within 5ft of you.
requirementText: You are the target of an attack and have a different enemy within 5ft of you.

name: Mist of the Vale
descriptionHtml:
A mist rolls out from around you, trapping those caught in it in a misty vale in which travelers are doomed to die. All in the mist must make a save against your Potency when they try to escape it. If they fail their save when they attempt to move out, you may finish the remaining movement for them as long as they end within your mist. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

The mist also blocks Line of Sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the mist can only see up to 5ft into or out of mist.

The mist is a 15ft radius around yourself, but if flying it does not go below you. You may choose to exclude allies from the trapping effect. If you do, the upkeep mana cost and initial mana cost is increased by 1.

Upkeep: 1 AP
descriptionText:
A mist rolls out from around you, trapping those caught in it in a misty vale in which travelers are doomed to die. All in the mist must make a save against your Potency when they try to escape it. If they fail their save when they attempt to move out, you may finish the remaining movement for them as long as they end within your mist. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

The mist also blocks Line of Sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the mist can only see up to 5ft into or out of mist.

The mist is a 15ft radius around yourself, but if flying it does not go below you. You may choose to exclude allies from the trapping effect. If you do, the upkeep mana cost and initial mana cost is increased by 1.

Upkeep: 1 AP
requirementHtml: Must be played on a flute.
requirementText: Must be played on a flute.

name: Molten Domain
descriptionHtml:
Until the start of your next turn, the ground 5ft around you becomes like burning ground.

Any enemy willingly leaving or moving through this area other than entering it becomes Burning X, where X is your Focus x 3.

The domain burns away other friendly damage aura effects while in effect. Effects that would normally trigger upon ending the turn in it (such as Poison Spore) don't trigger if someone ends their turn in the Molten Domain.
descriptionText:

The domain burns away other friendly damage aura effects while in effect. Effects that would normally trigger upon ending the turn in it (such as Poison Spore) don't trigger if someone ends their turn in the Molten Domain.

name: Momentum
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. For every 10ft moved during your last action this turn, this attack gains +1 damage up to a maximum of +10 damage. Abilities with the Teleport keyword do not apply for this.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. For every 10ft moved during your last action this turn, this attack gains +1 damage up to a maximum of +10 damage. Abilities with the Teleport keyword do not apply for this.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Mordschlag
descriptionHtml: You attack the target with the pommel or crossguard making a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You attack the target with the pommel or crossguard making a Heavy Attack against the target.
requirementHtml: Longsword, Heavy Blades and Bludgeoning weapons only.
requirementText: Longsword, Heavy Blades and Bludgeoning weapons only.

name: Mountain Slayer
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against a target.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against a target.
requirementHtml: Target can be affected by Shieldbreaker.
requirementText: Target can be affected by Shieldbreaker.

name: Mounted Casting
descriptionHtml: You may cast a Spell with an AP cost of 2 or less.
descriptionText: You may cast a Spell with an AP cost of 2 or less.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted and taking a movement action.
requirementText: Must be mounted and taking a movement action.

name: Move Piece
descriptionHtml:
You move a puppet piece you can see that's under your control. The way it moves depends on the type of piece. When a piece moves, it's a Sidestep.

Pawn: Moves up to 2 squares orthogonally or 1 square diagonally in a straight line.

Knight: Moves 1 square orthogonally, then 1 square diagonal in the same direction it moved in orthogonally (like a knight in chess). Can pass through allies and enemies.

Bishop: Moves up to 8 squares diagonally in a straight line. 

Rook: Moves up to 8 squares orthogonally in a straight line.

Queen: Moves up to 8 squares orthogonally or diagonally in a straight line.

Except for the Knight, chess pieces cannot move through allies and stop their movement when they hit an object or creature. If this happens, it makes a Heavy attack that deals Physical(Bludgeoning) damage against that target with your stats. A knight that makes an attack and does not kill the target remains in its original spot.

On damage, a piece is promoted into a higher rank (Pawn -> Bishop/Knight -> Rook -> Queen). A queen cannot promote.

On Killing Blow, a piece occupies the square of the thing it attacked.
descriptionText:

Bishop: Moves up to 8 squares diagonally in a straight line.

Rook: Moves up to 8 squares orthogonally in a straight line.

Queen: Moves up to 8 squares orthogonally or diagonally in a straight line.

Except for the Knight, chess pieces cannot move through allies and stop their movement when they hit an object or creature. If this happens, it makes a Heavy attack that deals Physical(Bludgeoning) damage against that target with your stats. A knight that makes an attack and does not kill the target remains in its original spot.

On damage, a piece is promoted into a higher rank (Pawn -> Bishop/Knight -> Rook -> Queen). A queen cannot promote.

On Killing Blow, a piece occupies the square of the thing it attacked.

name: Movement Burst
descriptionHtml:
You may move up to your Speed + up to 15ft per mana spent on this ability. Any unspent movement is lost afterwards.

If you spend more than 1 Mana on this ability, it loses the Stealth keyword.
descriptionText:
You may move up to your Speed + up to 15ft per mana spent on this ability. Any unspent movement is lost afterwards.

If you spend more than 1 Mana on this ability, it loses the Stealth keyword.

name: Mud Wall
descriptionHtml:
You create a wall 4ft high, 1ft thick and up to 20ft long that serves as low cover. Anybody attempting to get over the wall treats it as difficult terrain. Walls must be placed on solid ground and cannot be stacked on top of eachother.

Each 5ft of wall has 60 HP and dissolves if it reaches 0. It otherwise lasts until the end of the encounter.

You may spend 1 RP instead of 2 AP on this ability instead.
descriptionText:

Each 5ft of wall has 60 HP and dissolves if it reaches 0. It otherwise lasts until the end of the encounter.

You may spend 1 RP instead of 2 AP on this ability instead.

name: Mudra: First Sensation
descriptionHtml:
You deliver the first motion, a graceful strike that awakens awareness in both you and your foe and you make a Light attack against the target. On hit, you gain a Harmony stack (In addition to the one you might get if this deals damage.)

Combo: When used after entering Luminous Form Stance, the mana cost is reduced by 1.

requirementText: Must be in Luminous Form Stance

name: Multishot
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against two different targets. Overcharge: You may spend X extra mana to attack 2 + X targets instead.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against two different targets. Overcharge: You may spend X extra mana to attack 2 + X targets instead.

name: Mystic Eyes of Life Perception
descriptionHtml: You temporarily empower your eyes. While active, you gain 360 degree vision and automatically detect all enemies within a 30ft radius of you that are not behind at least 1ft of full cover. In addition, you can see the approximate HP and Mana percentage of all enemies in this range. This lasts for 5 minutes or until you turn it off.
descriptionText: You temporarily empower your eyes. While active, you gain 360 degree vision and automatically detect all enemies within a 30ft radius of you that are not behind at least 1ft of full cover. In addition, you can see the approximate HP and Mana percentage of all enemies in this range. This lasts for 5 minutes or until you turn it off.

name: Nature's Grasp
descriptionHtml:
You shoot out a vine that wraps around the target and make a Light Attack against the target that only deals 1 Earth damage. On damage, the target becomes Rooted until the start of your next turn or until they spend 2 AP to remove the root with a slashing or fire based attack.

Against Grunts, this attack costs 0 Mana and gains Sure Hit.
descriptionText:
You shoot out a vine that wraps around the target and make a Light Attack against the target that only deals 1 Earth damage. On damage, the target becomes Rooted until the start of your next turn or until they spend 2 AP to remove the root with a slashing or fire based attack.

Against Grunts, this attack costs 0 Mana and gains Sure Hit.

name: Never Miss The Beat
descriptionHtml:
You begin singing a supportive song.

Once per round per ally, when an ally fails to meet the base evasion with an attack, you may spend 2 Mana to add that ally’s focus bonus for that attack.

Upkeep: 1 AP
descriptionText:
You begin singing a supportive song.

Once per round per ally, when an ally fails to meet the base evasion with an attack, you may spend 2 Mana to add that ally’s focus bonus for that attack.

Upkeep: 1 AP

name: No getting past!
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light (0 RP) or Heavy (1 RP) attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Slowed until the end of their turn. If the target is already Slowed, they become Rooted.
descriptionText: You may make a Light (0 RP) or Heavy (1 RP) attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Slowed until the end of their turn. If the target is already Slowed, they become Rooted.

name: Obvious Intent
descriptionHtml: If an enemy is planning to move into a space in which it can melee attack you, you may move up to your speed away from them.
descriptionText: If an enemy is planning to move into a space in which it can melee attack you, you may move up to your speed away from them.
requirementHtml: Can only be used at the moment an enemy declares a movement.
requirementText: Can only be used at the moment an enemy declares a movement.

name: Offbeat Recovery
descriptionHtml:
You give your ally’s attack Lock On, but the damage is minimized (and cannot be maximized) and it loses Full Pierce, Block Crush and any on hit or on damage effects. If used after a target has already dodged, they may Block against that attack for free.

Can be used when an ally misses an ability to make it not count as a miss for your Secret Art: Full Combo (but the attack does not actually gain Lock On)
descriptionText:

Can be used when an ally misses an ability to make it not count as a miss for your Secret Art: Full Combo (but the attack does not actually gain Lock On)
requirementHtml: An ally within your Idol Song’s range misses a basic attack.
requirementText: An ally within your Idol Song’s range misses a basic attack.

name: Oil Slick
descriptionHtml: You throw a bottle of oil on the ground within range, creating a 15x15 area of slippery oil. If the target contacts the oil at any point of movement (even the start or end) and they moved more than 5ft in a single movement action, they immediately fall prone. The slick lasts until the start of your next turn.

If the target contacts the oil at any point of movement (even the start or end) and they moved more than 5ft in a single movement action, they immediately fall prone. The slick lasts until the start of your next turn.

name: One Beat, One Heart
descriptionHtml:
All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their accuracy. This bonus is doubled on Precise attacks.

Upkeep: 1 AP
descriptionText:
All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their accuracy. This bonus is doubled on Precise attacks.

Upkeep: 1 AP

name: Order: Retreat
descriptionHtml: You order one willing allied unit to retreat, moving up to their Speed. All movement must be made towards you, and does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You order one willing allied unit to retreat, moving up to their Speed. All movement must be made towards you, and does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Ougi: Taju Bunshin no Jutsu
descriptionHtml:
You create 3 illusionary copies of yourself within 10ft of yourself or your Bunshin clone. These copies can take actions similar to your Bunshin Tai no Jutsu, but each of them may also act with its own 2 AP from the start of your next turn.

Each clone has 1 HP and upon taking any damage, they vanish. You may use RP for these clones as normal.

Upkeep: 2 AP
descriptionText:
You create 3 illusionary copies of yourself within 10ft of yourself or your Bunshin clone. These copies can take actions similar to your Bunshin Tai no Jutsu, but each of them may also act with its own 2 AP from the start of your next turn.

Each clone has 1 HP and upon taking any damage, they vanish. You may use RP for these clones as normal.

Upkeep: 2 AP

name: Outbreak
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.

If the target is already suffering from Toxic, instead immediately trigger the damage effect from it.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.

If the target is already suffering from Toxic, instead immediately trigger the damage effect from it.
requirementHtml: Must be made with a melee weapon or with a Set of Missiles, Throwing Weapon or Thrown attack with small weapon only.
requirementText: Must be made with a melee weapon or with a Set of Missiles, Throwing Weapon or Thrown attack with small weapon only.

name: Overcharge and Discount
descriptionHtml:
While on adventure, you get a 5% discount from NPC vendors, stacking with Bulk Orders if applicable, and can sell items for 10% more.

You may use an IP to give this discount effect to yourself and up to 9 other characters for that Interlude phase, for a total of a 800c discount.
descriptionText:
While on adventure, you get a 5% discount from NPC vendors, stacking with Bulk Orders if applicable, and can sell items for 10% more.

You may use an IP to give this discount effect to yourself and up to 9 other characters for that Interlude phase, for a total of a 800c discount.

name: Overclock
descriptionHtml: You may add 1d10 crafting points to the item. The item starts in the Broken condition. Cannot be used for Alchemy crafting.
descriptionText: You may add 1d10 crafting points to the item. The item starts in the Broken condition. Cannot be used for Alchemy crafting.
requirementHtml: Must be in a crafting session.
requirementText: Must be in a crafting session.

name: Overpower
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. For every point of Power you have over the target, you deal 2 additional damage.

Combo: If used after Meteor Cleave, the AP cost is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. For every point of Power you have over the target, you deal 2 additional damage.

Combo: If used after Meteor Cleave, the AP cost is reduced by 1.
requirementHtml: Two-Handed weapons only.
requirementText: Two-Handed weapons only.

name: Overtime again?
descriptionHtml:
When you take the Heal Injury, Appraise or Mentor IP actions, you may do the same action again for an EP.

In addition, if you take the Rest interlude action you may give the benefit to a different character instead. This does not stack with any Rest bonuses they may have already.
descriptionText:

In addition, if you take the Rest interlude action you may give the benefit to a different character instead. This does not stack with any Rest bonuses they may have already.

name: Own Mount
descriptionHtml: You count as mounted for the purposes of abilities that require you to be mounted. This does not let you be a mount to other creatures.
descriptionText: You count as mounted for the purposes of abilities that require you to be mounted. This does not let you be a mount to other creatures.

name: Pack Tactics
descriptionHtml: Select a target within range. Until the end of your turn, while the target has one of your allies within 5ft of it, you gain Pack Tactics, which gives a +2 bonus on accuracy checks for melee attacks against that target.
descriptionText: Select a target within range. Until the end of your turn, while the target has one of your allies within 5ft of it, you gain Pack Tactics, which gives a +2 bonus on accuracy checks for melee attacks against that target.

name: Painkiller Injection
descriptionHtml:
You grant a willing ally temporary HP until the start of your next turn equal to your Focus x X. 

The target cannot benefit from this ability again until the end of your next turn.
descriptionText:
You grant a willing ally temporary HP until the start of your next turn equal to your Focus x X.

The target cannot benefit from this ability again until the end of your next turn.

name: Panda Roll
descriptionHtml: You prepare to roll from an incoming attack. Your next Dodge action before the start of your next turn costs 0 RP. If you successfully avoid an attack with this Dodge action, you may Sidestep 5ft.
descriptionText: You prepare to roll from an incoming attack. Your next Dodge action before the start of your next turn costs 0 RP. If you successfully avoid an attack with this Dodge action, you may Sidestep 5ft.

name: Panda Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter a stance in which you use your tail for extra balance. When you would be knocked back or prone, you may end this stance to negate the effect. This stance then ends.

Otherwise, the stance lasts until you enter a different stance.

You may use AP or RP for this ability.
descriptionText:
You enter a stance in which you use your tail for extra balance. When you would be knocked back or prone, you may end this stance to negate the effect. This stance then ends.

Otherwise, the stance lasts until you enter a different stance.

You may use AP or RP for this ability.

name: Paragon of Virtue
descriptionHtml: You may remove a single negative non-physical effect from yourself (ie, fears, charms but not things such as bleed). If you are afflicted with more than 1 negative effect that is a valid target, you may choose which one you remove.
descriptionText: You may remove a single negative non-physical effect from yourself (ie, fears, charms but not things such as bleed). If you are afflicted with more than 1 negative effect that is a valid target, you may choose which one you remove.

name: Parry
descriptionHtml:
Roll your Heavy Weapon Damage, but add your Focus instead of Power to the roll and treat that as your Block against the attack targeting you. If Parry reduces the damage to 0, you regain 1 RP (cannot go higher than your max RP). On hit effects and maces do not gain their effect if you reduce the damage to 0.

When using Parry against an attack, that attack cannot land a critical hit against you.
descriptionText:
Roll your Heavy Weapon Damage, but add your Focus instead of Power to the roll and treat that as your Block against the attack targeting you. If Parry reduces the damage to 0, you regain 1 RP (cannot go higher than your max RP). On hit effects and maces do not gain their effect if you reduce the damage to 0.

When using Parry against an attack, that attack cannot land a critical hit against you.
requirementHtml: Target of a melee attack, wielding a One-Handed melee weapon.
requirementText: Target of a melee attack, wielding a One-Handed melee weapon.

name: Past Self
descriptionHtml:
You place a past self token at your current position that lasts until the end of the encounter. Your past self tokens are used for other abilities and cannot be attacked normally.

When you make a weapon attack, you may have the attack come from a past self token. After a past self token attacks, it becomes targetable by attacks and effects for 1 round as if you were in that position though you cannot be hit more than once by the same attack because of this.

Your past selves cannot be moved, willingly or forcefully.
descriptionText:

When you make a weapon attack, you may have the attack come from a past self token. After a past self token attacks, it becomes targetable by attacks and effects for 1 round as if you were in that position though you cannot be hit more than once by the same attack because of this.

Your past selves cannot be moved, willingly or forcefully.

name: Pathfinder
descriptionHtml: You may move up to your speed and you ignore difficult terrain penalties for this movement. Until the start of your next turn, all terrain within 20ft of you is not considered difficult terrain for your allies.
descriptionText: You may move up to your speed and you ignore difficult terrain penalties for this movement. Until the start of your next turn, all terrain within 20ft of you is not considered difficult terrain for your allies.

name: Penetrating Shot
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack penetrates through thin layers of cover such as wood planks (GM’s decision), negating the bonus it would give.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack penetrates through thin layers of cover such as wood planks (GM’s decision), negating the bonus it would give.
requirementHtml: Sniper Rifles only.
requirementText: Sniper Rifles only.

name: Pepper Spray
descriptionHtml:
You reach into your pocket and pull out a handful of ground chili pepper that you throw in front of you in a 15ft cube. Inflicts all targets with Pepper Spray, causing Blinded 4 and the inability to smell.  The target or an ally of the target within 5ft can spend 1 AP to wipe it off. Otherwise the effect ends at the end of the target’s next turn.

You may spend 1 RP and 1 additional mana instead of paying the AP cost.
descriptionText:

Inflicts all targets with Pepper Spray, causing Blinded 4 and the inability to smell.  The target or an ally of the target within 5ft can spend 1 AP to wipe it off. Otherwise the effect ends at the end of the target’s next turn.

name: Perfect Seasoning
descriptionHtml: Make a crafting check with a +3 Bonus.
descriptionText: Make a crafting check with a +3 Bonus.
requirementHtml: Must be in a crafting session. Must have added a special ingredient (box of food, alloy materials) in your last action.
requirementText: Must be in a crafting session. Must have added a special ingredient (box of food, alloy materials) in your last action.

name: Perfect Shot
descriptionHtml:
You line up the perfect shot, striking an enemy for double Heavy Damage with Sure Hit and Full Pierce.

Automatically fails if the target has cover when this ability finishes.
descriptionText:
You line up the perfect shot, striking an enemy for double Heavy Damage with Sure Hit and Full Pierce.

Automatically fails if the target has cover when this ability finishes.

name: Perish
descriptionHtml: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Dark(Curse).
descriptionText: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Dark(Curse).

name: Persistent Spell
descriptionHtml: If the next Spell you cast applies a buff or debuff, the duration of this buff or debuff is extended by 1 turn. If the Spell allows for a save, the target may make another save after the original effect is over to resist the duration extension.
descriptionText: If the next Spell you cast applies a buff or debuff, the duration of this buff or debuff is extended by 1 turn. If the Spell allows for a save, the target may make another save after the original effect is over to resist the duration extension.

name: Phantoms of the Mist
descriptionHtml:
You conjure several phantoms in the mist and make a Light attack against all creatures within your Mist of the Vale.

You may spend 1 Mana to exclude allies from this attack.
descriptionText:
You conjure several phantoms in the mist and make a Light attack against all creatures within your Mist of the Vale.

You may spend 1 Mana to exclude allies from this attack.
requirementHtml: Mist of the Vale must be active.
requirementText: Mist of the Vale must be active.

name: Phoenix Tears
descriptionHtml: At the end of combat you may use 1 Encounter Conclusion action to heal a single target other than yourself for Power and prevent one injury on them.
descriptionText: At the end of combat you may use 1 Encounter Conclusion action to heal a single target other than yourself for Power and prevent one injury on them.

name: Pie Toss
descriptionHtml:
You deal 2 damage to the target. This damage can not be increased and does not trigger extra damage effects on the target.

Can be used while downed, Encounter Start and Encounter Conclusion.
descriptionText:
You deal 2 damage to the target. This damage can not be increased and does not trigger extra damage effects on the target.

Can be used while downed, Encounter Start and Encounter Conclusion.

name: Piercing Stab
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target and the target directly behind it.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target and the target directly behind it.
range: A target in melee weapon range and a target directly behind the first target in melee weapon range.
requirementHtml: Polearm only.
requirementText: Polearm only.

name: Pillar of Earth
descriptionHtml:
You create a 5x5, 20ft high pillar below someone. The target may spend 1 RP to step out of the way.

Each block of the pillar has HP equal to 20+Focus and the entire pillar collapses if one block is removed from it.
descriptionText:
You create a 5x5, 20ft high pillar below someone. The target may spend 1 RP to step out of the way.

Each block of the pillar has HP equal to 20+Focus and the entire pillar collapses if one block is removed from it.

name: Pinning Shot
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target with your weapon. On damage, if there is a wall or similar object directly behind the target, they become pinned against it. A pinned target is considered Rooted until they spend 2 AP to remove the arrow pinning them.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target with your weapon. On damage, if there is a wall or similar object directly behind the target, they become pinned against it. A pinned target is considered Rooted until they spend 2 AP to remove the arrow pinning them.
requirementHtml: Bow or Crossbow only.
requirementText: Bow or Crossbow only.

name: Pistol Whip
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light Attack with a pistol in your hand. On damage, the target becomes Unbalanced.

This attack benefits from alloys and material bonuses on your pistol (but not from any on your unarmed strike).
descriptionText:
You make a Light Attack with a pistol in your hand. On damage, the target becomes Unbalanced.

This attack benefits from alloys and material bonuses on your pistol (but not from any on your unarmed strike).
requirementHtml: Must be holding a pistol.
requirementText: Must be holding a pistol.

name: Place Trap
descriptionHtml:
You choose to spend either 1 minute or 1 hour to place an undetermined trap in an area. You may only have 2 traps placed at a time in this way.

When an enemy comes within 20ft of you, you may spend 0 RP to determine the effects of a trap and trigger it. If you spent 1 minute, you may choose a Simple Trap. If you spent 1 hour, you may choose either a Simple Trap or a Complex Trap.

Log Swing (Simple): The target takes Light bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 20ft.

Snare (Simple): You place up to 3 snare traps, each within 20ft of each other. When triggered, the target’s movement is interrupted and they fall prone.

Net (Complex): The target is caught in a net and raised up into the air. It remains rooted there until the net is destroyed by dealing 15 damage, after which the target falls prone on the ground below it.

Pitfall (Complex): The target falls down a 5x5, 20ft deep pit and takes falling damage as normal.

A used trap cannot be reused. Setting a trap consumes a Trapper's Trap.
descriptionText:

requirementHtml: Sufficient time (see description)
requirementText: Sufficient time (see description)

name: Plaguebringer
descriptionHtml: When you damage an enemy with a melee attack while infected with a disease or suffering from poison, you inflict that disease or poison on the enemy. They can make a save against it as normal, if the original disease or poison allowed for it.
descriptionText: When you damage an enemy with a melee attack while infected with a disease or suffering from poison, you inflict that disease or poison on the enemy. They can make a save against it as normal, if the original disease or poison allowed for it.

name: Please Hold Still~
descriptionHtml: You apply Illumination X to the target where X is your Focus. You cannot benefit from this Illumination yourself, but also cannot consume it.
descriptionText: You apply Illumination X to the target where X is your Focus. You cannot benefit from this Illumination yourself, but also cannot consume it.

name: Plow the fields
descriptionHtml: You strike the ground with magical power and make a Light attack against all enemies in a 15ft wide line up to range. The terrain within this range becomes difficult terrain until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You strike the ground with magical power and make a Light attack against all enemies in a 15ft wide line up to range. The terrain within this range becomes difficult terrain until the start of your next turn.

name: Plume-Treading Art
descriptionHtml:
After you use Cloudstep, you treat air as regular walkable terrain until the end of your turn. At the end of your turn, if still standing on air and not Flying, you float back down to the ground without taking fall damage.

In addition, after each AP spent on the Move action or an ability that lets you move, you gain 1 Windflow up to a maximum of 6. Each stack of Windflow gives a +5 Windflow bonus to your movement speed. These stacks last until the end of the encounter or until you end your turn without having moved.

Cloudstep also always gives you 1 stack, up to your normal cap.
descriptionText:
