Cloudstep also always gives you 1 stack, up to your normal cap.

name: Point Blank Shot
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.
requirementHtml: Pistol only.
requirementText: Pistol only.

name: Point of Death
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals maximum damage instead of rolling for the damage.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals maximum damage instead of rolling for the damage.
requirementHtml: Target is below half HP of their original max HP (Before True Death reductions).
requirementText: Target is below half HP of their original max HP (Before True Death reductions).

name: Point of Death II
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals maximum damage instead of rolling for the damage.

On killing blow, refund the mana and AP cost spent on this ability.
descriptionText:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals maximum damage instead of rolling for the damage.

On killing blow, refund the mana and AP cost spent on this ability.
requirementHtml: Target is below half HP of their original max HP (Before True Death reductions).

name: Poison Spore
descriptionHtml:
You may spend either 2 AP or 1 RP to use this ability.

You create an Area of Poison Spores around you or the Host of Spore Symbiote. Units who end their turn in the Poison Spore take Full Pierce Poison damage equal to your Power + 2. You and the host of Spore Symbiote are immune to your own Poison Spore. Poison Spore lasts until the end of the encounter but you can only have one instance of Poison Spore active at a time.

The spore stays centered around the original target, even if the target of this ability moves. If the original target of this ability was the symbiote target and you swap the symbiote target, the location of the poison spore moves with it.
descriptionText:
You may spend either 2 AP or 1 RP to use this ability.

You and the host of Spore Symbiote are immune to your own Poison Spore. Poison Spore lasts until the end of the encounter but you can only have one instance of Poison Spore active at a time.

range: Self or The Host of Poison Spore. 15ft x 15ft Area with the target at the center.

name: Poison Spray
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against all targets in a 60ft wide, 30ft long cone. On damage, you inflict the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against all targets in a 60ft wide, 30ft long cone. On damage, you inflict the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.

name: Position Rewind
descriptionHtml: You teleport to where you were at the start of your last turn. (Use a token to mark the position)
descriptionText: You teleport to where you were at the start of your last turn. (Use a token to mark the position)

name: Power Jump
descriptionHtml:
You jump up to 60ft vertically straight up into the air.  You can additionally move 5ft horizontally afterwards.  Unless flying, you automatically land straight down from your position at the end of your turn or for 0 AP, this falling movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity and you don’t take fall damage from it. If you land inside an occupied square, you are shunted 5ft into an empty square (your original one if possible).

You cannot make any non-teleport movement actions while in the air unless you’re flying, but can still take other actions (such as attacking) while airborne.
descriptionText:

If you land inside an occupied square, you are shunted 5ft into an empty square (your original one if possible).

You cannot make any non-teleport movement actions while in the air unless you’re flying, but can still take other actions (such as attacking) while airborne.

name: Power Rock Strike
descriptionHtml: Make a gathering check at only half of your gathering bonus (rounded down) add the rolled amount to both node and lucky points.
descriptionText: Make a gathering check at only half of your gathering bonus (rounded down) add the rolled amount to both node and lucky points.
requirementHtml: Must in a gathering session.
requirementText: Must in a gathering session.

name: Power Strike
descriptionHtml: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the enemy.
descriptionText: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the enemy.

name: Power Word: Barrier
descriptionHtml:
Up to 5 target allies within range (including yourself) gain temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to 10 + Power.

You may pay either the AP or RP cost for this ability, you don't need to pay both.
descriptionText:
Up to 5 target allies within range (including yourself) gain temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to 10 + Power.

You may pay either the AP or RP cost for this ability, you don't need to pay both.

name: Power Word: Guardian Shield
descriptionHtml:
The target gains temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to 11 + 2 x Power. While this temporary HP lasts, on damage effects do not trigger on them unless the damage dealt does damage to their actual HP.

If this source of temporary HP is overwritten by a stronger source, this effect is lost.
descriptionText:

If this source of temporary HP is overwritten by a stronger source, this effect is lost.

name: Power Word: Reinforce
descriptionHtml:
The target gains temporary HP equal to 2 x their current temporary HP. 

After the attack is done resolving, the target's temporary HP is set to the value it was before this ability was used unless the target's current temporary HP is lower than that.
descriptionText:
The target gains temporary HP equal to 2 x their current temporary HP.

requirementHtml: An ally is the target of an attack.
requirementText: An ally is the target of an attack.

name: Power Word: Shield
descriptionHtml: The target gains temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to 11 + (2 x Power).
descriptionText: The target gains temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to 11 + (2 x Power).

name: Precise Thrust
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.

This attack does not disable the dueling weapon ability.
descriptionText:
You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.

This attack does not disable the dueling weapon ability.

name: Predict
descriptionHtml: You may take the Dodge action and remove the Lock On effect from the triggering attack.
descriptionText: You may take the Dodge action and remove the Lock On effect from the triggering attack.
requirementHtml: You are the target of an attack.
requirementText: You are the target of an attack.

name: Prediction
descriptionHtml: You remove the keyword Sure Hit and Lock On from the triggering attack and the target gains a +2 Dodge Bonus for their next Dodge action.
descriptionText: You remove the keyword Sure Hit and Lock On from the triggering attack and the target gains a +2 Dodge Bonus for their next Dodge action.
requirementHtml: An ally is the target of an attack.
requirementText: An ally is the target of an attack.

name: Prehensile Tail
descriptionHtml: You may carry objects with your tail, allowing you to interact with objects as normal even when you have both hands full. The action you are performing must not require physical strength and you cannot wield weapons with your tail.
descriptionText: You may carry objects with your tail, allowing you to interact with objects as normal even when you have both hands full. The action you are performing must not require physical strength and you cannot wield weapons with your tail.

name: Prepared Talisman
descriptionHtml:
You may place a Talisman on a surface or on a target within range. This costs the same amount of AP and Mana as it would normally cost and placing it on an unwilling target requires an accuracy roll that the target may dodge as normal. A target may spend AP equal to the AP cost of the talisman (before reductions) to remove the talisman from themselves.

After placing it, until the end of the encounter or for the next 5 minutes, you may spend 0 RP to instantly trigger the effect of the talisman. You cannot trigger it anymore once a talisman has been removed or is in the process of being removed and a removed talisman loses its power entirely. A talisman placed on a creature gains Sure Hit against the creature it's on when triggered.

You can only have 1 talisman prepared in this way at the same time and Sealing Talisman cannot be prepared like this. A placed talisman cannot have an AP cost of greater than 4 (or 10 seconds for casting times).

name: Presence Concealment
descriptionHtml: By suppressing your mana output you conceal your presence, gaining Presence Concealment.  You cannot use any abilites that cost mana or any abilities with the aura keyword while in Presence Concealment.  You can end this effect for 0 RP but the inability to use abilities that cost mana or abilities with the aura keyword persists until the end of your next turn.
descriptionText: By suppressing your mana output you conceal your presence, gaining Presence Concealment.  You cannot use any abilites that cost mana or any abilities with the aura keyword while in Presence Concealment.  You can end this effect for 0 RP but the inability to use abilities that cost mana or abilities with the aura keyword persists until the end of your next turn.

name: Presence of Mind
descriptionHtml: You reduce the AP cost of your next Spell this turn by 2 AP.
descriptionText: You reduce the AP cost of your next Spell this turn by 2 AP.

name: Procurement
descriptionHtml:
By spending an IP, you start the procurement process.

Choose a target base item (no modifications) and an amount of that item. Determine the price of the total items and set it as the Procurement Target goal.

Every time you gain an IP, you gain 500 points towards the Procurement goal. You may also spend an IP to add another 500 points towards the goal.

When the procurement value is equal to the Procurement Target, you may immediately purchase the item. You must purchase immediately or you lose Procurement. You can cancel a Procurement at any time. The Procurement Target Limit is 1000 and for materials this is capped at materials with an ingot/block etc cost of ≤1000.

You can only have 1 Procurement active at the same time.

name: Prone Cover
descriptionHtml: You become Prone. While Prone from this ability, you gain the benefits of low cover against ranged attacks. In addition, all Ranged Weapon Attacks gain the Prone keyword.
descriptionText: You become Prone. While Prone from this ability, you gain the benefits of low cover against ranged attacks. In addition, all Ranged Weapon Attacks gain the Prone keyword.
requirementHtml: Cannot be used while Flying.
requirementText: Cannot be used while Flying.

name: Provide Milk
descriptionHtml: You may spend an EP to produce 400u worth of milk.
descriptionText: You may spend an EP to produce 400u worth of milk.

name: Provoke II
descriptionHtml: You Challenge the enemy until the end of the encounter. You may only have 1 target Challenged at the same time through this ability.
descriptionText: You Challenge the enemy until the end of the encounter. You may only have 1 target Challenged at the same time through this ability.

name: Psychometry
descriptionHtml: By touching the door to a room you gain information as to the physical layout of the room and objects within it as if you were able to see inside of the room.  By reading the Auras of all creatures within the room, you can also get a general idea of any creatures within, which you see as blobs of light—brighter for more powerful auras.  You can also use this effect on containers as well to get a general idea of the layout within containers like backpacks, and chests.  This ability can be used at unlimited range as long as a creature under the effect of Mind Connection touches the door or container.

By reading the Auras of all creatures within the room, you can also get a general idea of any creatures within, which you see as blobs of light—brighter for more powerful auras.  You can also use this effect on containers as well to get a general idea of the layout within containers like backpacks, and chests.  This ability can be used at unlimited range as long as a creature under the effect of Mind Connection touches the door or container.

name: Pull the weeds
descriptionHtml: You destroy one of your planted seeds to give yourself +5 crafting points for this session.
descriptionText: You destroy one of your planted seeds to give yourself +5 crafting points for this session.
requirementHtml: Must be in a crafting session. Only applies to a farming crafting session.
requirementText: Must be in a crafting session. Only applies to a farming crafting session.

name: Purification Circle
descriptionHtml: You remove all stacks of single debuff from all allies in a 20ft radius circle from target point.
descriptionText: You remove all stacks of single debuff from all allies in a 20ft radius circle from target point.

name: Purify
descriptionHtml: You cleanse a target, removing all stacks of a negative effect of your choice that you are able to identify.
descriptionText: You cleanse a target, removing all stacks of a negative effect of your choice that you are able to identify.

name: Purifying Shields
descriptionHtml: You remove all stacks of a debuff from every ally within range that has temporary HP.
descriptionText: You remove all stacks of a debuff from every ally within range that has temporary HP.

name: Quantum Bomb
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack against the target.
requirementHtml: Cannon only.
requirementText: Cannon only.

name: Quick Artifice Reload
descriptionHtml: You quickly reload one shell into an artifice in range using one of your shells.
descriptionText: You quickly reload one shell into an artifice in range using one of your shells.

name: Quick Assist
descriptionHtml:
You teleport next to your soulmate and force the triggering attack to resolve against you, gaining the benefit of the Block action against it.

Afterwards, if your Soulmate is in range of the attacker, they may make an Attack of Opportunity against it.

If you were already next to your Soulmate before you used this ability, the mana cost is reduced by 1.

Afterwards, if your Soulmate is in range of the attacker, they may make an Attack of Opportunity against it.

If you were already next to your Soulmate before you used this ability, the mana cost is reduced by 1.
requirementHtml: Your soulmate is the target of an attack and is within the range of this ability.
requirementText: Your soulmate is the target of an attack and is within the range of this ability.

name: Quick Getaway
descriptionHtml: You may move as if you had spent 2 AP on the movement action. Combo: If used after Feint or the Disengage action, the AP cost of this is reduced by 2.
descriptionText: You may move as if you had spent 2 AP on the movement action. Combo: If used after Feint or the Disengage action, the AP cost of this is reduced by 2.

name: Quick Revive
descriptionHtml: You immediately resummon the summon from your Summon Animal that was killed in this current encounter. If multiple of your summons have died, you summon the one that died most recently.
descriptionText: You immediately resummon the summon from your Summon Animal that was killed in this current encounter. If multiple of your summons have died, you summon the one that died most recently.

name: Quickdraw
descriptionHtml: You may draw a pistol and make a Light Attack with the drawn pistol against the target. The target may not react to this shot.
descriptionText: You may draw a pistol and make a Light Attack with the drawn pistol against the target. The target may not react to this shot.

requirementText: Pistol only.

name: Quickdraw Alchemy
descriptionHtml: You draw an Alchemy item from your combat inventory.
descriptionText: You draw an Alchemy item from your combat inventory.

name: Radiant Halo
descriptionHtml:
You Heal all allied targets in a 15ft radius from the target point for 11 + (2 x Power).

You may use 1 RP instead of 2 AP for this ability. When using RP on this ability, you may use it even when it is not your turn.

name: Radiant Verdict
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On hit, inflict Sanctify 1
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On hit, inflict Sanctify 1

name: Rage Stance
descriptionHtml: You enter a Stance in which you prioritize offense over defense. The Stance lasts until the encounter ends, you get Downed or up to an hour. While the Stance lasts, gain 2 additional AP that can only be used on melee attacks each turn (including the turn you use this), but cannot use actions that use RP other than attack of opportunity unless they have the Rage keyword. You also cannot use abilities with the Spell keyword, unless they also have the Rage keyword. You are treated as having 0 RP for abilities with that as a requirement. While in your Rage Stance, you gain a +1 bonus to Guard and a +5 bonus to all Fitness checks.
descriptionText: You enter a Stance in which you prioritize offense over defense. The Stance lasts until the encounter ends, you get Downed or up to an hour. While in your Rage Stance, you gain a +1 bonus to Guard and a +5 bonus to all Fitness checks.

name: Raise Undead
descriptionHtml:
You raise the target corpse as a basic undead, such as a zombie. This zombie is treated as a non-heroic unit that you can command directly. You can have multiple zombies under your command, up to your Necromancer level + 1. However, the zombies act as a group under the same token rather than having an individual token. The group acts on your Initiative.

Each zombie has a single point of HP and immediately dies, but you only lose 1 zombie per attack the group takes, including AoE attacks that do not deal Holy Damage. AoE attacks that deal Holy damage remove a number of zombies equal to the damage taken. The zombie group has a focus and power of 3 + 1 for every 3 zombies, rounded down. They have an Agility of 2 and Toughness equal to 4. They have access to all basic actions, but otherwise have no special abilities. As a non-heroic entity, they only have access to a single RP. Because they are undead, they are immune to all mind-affecting effects.

A raised undead lasts until the end of the arc or until killed, after which the corpse cannot be raised again in any way.

name: Rapid Correction
descriptionHtml: You turn your Light attack into a Precise attack.

name: Rappelling Dagger
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you may move to the closest available spot within 5ft of the target. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Can be used against non-living objects and the on damage part always applies when used in that way.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you may move to the closest available spot within 5ft of the target. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. name: Receive Oracle
descriptionHtml: You seek divine knowledge on a topic and can ask up to three yes or no questions. You then receive a vision on the answers from an unknown entity. The GM chooses the information you receive. You regain the use of Receive Oracle after a rest.
descriptionText: You seek divine knowledge on a topic and can ask up to three yes or no questions. You then receive a vision on the answers from an unknown entity. The GM chooses the information you receive. You regain the use of Receive Oracle after a rest.

name: Redistribute
descriptionHtml:
You may transfer temporary HP from a single willing ally within range to any number of other allies within range. The total amount of temporary HP must be the same after the transfer.

May only redistribute temporary HP you applied through the use of a Shieldwarden or Veilguard ability. Does not affect temporary HP added through Reinforce.

name: Refreshing Stream
descriptionHtml: You cast this ability on water within range, recovering fatigue and granting a target within 15ft of that point 1 RP.  The target cannot go over their max RP from this.

descriptionHtml: You use nature's power to place Regrowth on an ally that lasts until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You use nature's power to place Regrowth on an ally that lasts until the start of your next turn.

name: Reinforce Armor
descriptionHtml:
Until the start of your next turn, the guard and block value gained from an armor and shield you crafted and are wearing is doubled.

Does not affect armor plates.

name: Rescue
descriptionHtml: You Teleport a willing ally within range to an empty square next to you. If the target is mounted, you may also teleport their mount together with the target.
descriptionText: You Teleport a willing ally within range to an empty square next to you. If the target is mounted, you may also teleport their mount together with the target.

name: Rescue & Drop
descriptionHtml:
You pick up a willing ally and put them on your mount. They travel with you on the back of your mount until either you or they spend 0 AP or 1 RP to place them back on the ground. An ally that is being rescued can not take any other actions until they are dropped.

Only 1 ally can be rescued at a time.

name: Resist Poison
descriptionHtml: You gain Resist Poison, which gives you Damage Reduction 100 against the triggering damage. You also resist the application of the poison, negating its effect.

name: Revealing Light
descriptionHtml: You clap your hands and send out a pulse of solar light in a 40ft radius around you. All creatures within that range are immediately revealed, canceling any stealth, invisibility or similar technique to hide themselves. They glow brightly until the start of your next turn, giving them a -20 penalty to stealth checks.

descriptionHtml: You may make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) Attack against the target. The target does not benefit from Light Cover against this attack.

name: Rider & Mount As One
descriptionHtml: While you are mounted and not flying you and your mount are considered the same entity for the purposes of what can target you. This means that while you are mounted, your mount cannot be targeted by anything (including allied effects) unless the effect specifically says it does. Any debuff or buff on you also affects your mount's movement and speed as if it was placed on the mount.

name: Sable Grace
descriptionHtml: You take the Dodge action against the triggering attack. You remove Lock-On from this attack and treat your Dodge as 99 against it.

name: Sanctity Aura
descriptionHtml:
You project an aura 30ft around you that blesses your allies.

When an ally makes an attack as part of one of your Gun Paladin abilities, they may choose to make the damage type of that attack the same as your Holy Weapon damage type.

name: Sapping Ward
descriptionHtml: A ward that can be placed on a normal-sized room or can be combined to ward off a house or larger area. Each ward can cover a 20ft radius and for each Sapping Ward placed in the same area as another Sapping Ward, this radius increases by 20ft (For example, 60ft with 3 Sapping Wards) If someone other than you enters the area, they must make a save against your Potency or become Weakened. Non-heroic units that enter the area must make a save or become Stunned instead. These conditions last while they remain inside the field and for an additional 2 rounds after exiting it. Casting this takes 10 minutes of uninterrupted casting. Once triggered, the field remains active for 5 more minutes before vanishing. You may at the time of casting choose a number of people equal to your Focus that can enter the area without triggering the ward. If not triggered, Sapping Ward lasts until you remove it. While it remains, your maximum mana is reduced by 2 for each instance of Sapping Ward you have active. This is considered a tier 2 ward.

name: Saprophytic Bolt
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target, dealing Earth damage. On damage, the current host of Spore Symbiote is Healed for your Power + 3.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target, dealing Earth damage. On damage, the current host of Spore Symbiote is Healed for your Power + 3.

name: Scarecrow's Gaze
descriptionHtml: You summon the appearance of whatever someone fears the most. Every enemy within range must make a Save against your potency. On failure, they may not walk closer to you until the start of your next turn unless they have no valid targets to attack without doing so.
descriptionText: You summon the appearance of whatever someone fears the most. Every enemy within range must make a Save against your potency. On failure, they may not walk closer to you until the start of your next turn unless they have no valid targets to attack without doing so.

name: Scent
descriptionHtml: You gain a +5 Expertise bonus to Perception (Smell).
descriptionText: You gain a +5 Expertise bonus to Perception (Smell).

name: Scent of Blood
descriptionHtml: You sniff the air and become aware of all targets within range that have below half of their maximum HP. This does not reveal their HP percentage.
descriptionText: You sniff the air and become aware of all targets within range that have below half of their maximum HP. This does not reveal their HP percentage.

name: Schadenfreude
descriptionHtml: You redirect an attack to another ally in range of the triggering attack. If they don't react to this, your next Malevolent  Phantasm ignores the requirement and costs no mana.
descriptionText: You redirect an attack to another ally in range of the triggering attack. If they don't react to this, your next Malevolent  Phantasm ignores the requirement and costs no mana.

name: Scorching Reprisal
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack of opportunity against the target. Your next basic attack of opportunity against that target before the start of your next turn costs 0 RP.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack of opportunity against the target. Your next basic attack of opportunity against that target before the start of your next turn costs 0 RP.
requirementHtml: An enemy provokes an attack of opportunity.
requirementText: An enemy provokes an attack of opportunity.

name: Scout's Retreat
descriptionHtml: You disengage and may move up to two times your speed away from enemies towards the closest escape point.
descriptionText: You disengage and may move up to two times your speed away from enemies towards the closest escape point.
requirementHtml: No known allies within 300ft of you
requirementText: No known allies within 300ft of you

name: Scouting Ahead
descriptionHtml: When traveling stealthily across the map, you can choose to move slightly ahead of the party when moving. If you do, you treat your roll as the lowest roll of the party.
descriptionText: When traveling stealthily across the map, you can choose to move slightly ahead of the party when moving. If you do, you treat your roll as the lowest roll of the party.

name: Scurry Away
descriptionHtml: After using the Disengage or Feint action, your movement speed increases by 10ft until the end of your turn.
descriptionText: After using the Disengage or Feint action, your movement speed increases by 10ft until the end of your turn.

name: Seal Cloak
descriptionHtml: You manifest and don a seal cloak that has been with you since you were born, transforming you into your Seal Form.  While in seal form you gain a swim speed of 80 feet but you can only take basic actions while in Seal Form and you are proficient in melee attacking without weapons in seal form.  While in Seal Form, you can hold your breath underwater for up to 2 hours and your land speed is reduced to 5.  You can remove the cloak for 0 AP.
descriptionText: You manifest and don a seal cloak that has been with you since you were born, transforming you into your Seal Form.  While in seal form you gain a swim speed of 80 feet but you can only take basic actions while in Seal Form and you are proficient in melee attacking without weapons in seal form.  While in Seal Form, you can hold your breath underwater for up to 2 hours and your land speed is reduced to 5.  You can remove the cloak for 0 AP.

name: Sealing Talisman
descriptionHtml: You attach a Sealing Talisman to the target. Non-heroics become Stunned immediately, while heroic targets must spend 2 AP to remove it from themselves. If they do not remove it by the end of their turn, they become Stunned. While the talisman remains attached, the target is stunned. Anyone within touching distance of the talisman may spend 2 AP to remove the talisman, immediately removing the stun effect. If the talisman is not removed, it lasts until the end of encounter or until the target takes damage. A person can only be affected by 1 Sealing Talisman at a time.
descriptionText: You attach a Sealing Talisman to the target. Non-heroics become Stunned immediately, while heroic targets must spend 2 AP to remove it from themselves. If they do not remove it by the end of their turn, they become Stunned. While the talisman remains attached, the target is stunned. Anyone within touching distance of the talisman may spend 2 AP to remove the talisman, immediately removing the stun effect. If the talisman is not removed, it lasts until the end of encounter or until the target takes damage. A person can only be affected by 1 Sealing Talisman at a time.
requirementHtml: The target has 0 RP. Must have a Sealing Talisman in hand.

name: Second Tremor
descriptionHtml: The enemy falls prone and takes Light damage.
descriptionText: The enemy falls prone and takes Light damage.
requirementHtml: An enemy stands up from prone or takes falling damage without falling prone.
requirementText: An enemy stands up from prone or takes falling damage without falling prone.

name: Secret Art ~ Faerie Light Eyes: Jade Shelterbelt
descriptionHtml:
Creates 5 Illusionary Heavy Spin Fluttering Blades within 20ft from you that last until the end of the encounter. 

They are dispelled when Fluttering Blade is cancelled on them.

These do not count towards your Fluttering Blade limit.
descriptionText:

name: Secret Art:  Revitalize
descriptionHtml:
You pray for a Downed ally. The ally’s HP becomes 0 and then heals for your Power x 3. They may stand up from prone after this healing.

Overcharge: You may pay X extra mana to make the target heal + 7 HP for every additional point of mana spent. 

This ability does not work on Mortally Wounded allies.

name: Secret Art: 7 Points of Death
descriptionHtml: You make a number of Precise Attacks up to the amount of Marks of Death on the target. Each attack deals damage equal to your Focus + Power instead of rolling for damage.
descriptionText: You make a number of Precise Attacks up to the amount of Marks of Death on the target. Each attack deals damage equal to your Focus + Power instead of rolling for damage.

descriptionText: You make an attack against the target that deals Double Heavy Physical(Crushing) damage.

descriptionHtml: Change the damage type of the target attack into any damage type except True.
descriptionText: Change the damage type of the target attack into any damage type except True.

name: Secret Art: Ambush Shot
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack that does maximum damage instead of rolling. This attack does not break your stealth.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack that does maximum damage instead of rolling. This attack does not break your stealth.
requirementHtml: Enemy must be unaware of your presence. Can only be used on the first turn of an encounter and must be your first attack.
requirementText: Enemy must be unaware of your presence. Can only be used on the first turn of an encounter and must be your first attack.

name: Secret Art: Anima Synthesis Form
descriptionHtml:
You consume a gene and transform, granting yourself all abilities of the chimera subrace of that corresponding gene. 

This lasts until the end of the encounter. 

In addition, learning this skill grants you +1 to your gene inventory for the Biohacking skill. Despite being transformed, you can still use Gene Activation to add additional abilities.

You cannot obtain and use abilities that require an IP or EP to use through this ability.

descriptionText: Your next Airship shot gains Sure Hit and Full Pierce.

requirementText: You have 100 or more strafe and just lost 100ft of altitude. Must be on an aerial staff in Aerial mode.

name: Secret Art: Assassinate
descriptionHtml:
You attack the target for Heavy Damage. 

If you surprised the enemy, are currently stealthed and have not been spotted by an enemy this entire encounter, this attack deals double heavy damage. You may move next to an enemy and still qualify as being stealthed and not spotted, provided you use this ability immediately after that movement ends.

You may move next to an enemy and still qualify as being stealthed and not spotted, provided you use this ability immediately after that movement ends.
requirementHtml: Target must be marked by Death Mark. One-handed weapons only.
requirementText: Target must be marked by Death Mark. One-handed weapons only.

name: Secret Art: Beaver Timber Fang
descriptionHtml: Make a normal heavy attack against the target. Afterwards make a light attack against the target with Sure Hit that immediately renders the target prone, even if the damage is reduced to 0.
descriptionText: Make a normal heavy attack against the target. Afterwards make a light attack against the target with Sure Hit that immediately renders the target prone, even if the damage is reduced to 0.

name: Secret Art: Bestial Wrath
descriptionHtml: Your summon gains Bestial Wrath and AP equal to its maximum AP they may immediately use. Bestial Wrath gives +2 Focus and +2 Power and prevents the summon from dropping below 1 HP. This effect lasts for 3 rounds or until the summon is reduced to 1 HP.
descriptionText: Your summon gains Bestial Wrath and AP equal to its maximum AP they may immediately use. Bestial Wrath gives +2 Focus and +2 Power and prevents the summon from dropping below 1 HP. This effect lasts for 3 rounds or until the summon is reduced to 1 HP.
requirementHtml: Can only target your summoned animal.
requirementText: Can only target your summoned animal.

name: Secret Art: Black Hole
descriptionHtml:
You create a Black Hole at a target location within range. When you cast this and when you pay upkeep, all enemies within 120ft of the black hole must make a save or get pulled 20ft towards it.

All enemies within 120ft of the black hole that are moving away from it are considered slowed for that movement.

Upkeep: 1 Mana. Instead of paying upkeep, you may detonate the Black Hole making a Heavy attack against all enemies within 15ft of the black hole.
descriptionText:
You create a Black Hole at a target location within range. When you cast this and when you pay upkeep, all enemies within 120ft of the black hole must make a save or get pulled 20ft towards it.

All enemies within 120ft of the black hole that are moving away from it are considered slowed for that movement.

Upkeep: 1 Mana. Instead of paying upkeep, you may detonate the Black Hole making a Heavy attack against all enemies within 15ft of the black hole.

name: Secret Art: Bladestorm
descriptionHtml:
You enter a stance in which you continuously spin your weapon around your body. When activating this ability, you may make a Heavy attack against all enemies within your melee weapon range. While the stance lasts you may make a Heavy attack against all enemies within your melee weapon range at the start of your turn.

You can move while in this stance. If you move close enough to an enemy for them to be within your melee weapon range, you may make a Heavy attack against them.

You can only attack a creature once per round through this ability, regardless of how many times you move closer to them.

Upkeep: 2 Mana, 1 AP
descriptionText:
You enter a stance in which you continuously spin your weapon around your body. When activating this ability, you may make a Heavy attack against all enemies within your melee weapon range. While the stance lasts you may make a Heavy attack against all enemies within your melee weapon range at the start of your turn.

You can move while in this stance. If you move close enough to an enemy for them to be within your melee weapon range, you may make a Heavy attack against them.

You can only attack a creature once per round through this ability, regardless of how many times you move closer to them.

Upkeep: 2 Mana, 1 AP
requirementHtml: Two-handed weapons only. Slashing weapons only.
requirementText: Two-handed weapons only. Slashing weapons only.

name: Secret Art: Bloody Ritual
descriptionHtml:
You create a blood tether to all enemies within range, causing them to be Slowed. The tether lasts until the start of your next turn or until they move out of the range of this ability.

At the start of your next turn, the tethers explode, dealing Heavy damage to all tethered enemies as it sucks the life energy from them. For every enemy dealt damage with this ability, you recover 1 Mana or 5 HP (your choice). If an enemy dies while under the effect of the tether but before it explodes, you also gain this regeneration effect.
descriptionText:
You create a blood tether to all enemies within range, causing them to be Slowed. The tether lasts until the start of your next turn or until they move out of the range of this ability.

At the start of your next turn, the tethers explode, dealing Heavy damage to all tethered enemies as it sucks the life energy from them. For every enemy dealt damage with this ability, you recover 1 Mana or 5 HP (your choice). If an enemy dies while under the effect of the tether but before it explodes, you also gain this regeneration effect.

name: Secret Art: Chase the Horizon
descriptionHtml:
You focus on a single enemy and maintain a constant position from them. Whenever the target moves, you may move the same amount as they did (up to your movement speed) away from them for 0 RP. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target, but does provoke from other enemies.

 Every time this happens, you may make a Light attack against the target with a ranged weapon. If the target spends multiple AP on a single movement action, you may make an amount of Light attacks equal to the AP they spent.

Lasts until the start of your next turn or until you can no longer see the target.
descriptionText:
You focus on a single enemy and maintain a constant position from them. Whenever the target moves, you may move the same amount as they did (up to your movement speed) away from them for 0 RP. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target, but does provoke from other enemies.

 Every time this happens, you may make a Light attack against the target with a ranged weapon. If the target spends multiple AP on a single movement action, you may make an amount of Light attacks equal to the AP they spent.

Lasts until the start of your next turn or until you can no longer see the target.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Secret Art: Checkmate
descriptionHtml: You may move all your pieces as if you used Move Piece on them.
descriptionText: You may move all your pieces as if you used Move Piece on them.

name: Secret Art: Divine Judgement
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy attack that deals Holy damage against the target. If your target’s HP is lower than the max damage your attack would deal, this attack gains Full Pierce and does maximum damage instead of rolling.

This calculation only involves your base damage (Base weapon damage + the power). Any other effects added to the damage such as Heavy Blade's bonus damage, Anathema on target etc do not affect the calculation and aren't maximized.

An enemy reduced to 0 HP or lower with this ability is immediately killed.
descriptionText:

requirementHtml: Target has your Mark of Justice on them.
requirementText: Target has your Mark of Justice on them.

name: Secret Art: Divine Shield
descriptionHtml:
Until the start of your next turn, you gain Damage Reduction 1000 against all damage types, but you only deal half damage.

You gain 2 AP.

Must be used as the first action in your turn.
descriptionText:
Until the start of your next turn, you gain Damage Reduction 1000 against all damage types, but you only deal half damage.

name: Secret Art: Double Accel
descriptionHtml: You gain 4 AP. Your AP recovery is lowered by 3 until the end of your next turn.
descriptionText: You gain 4 AP. Your AP recovery is lowered by 3 until the end of your next turn.

name: Secret Art: Dragonslaying Jump
descriptionHtml: You Jump up to the target, not provoking any attacks of opportunity, and make a Heavy Attack against it. On damage, the target plummets to the ground taking falling damage as normal. Overcharge: You may spend additional AP on this ability to increase the range by 60ft for every extra AP spent. If this increases the AP cost to more than what you currently have, it gains the Setup keyword.

name: Secret Art: Dynamic Duo
descriptionHtml: You challenge all enemies in range until the start of your next turn. Any time you would be allowed to make an Attack of Opportunity, your Soulmate may make it instead. They may Sidestep up to their speed before making each Attack of Opportunity.
descriptionText: You challenge all enemies in range until the start of your next turn. Any time you would be allowed to make an Attack of Opportunity, your Soulmate may make it instead. They may Sidestep up to their speed before making each Attack of Opportunity.

name: Secret Art: Earthquake
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against all enemies in range that are touching the ground. On damage, they fall prone.

You also make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against all magically created walls and similar inanimate objects created by magic. You deal 10x damage against those targets.
descriptionText:

You also make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against all magically created walls and similar inanimate objects created by magic. You deal 10x damage against those targets.

name: Secret Art: Efficient Spirit Control
descriptionHtml:
You reduce the cost of your next non-healing keyword action by 2 mana. This cannot reduce the mana cost below 0.

Also resets your Circuits, allowing abilities with the Circuit keyword to be used for their reduced mana cost once more.
descriptionText:

name: Secret Art: Endless Waltz
descriptionHtml:
You make two Light Attacks against the same target. On damage of this attack, you may repeat this attack for 0 AP.

Killing Blow: You may move up to twice your speed without provoking attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText:
You make two Light Attacks against the same target. On damage of this attack, you may repeat this attack for 0 AP.

Killing Blow: You may move up to twice your speed without provoking attacks of opportunity.

name: Secret Art: Entropic Magic Pulse
descriptionHtml:
You send out a wave of energy that disrupts spirit circuits that cancels all temporary magic effects in range. All non-permanent effects within range that are created by an ability with the Spell or Enchantment keyword are affected. Spells that do not have a time limit listed or create a permanent effect such as a Geomancer's fissure are not affected.

Bounded Fields and Secret Arts cannot be removed by this ability.

In addition, artifices cannot be used by anyone except you until the end of your next turn.

name: Secret Art: Everything, Everywhere, All At Once
descriptionHtml:
You make a Heavy Attack against the enemy. 

You may then repeat this attack from each of your past selves and may target the same enemy multiple times.
descriptionText:
You make a Heavy Attack against the enemy.

You may then repeat this attack from each of your past selves and may target the same enemy multiple times.

name: Secret Art: Fan the hammer
descriptionHtml:
You may make 4 Heavy Attacks against the target. Afterwards, the weapon used for this ability cannot be used again until the end of the encounter.

If an enemy reacts to this ability with a Dodge or Block type reaction, that reaction is valid for all 4 attacks.
descriptionText:
You may make 4 Heavy Attacks against the target. Afterwards, the weapon used for this ability cannot be used again until the end of the encounter.

If an enemy reacts to this ability with a Dodge or Block type reaction, that reaction is valid for all 4 attacks.

name: Secret Art: Forbid
descriptionHtml:
You choose a target and pick between basic actions or abilities. 

Until the start of your next turn, any time the target does the chosen action, they take Full Pierce damage equal to your Focus per AP spent on it.
descriptionText:
You choose a target and pick between basic actions or abilities.

name: Secret Art: Full Combo
descriptionHtml:
Your allies gain +4 Song bonus to their damage rolls. This is doubled on Heavy attacks.

If an ally misses an attack, this bonus is reduced to +1.

Upkeep: 1 AP
descriptionText:
Your allies gain +4 Song bonus to their damage rolls. This is doubled on Heavy attacks.

If an ally misses an attack, this bonus is reduced to +1.

Upkeep: 1 AP

name: Secret Art: Gae Bolg
descriptionHtml:
Make a Heavy attack against the target. Unless your accuracy roll is a 1, your roll is treated as if you rolled a 20 and it gains Sure Hit. 

It is treated as a critical hit even though it's Sure Hit, unless the target blocks.
descriptionText:

requirementHtml: Polearm only.
requirementText: Polearm only.

name: Secret Art: Galaxy Stop
descriptionHtml: You create a space-time anomaly that freezes time itself in a local area for a short while, affecting all but the strong-willed.  All non-heroic units in range cannot take any actions until the end of their next turn.
descriptionText: You create a space-time anomaly that freezes time itself in a local area for a short while, affecting all but the strong-willed.  All non-heroic units in range cannot take any actions until the end of their next turn.

name: Secret Art: Gate of Fate
requirementHtml: An ally rolls a 1.
requirementText: An ally rolls a 1.

name: Secret Art: Guiding Shot
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Heavy attack against the target. The target may spend 1 RP to avoid the attack. If they do, you may Sidestep them up to 20ft in a direction of your choice and then trigger a Place Trap effect, provided you have at least one set up.

This trap effect does not count towards your per encounter limitation. You may not Sidestep an enemy into a hazard (such as off a cliff or into fire) apart from your trap, unless the target has nowhere else to go.

Alternatively, you may choose to move an enemy into a Bear Trap you set up within the 20ft movement instead of a Place Trap effect. You can only choose one of these two options, not both.
descriptionText:
You may make a Heavy attack against the target. The target may spend 1 RP to avoid the attack. If they do, you may Sidestep them up to 20ft in a direction of your choice and then trigger a Place Trap effect, provided you have at least one set up.

This trap effect does not count towards your per encounter limitation. You may not Sidestep an enemy into a hazard (such as off a cliff or into fire) apart from your trap, unless the target has nowhere else to go.

Alternatively, you may choose to move an enemy into a Bear Trap you set up within the 20ft movement instead of a Place Trap effect. You can only choose one of these two options, not both.

name: Secret Art: Jade Skin
descriptionHtml: You take the Block action against the triggering attack. If you reduce the damage to 0, the attacker becomes Disarmed until the start of their next turn.
descriptionText: You take the Block action against the triggering attack. If you reduce the damage to 0, the attacker becomes Disarmed until the start of their next turn.
requirementHtml: You are attacked by a Melee attack.
requirementText: You are attacked by a Melee attack.

name: Secret Art: Life Bet
descriptionHtml:
You reduce your HP to 1 and make a Heavy attack against the target. You gain a bonus to the damage roll of this attack equal to the amount of HP you lost through this ability.

If this attack fails to meet the base evasion of the target, the HP you lost is refunded. It still counts as your one secret art use of the fight regardless.
descriptionText:
You reduce your HP to 1 and make a Heavy attack against the target. You gain a bonus to the damage roll of this attack equal to the amount of HP you lost through this ability.

If this attack fails to meet the base evasion of the target, the HP you lost is refunded. It still counts as your one secret art use of the fight regardless.

name: Secret Art: Life Sacrifice
descriptionHtml:
You lose HP until your HP reaches 1. Target ally within range recovers that much HP. Any HP that exceeds the target’s max HP becomes temporary HP.

This HP loss cannot be mitigated in any way and ignores temporary HP. This does not trigger effects that would trigger upon taking damage.
descriptionText:

This HP loss cannot be mitigated in any way and ignores temporary HP. This does not trigger effects that would trigger upon taking damage.

name: Secret Art: Lifesaver
descriptionHtml: The target gains temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to their missing HP.
descriptionText: The target gains temporary HP until the end of the encounter equal to their missing HP.

name: Secret Art: Lightning Field
descriptionHtml:
You conjure a statically charged field around you, applying Static X where X equals your Focus x 3 to all enemies within 30ft of you. Enemies already afflicted by Static immediately take damage equal to 3 + half the static value. While within your Lightning Field, the Static on enemies is not removed at the end of their turn.

This field lasts until the end of your next turn.

Upkeep: You may pay 1 Mana at the start of your turn to repeat the initial effect and extend the duration of the field by 1 turn.
descriptionText:
You conjure a statically charged field around you, applying Static X where X equals your Focus x 3 to all enemies within 30ft of you. Enemies already afflicted by Static immediately take damage equal to 3 + half the static value. While within your Lightning Field, the Static on enemies is not removed at the end of their turn.

This field lasts until the end of your next turn.

Upkeep: You may pay 1 Mana at the start of your turn to repeat the initial effect and extend the duration of the field by 1 turn.

name: Secret Art: Lightning Release
descriptionHtml:
You infuse yourself with Lightning and gain Lightning Release until the end of the encounter, allowing you to deal Lightning damage with your unarmed attacks and immediately enter the Heavenly Lightning Stance. While this lasts, you also gain the following benefits: 

  • Your movement speed is doubled.
  • You can make an additional attack when you use Double Punch. 
  • When making an unarmed attack, your critical threshold is lowered by 1 (19-20 base). Whenever you hit with a critical hit with an unarmed attack that deals Lightning damage, the attack arcs to a different enemy within 20ft of the original target. This attack uses the same attack roll and damage, but cannot arc again.

If you ever leave the Lightning Stance, you lose the benefit of this.
descriptionText:
You infuse yourself with Lightning and gain Lightning Release until the end of the encounter, allowing you to deal Lightning damage with your unarmed attacks and immediately enter the Heavenly Lightning Stance. While this lasts, you also gain the following benefits:

- Your movement speed is doubled.
- You can make an additional attack when you use Double Punch.
- When making an unarmed attack, your critical threshold is lowered by 1 (19-20 base). Whenever you hit with a critical hit with an unarmed attack that deals Lightning damage, the attack arcs to a different enemy within 20ft of the original target. This attack uses the same attack roll and damage, but cannot arc again.
If you ever leave the Lightning Stance, you lose the benefit of this.

name: Secret Art: Meteor
descriptionHtml: You mark a 30x30ft area and begin summoning a meteor to strike it at the start of your next turn. Those in the area when it lands take Heavy Fire Damage. You cannot use the Prepare action on this ability. Overcharge: You may spend extra AP on this ability to increase the damage and size of it. For every extra 2 AP spent on it, the size increases by 5ft and the damage increases by your Power. If the Overcharge increases the AP cost to above 4, this ability gains the Setup keyword. You mark the area of this ability when you have finished spending all AP on it and not before. The maximum AP you can spend on this ability is 16 AP.
descriptionText: You mark a 30x30ft area and begin summoning a meteor to strike it at the start of your next turn. Those in the area when it lands take Heavy Fire Damage. You cannot use the Prepare action on this ability. Overcharge: You may spend extra AP on this ability to increase the damage and size of it. For every extra 2 AP spent on it, the size increases by 5ft and the damage increases by your Power. If the Overcharge increases the AP cost to above 4, this ability gains the Setup keyword. You mark the area of this ability when you have finished spending all AP on it and not before. The maximum AP you can spend on this ability is 16 AP.

name: Secret Art: Moving Castle
descriptionHtml:
You project a defensive aura up to 15ft around you, granting all allies (excluding yourself) the Bulwark buff. While under the effects of Bulwark, allies take 3 less damage.

While projecting this aura, you may spend 0 RP to sidestep up to your movement. After you do so, you may not do so again until the start of your next turn.

Upkeep: You must spend 1 mana at the start of your turn to continue this effect.
descriptionText:

name: Secret Art: Mushroomize
descriptionHtml:
You fill your target with mycelium from your spore symbiote, removing the Downed state from them and preventing them from entering the downed State while this effect lasts. Removing Spore Symbiote from the target cancels this effect. This effect ends at the start of your next turn unless you spend 1 mana to continue the effect.  When paying upkeep, if the target is below 0 HP, heal the target for your power + 3.

This effect ends if the target’s HP is reduced to negative their maximum HP amount.

You can use 1 RP instead of 2 AP to use this ability.

When paying upkeep, if the target is below 0 HP, heal the target for your power + 3.

name: Secret Art: Mythical Awakening
descriptionHtml:
You channel your power into your mount, allowing it to unleash a devastating attack based on what type of mount it is.

Pegasus: Bellerophon: You Sidestep towards a target within 60ft and make a Heavy attack against it. This attack has Lock-on and costs 1 RP and 2 Mana

Wyvern: Reginliev: You make a Heavy attack against all enemies in a 5ft wide line up to a point within 60ft. You also make a Heavy attack against all enemies within 10ft of the selected point, though enemies can also take an attack from this ability once. This attack costs 2 AP and 2 Mana.

Dragonfly: Darting Mirage: You move at incredible speed and create several illusionary afterimages in your wake. Until the start of your next turn, every attack against you or your mount that is not a critical hit or does not have the Sure Hit keyword  automatically misses. This is an Illusion effect. This ability costs 0 AP and 4 Mana.

All these attacks are made with your mount’s stats instead of your own.

name: Secret Art: Nightcaller
descriptionHtml: Until the end of the encounter, it is considered night for all your abilities and items that are affected by it.
descriptionText: Until the end of the encounter, it is considered night for all your abilities and items that are affected by it.

name: Secret Art: Override
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against all enemies in a line and move through them. You keep moving through enemies until you reach an empty spot you can stand in. If there is no valid end position due to an ally occupying the spot or terrain (such as a wall) being in the way, you cannot use this ability.

name: Secret Art: Perfect Repetition
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On damage, on the next turn, you may repeat this attack against the same target using the same accuracy check as the initial attack. You may continue to repeat this attack on subsequent turns until you spend a turn not using this move or if the attack fails to deal damage.

name: Secret Art: Pyroblast
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals double Heavy Fire Damage. This attack gains Lock On against a target that has the Burning condition that you inflicted on it.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals double Heavy Fire Damage. This attack gains Lock On against a target that has the Burning condition that you inflicted on it.

name: Secret Art: Razor Hurricane
descriptionHtml: You create a rapid spinning hurricane with a 15x15 size and 50ft in height in the target location. All creatures caught in the hurricane immediately take Wind Light Damage and are pushed out of the Hurricane. Every creature that enters the hurricane immediately takes Wind Light Damage and must succeed at a save against your Potency or be pushed back 20ft. Leaving the hurricane does no damage and requires no save. Upkeep: You must spend 1 Mana and 2 AP at the start of each turn or the spell ends. When you pay this Upkeep, you may move the hurricane up to 20ft. Any creature that comes into contact with the hurricane during this move takes damage and must make a save as if they had entered it.

requirementHtml: Can only be used on your turn.
requirementText: Can only be used on your turn.

name: Secret Art: Ride of the Valkyrie
descriptionHtml:
You Sidestep up to your speed and can move through enemies for this movement. You and every ally you pass through are healed for 11 + (Power x 2).

This movement must always be in a straight line, regardless of your mount type.

name: Secret Art: Seventeen Dissection
descriptionHtml:
You deal 17 true damage to the target. If this damage lowers the target’s HP to 0 or lower, they immediately die.
If the target of this attack is a non-heroic unit, they instantly die regardless of their remaining HP.

name: Secret Art: Shatter
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target using a Blacksmith’s Hammer. If the target chooses to Block the attack, they gain 100 damage reduction against it. If they do, choose one equipped non-divine arms weapon in their hand that has equal or less crafted enhancements than your hammer and destroy that item, giving it the Broken condition.

descriptionHtml: You and your allies in range gain Shield Wall, which reduces the damage they take from the triggering attack by 75.

name: Secret Art: Shock & Awe
descriptionHtml:
You and up to 3 other allies within range gain 3 AP they must spend immediately. On their next turn, they regain 1 less AP.

These AP may not be spent on Setup abilities and normal once per turn ability limitations apply.
descriptionText:

name: Secret Art: Shot From The Blue
descriptionHtml:
You recall hiring a sniper specifically for a situation like this. 

The sniper mercenary, off screen, takes a single shot at the target before retreating. You grant the signal, and the sniper fires, dealing heavy damage with full pierce and sure hit to the target. This shot uses the stats from the Sniper NPC, attacking with +6 Accuracy (if relevant) and dealing 4d6+10 damage.

Shot From The Blue does not gain Sure Hit and Full Pierce against targets with Instinct.

If the target is a grunt, kill them instantly.

requirementHtml: Target is outdoors or reasonably visible from outdoors. Costs 500 Clim to use.
requirementText: Target is outdoors or reasonably visible from outdoors. Costs 500 Clim to use.

name: Secret Art: Skeletal Champion
descriptionHtml:
You drain the surrounding area of energy and form a skeletal champion until the end of the encounter. (Stats can be found in the Monster page)

This champion takes 2 of your summon limit. Any zombies you had active when you summoned this are instead converted into temporary HP for the champion at a rate of 5 HP per zombie.

The champion acts after you on the initiative, but cannot take AP actions on the turn it is summoned.

Upkeep: 2 AP

Overcharge: You may spend 5 mana to give your summon the ability to act on the turn it is summoned.
descriptionText:
You drain the surrounding area of energy and form a skeletal champion until the end of the encounter. (Stats can be found in the Monster page)

This champion takes 2 of your summon limit. Any zombies you had active when you summoned this are instead converted into temporary HP for the champion at a rate of 5 HP per zombie.

The champion acts after you on the initiative, but cannot take AP actions on the turn it is summoned.

Upkeep: 2 AP

Overcharge: You may spend 5 mana to give your summon the ability to act on the turn it is summoned.

name: Secret Art: Spectrum Blade
descriptionHtml:
Until the end of the encounter, you enchant your weapon with every single element. When using Elemental Strike or Elemental Sweep, you may choose which effect you want regardless of the damage type your attack deals. When you deal damage, you apply the damage type that would deal the most damage.

In addition, your weapon gains a +1 Power bonus until the end of the encounter. If it already had a +1 Power bonus through an enchantment, this bonus is instead increased to +2.

If you are not holding the enchanted weapon at the start of your turn, your weapon loses this benefit.
descriptionText:

If you are not holding the enchanted weapon at the start of your turn, your weapon loses this benefit.

name: Secret Art: Spirit Stigma
descriptionHtml: You stigmatize the targets spirit, they are inflicted with Spirit Stigma until the start of your next turn. A target with Spirit Stigma counts as a willing ally for your Eremancer abilities and damaging them fulfills the Malevolent  Phantasm requirement.
descriptionText: You stigmatize the targets spirit, they are inflicted with Spirit Stigma until the start of your next turn. A target with Spirit Stigma counts as a willing ally for your Eremancer abilities and damaging them fulfills the Malevolent  Phantasm requirement.

name: Secret Art: Summon Eidolon
descriptionHtml:
Your contracted Eidolon hears your call and sends a proxy of themselves to fight for you.  The Eidolon called and the costs are dependent on your attunement.  Lasts up to 5 minutes.  You must pay the upkeep cost under the Eidolon’s Summon Skill or the Eidolon vanishes.

Unless the summon has a skill that says otherwise, a summon acts after you on initiative, but cannot act the round it is summoned, except for RP actions.

Overcharge: You may spend 5 mana to give your summon the ability to act on the turn it is summoned.

Your contracted Eidolon hears your call and sends a proxy of themselves to fight for you.  The Eidolon called and the costs are dependent on your attunement.  Lasts up to 5 minutes.  You must pay the upkeep cost under the Eidolon’s Summon Skill or the Eidolon vanishes.

Unless the summon has a skill that says otherwise, a summon acts after you on initiative, but cannot act the round it is summoned, except for RP actions.

Overcharge: You may spend 5 mana to give your summon the ability to act on the turn it is summoned.

name: Secret Art: Surge of Elements
descriptionHtml:
You channel all masteries of the elements and fire a barrage of elemental bolts at the target.

You make 7 light attacks, doing Arcane, Fire, Water, Frost, Wind, Lightning and Earth damage respectively.

Overcharge: You may spend one more mana to make additional Light attacks, one that does Holy damage and one that does Dark damage.
descriptionText:
You channel all masteries of the elements and fire a barrage of elemental bolts at the target.

You make 7 light attacks, doing Arcane, Fire, Water, Frost, Wind, Lightning and Earth damage respectively.

Overcharge: You may spend one more mana to make additional Light attacks, one that does Holy damage and one that does Dark damage.

name: Secret Art: The Grand Theater
descriptionHtml:
All allies within range may sidestep up to their movement speed.

You may Sidestep all enemies within range up to their movement speed.

After all targets have moved, everyone that was originally in range of this ability immediately gains 2 AP they must spend on attacks against other creatures if possible.
descriptionText:
All allies within range may sidestep up to their movement speed.

You may Sidestep all enemies within range up to their movement speed.

After all targets have moved, everyone that was originally in range of this ability immediately gains 2 AP they must spend on attacks against other creatures if possible.

name: Secret Art: Titan Blade
descriptionHtml:
You greatly increase the size and weight of your weapons, then slam them down in a direction. You make a melee Heavy attack against all enemies in a 15ft wide line up to the range. On damage, a target is knocked prone.

 

After the initial hit, a shockwave follows. You make another Heavy attack against any enemy still in the original line’s range. This second attack has the Sure Hit and Full Pierce qualities against a prone target.
descriptionText:
You greatly increase the size and weight of your weapons, then slam them down in a direction. You make a melee Heavy attack against all enemies in a 15ft wide line up to the range. On damage, a target is knocked prone.

After the initial hit, a shockwave follows. You make another Heavy attack against any enemy still in the original line’s range. This second attack has the Sure Hit and Full Pierce qualities against a prone target.
requirementHtml: Must be wielding two Two-Handed melee weapons.
requirementText: Must be wielding two Two-Handed melee weapons.

name: Secret Art: Transmute Proto Armatae
descriptionHtml:
You touch the ground, transmuting a Proto Armatae of your own design.  The Proto Armatae lifts you up and immediately encases you into its cockpit.   The Proto Armatae is 15ft tall and is a large creature that occupies a 15ftx15ft space.  All creatures and moveable objects surrounding the Proto Armatae are pushed back away from its zone of control in a burst of steam.  The Armatae also gains a temporary shield with 20 HP that disappears at the start of your next turn.

You must use your own actions to cause the Proto Armatae to move and attack.  You can eject from a transmutation hatch on the top at the center of the Proto Armatae for 1 AP, in which the Proto Armatae stops functioning.  When you re-enter you must close the hatch for 1 AP before the Proto Armatae functions again. 

The Proto Armatae has health equal to 15 + 5x Focus and it uses your AP and RP for actions.  You can channel your Transmuter abilities through the Proto Armatae, and Transmute Weapon can create a giant sized weapon for the Armatae to use.

You may also spend 1 RP to use this ability instead of the AP cost.

Only usable once.  You regain the use of this ability when you gain an Interlude Point.

 

Proto Armatae

HP: –

Evasion: 9/19

Guard: 4/14

 

Mini Transmutation Cannon (Right Arm)

Cost: 0 AP

Range: 40ft

Description:  Fires a mini transmutation cannon of deconstructive energy making a light attack against a target.  Doesn’t provoke attacks of opportunity.

 

Humanoid Gripper (Left Arm)

Description: Humanoid Gripper can make all basic attacks. It is proficient in any transmuted weapon it holds. Its regular melee attacks deal physical damage and any transmuted weapon it wields gains the benefit of that weapon category.

name: Secret Art: Tsubame Gaeshi
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target 3 times. On the first miss, the next attacks gain Lock On. On the second miss, the next attack gains Sure Hit. These only apply to attacks made during Tsubame Gaeshi.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target 3 times. On the first miss, the next attacks gain Lock On. On the second miss, the next attack gains Sure Hit. These only apply to attacks made during Tsubame Gaeshi.

name: Secret Art: Ultimate Spell
descriptionHtml: The next Spell you cast this turn with an AP cost lower than 5 deals true damage.
descriptionText: The next Spell you cast this turn with an AP cost lower than 5 deals true damage.

name: Secret Art: Unholy Strength
descriptionHtml:
You Gain Unholy Strength which grants +2 Power and Focus. While Unholy Strength is active your attacks/abilities that use your melee weapon to deal physical damage inflict Dark Damage instead and your Bone Armor will not break from damage. 

Upkeep: 1 Mana.
descriptionText:
You Gain Unholy Strength which grants +2 Power and Focus. While Unholy Strength is active your attacks/abilities that use your melee weapon to deal physical damage inflict Dark Damage instead and your Bone Armor will not break from damage.

Upkeep: 1 Mana.

name: Secret Art: Unstoppable Onslaught
descriptionHtml: You may move up to your speed in a line. All enemies you pass through and all enemies within 15ft of your ending position take Light damage, become Challenged and Shaken until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You may move up to your speed in a line. All enemies you pass through and all enemies within 15ft of your ending position take Light damage, become Challenged and Shaken until the start of your next turn.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Secret Art: Vanishing Thousand Steps
descriptionHtml:
You may sidestep to a target within range and make a Heavy attack against them. 

Then, until the end of the turn, you may Sidestep to any enemy you can see as part of a melee attack you are about to make. You gain Windflow stacks as if you spent AP on the movement equal to the AP spent on the attack.
descriptionText:
You may sidestep to a target within range and make a Heavy attack against them.

Then, until the end of the turn, you may Sidestep to any enemy you can see as part of a melee attack you are about to make. You gain Windflow stacks as if you spent AP on the movement equal to the AP spent on the attack.

name: Secret Art: Void
descriptionHtml: You target one buff or passive effect you can identify from a grunt or heroic target within range. It is immediately removed and cannot be re-applied for the rest of the encounter.
descriptionText: You target one buff or passive effect you can identify from a grunt or heroic target within range. It is immediately removed and cannot be re-applied for the rest of the encounter.

name: Secret Art: Walking Church
descriptionHtml: Blesses the target, granting them the status of a church. Until the end of your next turn, the target gains Damage Reduction 1000 against all damage types.
descriptionText: Blesses the target, granting them the status of a church. Until the end of your next turn, the target gains Damage Reduction 1000 against all damage types.

name: Secret Art: Whirling Death
descriptionHtml:
You enter the Whirling Death stance, spinning wildly and shooting at enemies within range. While in this Stance you may spend 2 AP to make a basic Light Attack with a pistol against all enemies within 20ft.

When you kill an enemy or make them enter the downed state from with this attack, you may repeat the attack.

The Stance lasts until you enter a different Stance or until you make an attack that is not tied to this ability.
descriptionText:
You enter the Whirling Death stance, spinning wildly and shooting at enemies within range. While in this Stance you may spend 2 AP to make a basic Light Attack with a pistol against all enemies within 20ft.

When you kill an enemy or make them enter the downed state from with this attack, you may repeat the attack.

The Stance lasts until you enter a different Stance or until you make an attack that is not tied to this ability.

name: Secret Art: Whiteout
descriptionHtml:
You create a sudden snowstorm that obscures sight, creating difficult battle conditions. 

Attack accuracy for all affected units is reduced by your Focus and sight range is reduced to 60ft. A creature can only target something within their sight range.

You and creatures with Frost Immunity are not affected by this ability.

You may activate this ability as an Encounter Start action during the Encounter Start phase of an encounter. If you do, you do not pay the RP or initial mana cost.

Upkeep: You must pay 2 mana at the start of your turn or the effect ends at the end of that turn.
descriptionText:

Attack accuracy for all affected units is reduced by your Focus and sight range is reduced to 60ft. A creature can only target something within their sight range.

You and creatures with Frost Immunity are not affected by this ability.

You may activate this ability as an Encounter Start action during the Encounter Start phase of an encounter. If you do, you do not pay the RP or initial mana cost.

Upkeep: You must pay 2 mana at the start of your turn or the effect ends at the end of that turn.

name: Secret Art: Within This Ink, The Perfect Answer
descriptionHtml:
You draw and immediately use a special talisman.

This talisman may have any spell in the base game on it (meaning it’s on the website), though it cannot be a secret or esoteric art. Any costs for this spell must be paid as normal. You must pay the required calligraphy units as if you made the spell yourself. If you can’t pay the required amount, you go into ‘debt’. While in debt, you cannot create any more talisman or use this ability.

To clear the debt, you must pay the required amount of calligraphy units at any point.

After you use this ability, you cannot do so again until the end of the arc.
descriptionText:

You must pay the required calligraphy units as if you made the spell yourself. If you can’t pay the required amount, you go into ‘debt’. While in debt, you cannot create any more talisman or use this ability.

To clear the debt, you must pay the required amount of calligraphy units at any point.

After you use this ability, you cannot do so again until the end of the arc.

name: Secret Talisman
descriptionHtml: You use a talisman you possess that contains a Secret Art. This functions like using a normal talisman. You may only use this once per encounter. Does not count towards your Secret Art usage for this encounter.
descriptionText: You use a talisman you possess that contains a Secret Art. This functions like using a normal talisman. You may only use this once per encounter. Does not count towards your Secret Art usage for this encounter.

name: Seismic Shove
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against the target. On damage, you may push the target 5ft in any direction.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against the target. On damage, you may push the target 5ft in any direction.

name: Selective Casting
descriptionHtml:
For the next Spell you cast, you may choose to have it not affect a number of targets equal to your Focus.

Only affects spells with an instantaneous effect (excluding setup things). Lingering spell effects such as Glittershards cannot be used with Selective Casting.
descriptionText:
For the next Spell you cast, you may choose to have it not affect a number of targets equal to your Focus.

Only affects spells with an instantaneous effect (excluding setup things). Lingering spell effects such as Glittershards cannot be used with Selective Casting.

name: Send To Armory
descriptionHtml:
You touch an item not held or carried by another creature and immediately teleport it to your Dimensional Armory into an unoccupied space (if there is room).  If there is no space the spell fails.  Some magic items can be rejected by the dimensional armory.  Living creatures cannot be teleported into the Dimensional Armory.

Overcharge: You spend 1 minute instead of 2 AP, reducing the mana cost by 1.
descriptionText:
You touch an item not held or carried by another creature and immediately teleport it to your Dimensional Armory into an unoccupied space (if there is room).  If there is no space the spell fails.  Some magic items can be rejected by the dimensional armory.  Living creatures cannot be teleported into the Dimensional Armory.

Overcharge: You spend 1 minute instead of 2 AP, reducing the mana cost by 1.
requirementHtml: You have a Dimensional Armory active.
requirementText: You have a Dimensional Armory active.

name: Separate wheat from chaff
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against all enemies in range. On damage, you push the target back 5ft. If you landed a Killing Blow, all that took damage become Shaken as well.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against all enemies in range. On damage, you push the target back 5ft. If you landed a Killing Blow, all that took damage become Shaken as well.
requirementHtml: Scythe only
requirementText: Scythe only

name: Serene Water Stance
descriptionHtml: You enter the Serene Water Stance. While in this Stance, you gain a +3 bonus to your evasion and you may move 5ft everytime an accuracy check against you misses. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. This Stance lasts until you enter a different Stance, you use the Block action or until you move, with the exceptions of this ability and movement abilities with the Unarmed Strike keyword. Making an attack does not cancel this Stance.
descriptionText: You enter the Serene Water Stance. While in this Stance, you gain a +3 bonus to your evasion and you may move 5ft everytime an accuracy check against you misses. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. This Stance lasts until you enter a different Stance, you use the Block action or until you move, with the exceptions of this ability and movement abilities with the Unarmed Strike keyword. Making an attack does not cancel this Stance.

name: Shade Form
descriptionHtml: You become like a shade becoming near weightless and gaining the ability to pass through spaces occupied by other creatures. You can also slip through small cracks in walls or doors, as long as they are at least 1inch wide and tall. Upkeep: You must pay 2 mana at the start of each turn or this ability ends. During the night, the mana cost and Upkeep of this is reduced by 2.
