You can also slip through small cracks in walls or doors, as long as they are at least 1inch wide and tall. Upkeep: You must pay 2 mana at the start of each turn or this ability ends. During the night, the mana cost and Upkeep of this is reduced by 2.

name: Shadow Cloak
descriptionHtml: You cloak yourself in Shadows, giving you a +5 bonus on Stealth checks for 1 hour or until end of encounter. It also allows you to hide even when not behind cover or concealment. During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 2.
descriptionText: You cloak yourself in Shadows, giving you a +5 bonus on Stealth checks for 1 hour or until end of encounter. It also allows you to hide even when not behind cover or concealment. During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 2.

name: Shadow Counter
descriptionHtml:
You prepare a powerful heavy attack against a single enemy. This attack deals extra damage based on half your missing health.

If that enemy provokes an AoO while you are charging this ability, you may immediately use this ability as if you finished charging it.
descriptionText:
You prepare a powerful heavy attack against a single enemy. This attack deals extra damage based on half your missing health.

If that enemy provokes an AoO while you are charging this ability, you may immediately use this ability as if you finished charging it.
requirementHtml: Must be in Inexorable Shadow Stance.
requirementText: Must be in Inexorable Shadow Stance.

name: Shadow Step
descriptionHtml: You may Teleport up to twice your movement speed. During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 2.
descriptionText: You may Teleport up to twice your movement speed. During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 2.

name: Share Armor
descriptionHtml:
Your ally may treat their guard and block as if they were wearing your armor and shield until the end of the current creature’s turn. If multiple creatures of the same type move on the same initiative, it lasts through all of their turns.

Any temporary increases to the guard/block of this armor (such as through reinforce armor) is not transferred over. Any increases from armor plates or cloak are also not carried over. (But the target's own plates or cloak may apply.)
descriptionText:
Your ally may treat their guard and block as if they were wearing your armor and shield until the end of the current creature’s turn. If multiple creatures of the same type move on the same initiative, it lasts through all of their turns.

Any temporary increases to the guard/block of this armor (such as through reinforce armor) is not transferred over. Any increases from armor plates or cloak are also not carried over. (But the target's own plates or cloak may apply.)
requirementHtml: Must be wearing armor.
requirementText: Must be wearing armor.

name: Shared Defense
descriptionHtml: Your mount (the last mount you were riding on this arc) may use your defenses instead of its own while within range. In addition, you may spend RP for it while dismounted if your mount is in range.
descriptionText: Your mount (the last mount you were riding on this arc) may use your defenses instead of its own while within range. In addition, you may spend RP for it while dismounted if your mount is in range.
requirementHtml: Must be dismounted.
requirementText: Must be dismounted.

name: Shatter
descriptionHtml: Every enemy within range must make a save against your Potency or take Light Damage. Any unattended objects made of glass or a similar vulnerable material also shatter.
descriptionText: Every enemy within range must make a save against your Potency or take Light Damage. Any unattended objects made of glass or a similar vulnerable material also shatter.

name: Shatter Time
descriptionHtml:
For this encounter you may act during different parts of a round. When you end your turn with AP remaining, you may choose to act immediately after another creature ends their turn. You do not regain AP or RP and these extra actions are not considered turns. You may take these extra actions multiple times during a round, provided you have AP remaining.

You cannot use Setup abilities during this extra actions.
descriptionText:
For this encounter you may act during different parts of a round. When you end your turn with AP remaining, you may choose to act immediately after another creature ends their turn. You do not regain AP or RP and these extra actions are not considered turns. You may take these extra actions multiple times during a round, provided you have AP remaining.

You cannot use Setup abilities during this extra actions.

name: Shelter
descriptionHtml: The attack targeting your VIP instead targets you. You may use this even if you’re also a target of the attack and both attacks will resolve against you. You also gain the benefits of the Block action against the triggering attack.
descriptionText: The attack targeting your VIP instead targets you. You may use this even if you’re also a target of the attack and both attacks will resolve against you. You also gain the benefits of the Block action against the triggering attack.

name: Shield Burst
descriptionHtml:
You heal the target for an amount equal to half the temporary HP they have, then all temporary HP on them is removed. All enemies within 5ft of the target must make a save against your Potency or be pushed back 10ft.

You may use 1 AP instead of 1 RP for this ability.
descriptionText:
You heal the target for an amount equal to half the temporary HP they have, then all temporary HP on them is removed. All enemies within 5ft of the target must make a save against your Potency or be pushed back 10ft.

You may use 1 AP instead of 1 RP for this ability.
requirementHtml: Target must have temporary HP applied by you.
requirementText: Target must have temporary HP applied by you.

name: Shield the Fallen
descriptionHtml: You give the ally temporary HP equal to the damage they would take from the attack.
descriptionText: You give the ally temporary HP equal to the damage they would take from the attack.
requirementHtml: Downed ally takes damage from an attack.
requirementText: Downed ally takes damage from an attack.

name: Shieldcrusher
descriptionHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If they Block against this attack and are wielding a shield or greatshield, that shield becomes Broken.
descriptionText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If they Block against this attack and are wielding a shield or greatshield, that shield becomes Broken.
requirementHtml: Two-handed weapons only.
requirementText: Two-handed weapons only.

name: Shooting Form
descriptionHtml:
You transform a melee weapon you’re holding into a Wand Channeling Weapon or return a transformed weapon back to normal. While transformed, the weapon keeps any relevant enchants and functions exactly like how a wand would. You are considered proficient in this wand, even if you normally wouldn’t be and can fire Arcane Elemental shots with it, even if you normally wouldn’t be able to.

Lasts until the end of the encounter, for 5 minutes or until the weapon leaves your possession.
descriptionText:
You transform a melee weapon you’re holding into a Wand Channeling Weapon or return a transformed weapon back to normal. While transformed, the weapon keeps any relevant enchants and functions exactly like how a wand would. You are considered proficient in this wand, even if you normally wouldn’t be and can fire Arcane Elemental shots with it, even if you normally wouldn’t be able to.

Lasts until the end of the encounter, for 5 minutes or until the weapon leaves your possession.

name: Silentium
descriptionHtml: You infuse a light thrown weapon with Sacred Power and Light Attack the target for Light Holy Damage. On damage the weapon disrupts the target’s magic circuits, breaking concentration and preventing the target from using abilities with the Spell keyword. The lodged weapon can be removed for 1 RP or 2 AP, removing the disruption. Combo: If used after Eagle’s Hunt, reduce the AP cost to 0 from 2.
descriptionText: You infuse a light thrown weapon with Sacred Power and Light Attack the target for Light Holy Damage. On damage the weapon disrupts the target’s magic circuits, breaking concentration and preventing the target from using abilities with the Spell keyword. The lodged weapon can be removed for 1 RP or 2 AP, removing the disruption. Combo: If used after Eagle’s Hunt, reduce the AP cost to 0 from 2.
requirementHtml: One-handed Thrown Weapon or Sets of missiles Only.
requirementText: One-handed Thrown Weapon or Sets of missiles Only.

name: Single-Minded Fury
descriptionHtml: You choose a single enemy as the target of your Single-Minded Fury. Your movement speed is doubled when moving towards your target plus you gain immunity to Slowed and difficult terrain. You also gain immunity to any mind-affecting effect that would prevent you from chasing or attacking your target. You gain a 1d4 bonus to accuracy rolls against that target, but suffer a 2d4 penalty to accuracy rolls against any other target. This effect lasts until the end of the encounter or until the target falls to 0 HP or lower.
descriptionText: You choose a single enemy as the target of your Single-Minded Fury. Your movement speed is doubled when moving towards your target plus you gain immunity to Slowed and difficult terrain. You also gain immunity to any mind-affecting effect that would prevent you from chasing or attacking your target. You gain a 1d4 bonus to accuracy rolls against that target, but suffer a 2d4 penalty to accuracy rolls against any other target. This effect lasts until the end of the encounter or until the target falls to 0 HP or lower.
requirementHtml: In Rage Stance, ability is not already active.
requirementText: In Rage Stance, ability is not already active.

name: Singularity Collapse
descriptionHtml: You target a 25x25 square and all creatures within that square must make a save or be pulled 10ft towards the center.
descriptionText: You target a 25x25 square and all creatures within that square must make a save or be pulled 10ft towards the center.

name: Siphon Material
descriptionHtml:
Errand. You siphon the alloyed material from an item if possible, removing the effects that the original item would’ve had. If you cannot remove the effect then the skill fails. 

You remove the alloy and regain its original form, while also maintaining the form of the item minus the effect. The special material is retrieved in raw units.
descriptionText:
Errand. You siphon the alloyed material from an item if possible, removing the effects that the original item would’ve had. If you cannot remove the effect then the skill fails.

You remove the alloy and regain its original form, while also maintaining the form of the item minus the effect. The special material is retrieved in raw units.

name: Siren Song
descriptionHtml:
All enemies in range must make a save against your Potency. If they fail, they may only spend AP on their next turn to move closer to you using the most direct path possible and cannot make attacks before that. To move closer, they may take actions that would help in getting closer such as standing up from prone or using fae flash. 

If this path leads them through an obviously harmful hazard such as off a cliff, they are no longer affected by this ability. Otherwise, this ability lasts until they are within 5ft of you or until they take damage. While playing this Song, you can take no other actions. Taking any other action cancels the Song, immediately freeing all enemies from its effects. A creature can only be affected by this ability once per encounter.
descriptionText:
All enemies in range must make a save against your Potency. If they fail, they may only spend AP on their next turn to move closer to you using the most direct path possible and cannot make attacks before that. To move closer, they may take actions that would help in getting closer such as standing up from prone or using fae flash.

If this path leads them through an obviously harmful hazard such as off a cliff, they are no longer affected by this ability. Otherwise, this ability lasts until they are within 5ft of you or until they take damage. While playing this Song, you can take no other actions. Taking any other action cancels the Song, immediately freeing all enemies from its effects. A creature can only be affected by this ability once per encounter.

name: Skillfull Blow
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.

name: Skydive
descriptionHtml: You target an enemy below you, no more than 5ft away from you horizontally. You then immediately dive down to that target, making a Heavy Attack against them. You deal an additional point of damage for every 10ft you fell before making the attack, up to 10 extra damage.
descriptionText: You target an enemy below you, no more than 5ft away from you horizontally. You then immediately dive down to that target, making a Heavy Attack against them. You deal an additional point of damage for every 10ft you fell before making the attack, up to 10 extra damage.
requirementHtml: Must be airborne, polearm only.
requirementText: Must be airborne, polearm only.

name: Slam
descriptionHtml:
You attack a single target for Light Damage. On damage, the target is moved 5ft away from you if they are a Grunt or if your Power is higher than theirs, in addition the target must be no more than one size larger than you.

You may spend 1 Mana to ignore the Power requirement.
descriptionText:
You attack a single target for Light Damage. On damage, the target is moved 5ft away from you if they are a Grunt or if your Power is higher than theirs, in addition the target must be no more than one size larger than you.

You may spend 1 Mana to ignore the Power requirement.

name: Slide & Shoot
descriptionHtml:
You slide forward up to 20ft towards your target. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity and you may pass through enemy space while moving. At the same time, you may make a Light Attack with your pistol against the target at any point during this movement.

Your next ability gains Combo: If this attack is an unarmed attack, its AP cost is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:

Your next ability gains Combo: If this attack is an unarmed attack, its AP cost is reduced by 1.
requirementHtml: Pistol only.
requirementText: Pistol only.

name: Slime Body
descriptionHtml: You gain Slime Body, which gives Damage Reduction 100 against physical damage against the next attack.
descriptionText: You gain Slime Body, which gives Damage Reduction 100 against physical damage against the next attack.

name: Slow
descriptionHtml: The target is slowed until the start of your next turn unless the target pays 1 RP to resist this effect.
descriptionText: The target is slowed until the start of your next turn unless the target pays 1 RP to resist this effect.

name: Smash through the pain
descriptionHtml: You gain Smash through the pain, which reduces the damage taken by the next attack by an amount equal to 3 + Power
descriptionText: You gain Smash through the pain, which reduces the damage taken by the next attack by an amount equal to 3 + Power

name: Snack Time Everyone!~
descriptionHtml:
You present a tray of refreshing Health and Mana snacks to your allies. All allies within 5ft of you may spend 0 RP to eat a snack.

Health: The ally may spend 2 Mana to heal for 15 HP.

Mana: The ally recovers 1 Mana. This counts as a character’s one food for the day and a character cannot benefit from this ability if they already had food. Does not count as a meal for the purposes of fending of starvation.

You keep the tray of snacks up for 1 turn and a character walking within 5ft of you while it’s up may also spend the 0 RP to eat a snack. 

Allies may also spend 0 AP to eat another snack. They can do this once per turn.

Upkeep: 1 Mana, you keep the tray up for an additional turn.

requirementHtml: At least 1 hand free
requirementText: At least 1 hand free

name: Snap Shot
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target with a ranged weapon or a thrown weapon. You do not add your Focus to the accuracy roll.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target with a ranged weapon or a thrown weapon. You do not add your Focus to the accuracy roll.

name: Snap Shot II
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. You do not add your focus to this roll.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. You do not add your focus to this roll.

name: Sneak Attack
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.

name: Solar Radiance
descriptionHtml: You shine brightly like the sun in a 60ft radius around you. You cannot turn this off, but you can lower the range to just 5ft. This light counts as sunlight, though any negative effects a creature suffers from it are halved. It also counts as bright light for creatures weak to light.

This light counts as sunlight, though any negative effects a creature suffers from it are halved. It also counts as bright light for creatures weak to light.

name: Soul Absorption
descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack against a willing target that deals Light Dark damage. Your next Dark type Spell or Attack other than Soul Absorption gains extra damage equal to damage taken by the target. (Does not stack)
descriptionText: You make a Light Attack against a willing target that deals Light Dark damage. Your next Dark type Spell or Attack other than Soul Absorption gains extra damage equal to damage taken by the target. (Does not stack)

name: Soul Strike
descriptionHtml: After landing a killing blow, you can use Soul Strike once on that target.  If they are still at 0 HP or less, you raise an orb of divine energy out of the target, killing them instantly.  You then use that orb against a second target, making a light attack that deals dark damage.  It is possible to use Soul Strike while in Cat Form. Overcharge: You may spend 1 extra AP to instead make a heavy or precise attack.

requirementHtml: You land a killing blow.
requirementText: You land a killing blow.

name: Soulreap
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you instantly kill the target and immediately cast Raise Undead on the target for 0 AP.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you instantly kill the target and immediately cast Raise Undead on the target for 0 AP.

name: Sound the retreat
descriptionHtml: You sidestep 4 times your speed, moving as far away from visible enemies as possible. After that, your allies may sidestep up to twice their speed towards you.
descriptionText: You sidestep 4 times your speed, moving as far away from visible enemies as possible. After that, your allies may sidestep up to twice their speed towards you.

name: Spear Charge
descriptionHtml:
You may spend 2 or 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. After you finish moving, you may spend half of the AP you used on this ability on a single Light or Heavy attack.

For every 10ft moved, this attack gains +1 damage up to a maximum of +10.

If you spent 4 AP on this ability, you may also choose to use Wild Thrusts instead of making a Light or Heavy attack. These attacks only gain the damage bonus listed above for the initial attacks (and not the constant attacks of opportunity) and Wild Thrusts mana cost is reduced to 0 if used in this way.

If you spent 4 AP on this ability, you may also choose to use Wild Thrusts instead of making a Light or Heavy attack. These attacks only gain the damage bonus listed above for the initial attacks (and not the constant attacks of opportunity) and Wild Thrusts mana cost is reduced to 0 if used in this way.
requirementHtml: Polearm only.
requirementText: Polearm only.

name: Spellblade's Preparation
descriptionHtml:
You unsheathe your weapon and enchant your weapon with an element you've mastered. Your weapon now deals the chosen element’s damage instead of its normal damage.

If you are not holding the enchanted weapon at the start of your turn, your weapon loses this benefit.

The weapon gains a +1 Power bonus to attacks until the end of the encounter.
descriptionText:
You unsheathe your weapon and enchant your weapon with an element you've mastered. Your weapon now deals the chosen element’s damage instead of its normal damage.

If you are not holding the enchanted weapon at the start of your turn, your weapon loses this benefit.

The weapon gains a +1 Power bonus to attacks until the end of the encounter.

name: Spellsteal
descriptionHtml: You attempt to steal an effect from the target, removing it from the target and applying it to yourself for the same duration, provided you meet the requirements (if any). You must pay mana equal to the effects original mana cost. Effects granted through stances, transformations and permanent effects cannot be stolen. After stealing an effect, you can’t use this again until the stolen effect has ended. The stolen effect also cannot be re-applied on the target until it has faded from you. You must have seen the effect be applied or otherwise identified an effect before you can steal it.
descriptionText: You attempt to steal an effect from the target, removing it from the target and applying it to yourself for the same duration, provided you meet the requirements (if any). You must pay mana equal to the effects original mana cost. Effects granted through stances, transformations and permanent effects cannot be stolen. After stealing an effect, you can’t use this again until the stolen effect has ended. The stolen effect also cannot be re-applied on the target until it has faded from you. You must have seen the effect be applied or otherwise identified an effect before you can steal it.

name: Spellstrike
descriptionHtml:
You choose an ability with the Spell keyword that you can use. You make a melee attack against a target in range for the same AP and mana as the Spell. 

Your attack functions like the chosen Spell does, but does not provoke an Attack of Opportunity and is not treated as casting a Spell (meaning it can be used while Raging and Anti-Spell effects don't work). If the chosen spell was an AoE effect, the target point would be the target you strike with the spell. The requirements for applying any effects remain the same. 

The spell you chose cannot be used again in the same round like normal, and if used with Secret Arts it counts as your Secret Art use for that encounter.

Only works with Spells that are attacks.
descriptionText:

The spell you chose cannot be used again in the same round like normal, and if used with Secret Arts it counts as your Secret Art use for that encounter.

Only works with Spells that are attacks.

name: Spider Climb
descriptionHtml:
You do not suffer any penalties from moving across webs, either natural or created through magic or items. You may climb up walls without using any tools or making any checks at half your normal movement speed and can remain attached to the wall.

If you take any action other than moving or climbing, you become vulnerable to be knocked off the wall you're climbing until the start of your next turn. When you take damage, you slide down 20ft. If you are hanging on a ceiling or similar surface, you instead fall down from it falling prone and taking fall damage as normal.
descriptionText:
You do not suffer any penalties from moving across webs, either natural or created through magic or items. You may climb up walls without using any tools or making any checks at half your normal movement speed and can remain attached to the wall.

If you take any action other than moving or climbing, you become vulnerable to be knocked off the wall you're climbing until the start of your next turn. When you take damage, you slide down 20ft. If you are hanging on a ceiling or similar surface, you instead fall down from it falling prone and taking fall damage as normal.

name: Spike Field
descriptionHtml:
You create a 20x20ft field of spikes. Any creature moving more than 5ft per movement action across it takes full pierce damage equal to your Focus for each 5ft they move across the field.

If the movement through it was forced movement, you only take the damage once.

Lasts until the start of your next turn.

Upkeep: 1 mana, extends the duration of the spike field by 1 turn.
descriptionText:

If the movement through it was forced movement, you only take the damage once.

name: Spiked Armor
descriptionHtml: Until the start of your next turn, the spikes on your armor and shield reflect damage when you are attacked. When an enemy hits you with a melee attack, they take 4 full pierce damage.
descriptionText: Until the start of your next turn, the spikes on your armor and shield reflect damage when you are attacked. When an enemy hits you with a melee attack, they take 4 full pierce damage.
requirementHtml: Must be wearing armor and/or a shield.
requirementText: Must be wearing armor and/or a shield.

name: Spirit Circuit Crash
descriptionHtml:
You send a wave of magic energy onto the target, afflicting them with Spirit Circuit Crash— jamming their Spirit Circuits.  The target cannot use Secret Arts or any abilities that require mana until the end of their next turn.  The target may choose to take damage equal to your heavy attack damage to cancel this effect.

You can cast this through a creature affected by Mind Connection.
descriptionText:
You send a wave of magic energy onto the target, afflicting them with Spirit Circuit Crash— jamming their Spirit Circuits.  The target cannot use Secret Arts or any abilities that require mana until the end of their next turn.  The target may choose to take damage equal to your heavy attack damage to cancel this effect.

You can cast this through a creature affected by Mind Connection.

name: Spirit Jump
descriptionHtml:
You and your mount jump up to 60ft vertically straight up into the air.  You can additionally move 5ft horizontally afterwards.  Unless your mount can fly, you automatically land straight down from your position at the end of your turn or for 0 AP, this falling movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity and you do not take fall damage from it.  You cannot make any non-teleport movement actions while in the air, but can still take other actions (such as attacking) while airborne.

You may trade height to move horizontally as part of the initial jump, moving 5ft horizontally as part of the jump in exchange for 5ft of height. You may move up to 40ft extra horizontally with this.

Instead of spending mana, you may instead spend a minute preparing this ability before activating it. When you do, this ability costs 0 mana.
descriptionText:
You and your mount jump up to 60ft vertically straight up into the air.  You can additionally move 5ft horizontally afterwards.  Unless your mount can fly, you automatically land straight down from your position at the end of your turn or for 0 AP, this falling movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity and you do not take fall damage from it.  You cannot make any non-teleport movement actions while in the air, but can still take other actions (such as attacking) while airborne.

You may trade height to move horizontally as part of the initial jump, moving 5ft horizontally as part of the jump in exchange for 5ft of height. You may move up to 40ft extra horizontally with this.

Instead of spending mana, you may instead spend a minute preparing this ability before activating it. When you do, this ability costs 0 mana.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Spirited Bravado
descriptionHtml: When you are under the effect of Tipsy, you gain a Spirited Bravado which grants +1 Power.
descriptionText: When you are under the effect of Tipsy, you gain a Spirited Bravado which grants +1 Power.

name: Spiritual Reading
descriptionHtml:
You are able to check the aura of a creature or object within range. 

If you check a creature, you can see whether a creature is non-heroic, weaker than you, around the same as you, stronger than you or much stronger than you. The GM may also give you their Spirit Core value if it has one. You also are aware if someone is concealing their spirit core level, but can’t get an accurate reading of their strength if they are. In addition, you are able to see their mana % until the end of the encounter.

If you check an item, you can determine whether it’s magical in nature. If it is, you may immediately make a Magic check against it to determine its effect as if you were using Decipher Magic with a +5 bonus.

name: Spiritual Sync
descriptionHtml:
If you paid mana for this ability, you gain Temporary HP equal to 8X. Any Temporary HP from this ability remaining after the encounter conclusion phase is turned back into mana at a ratio of 8 Temporary HP to 1 mana.

You may instead pay HP for this ability. If you do, you gain 1 Temporary Mana for every 8 HP you spend. You cannot spend more HP than you currently have. Any Temporary mana is lost at the encounter conclusion phase.

You may spend a maximum of 3 mana or 24 HP on this ability.

Once you use this ability, you may not use it again until after an encounter conclusion phase.

name: Spore Burst
descriptionHtml: You create an explosion of spores in front of you. Make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals Poison damage. Afterwards, knock back the target 5ft and knock yourself back 5ft. This Spell does not trigger attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: You create an explosion of spores in front of you. Make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals Poison damage. Afterwards, knock back the target 5ft and knock yourself back 5ft. This Spell does not trigger attacks of opportunity.

name: Squadsight
descriptionHtml: An ally that can see or hear you within range may use your Perception score until the start of your next turn. They may also see from your position rather than their own and they may calculate their ranged weapon range (but not LoS) from your position instead of their own. This new range may not exceed twice their normal range.
descriptionText: An ally that can see or hear you within range may use your Perception score until the start of your next turn. They may also see from your position rather than their own and they may calculate their ranged weapon range (but not LoS) from your position instead of their own. This new range may not exceed twice their normal range.

name: Stab & Throw
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against a target in melee range. You may then use the same weapon to Heavy Attack a different target within your ranged weapon range or thrown attack range. This second attack does not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target of your first attack.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against a target in melee range. You may then use the same weapon to Heavy Attack a different target within your ranged weapon range or thrown attack range. This second attack does not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target of your first attack.
requirementHtml: Throwing Weapon, Set of Missiles or Thrown attack only.
requirementText: Throwing Weapon, Set of Missiles or Thrown attack only.

name: Stable Foundation
descriptionHtml: Make a crafting check, afterwards all future crafting dice for this session cannot roll below a 3.
descriptionText: Make a crafting check, afterwards all future crafting dice for this session cannot roll below a 3.
requirementHtml: Must be the first crafting dice in a crafting session. Costs 1 Crafting Dice
requirementText: Must be the first crafting dice in a crafting session. Costs 1 Crafting Dice

name: Staggering Slice
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you inflict Stagger 1 until the end of your next turn..

If you're under the effects of Exposing Edge, you inflict Stagger 2 on damage instead.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you inflict Stagger 1 until the end of your next turn..

If you're under the effects of Exposing Edge, you inflict Stagger 2 on damage instead.

requirementText: One-Handed weapons only.

name: Stalks of Comparison
descriptionHtml: Make a gathering check and apply it to either Node Points or Lucky Points. If the result of this check (before bonuses) is higher than your previous roll this session, gain a bonus to the result equal to your Foraging skill (max +10).
descriptionText: Make a gathering check and apply it to either Node Points or Lucky Points. If the result of this check (before bonuses) is higher than your previous roll this session, gain a bonus to the result equal to your Foraging skill (max +10).
requirementHtml: Costs 1 Strike Dice
requirementText: Costs 1 Strike Dice

name: Stardust Reverie
descriptionHtml:
Declare a distance up to the range of this spell. You create a celestial dome at that range from you that harm those that pass through it.

Until the start of your next turn, whenever a creature willingly enters that distance from you, you may make a Light attack against them that deals Arcane damage. You may choose to spend an RP before making this attack to make it a Heavy attack. A character that Sidesteps or Teleports through your stars does not provoke this attack.

Upkeep: 1 mana. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may change the distance of the stars.
descriptionText:
Declare a distance up to the range of this spell. You create a celestial dome at that range from you that harm those that pass through it.

Until the start of your next turn, whenever a creature willingly enters that distance from you, you may make a Light attack against them that deals Arcane damage. You may choose to spend an RP before making this attack to make it a Heavy attack. A character that Sidesteps or Teleports through your stars does not provoke this attack.

Upkeep: 1 mana. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may change the distance of the stars.

name: Starfall
descriptionHtml:
You target a 25x25 square within range. On the start of your next turn, 4 stars fall down in the area.

At the start of your next turn, you make 4 light attacks that deal Arcane damage, evenly divided amongst enemies in the area. If there are less enemies than stars, you may hit an enemy more than once (though you must still attempt to hit each enemy an equal amount of times if possible).

name: Starlance
descriptionHtml: You make a Precise attack against the target that deals Arcane damage.
descriptionText: You make a Precise attack against the target that deals Arcane damage.

name: Start Dash
descriptionHtml: You move up to your speed.
descriptionText: You move up to your speed.
requirementHtml: Must be the first action in your turn.
requirementText: Must be the first action in your turn.

name: Stasis
descriptionHtml: You put a Grunt level character or any willing ally into Stasis until the start of your next turn. While in Stasis, they cannot be affected by any ability, attack or anything similar but they also cannot take any actions.
descriptionText: You put a Grunt level character or any willing ally into Stasis until the start of your next turn. While in Stasis, they cannot be affected by any ability, attack or anything similar but they also cannot take any actions.

name: Static Discharge
descriptionHtml:
A single target in range must make a save or the Static stacks on them immediately discharge, triggering the Static effect as though it was the end of the target’s turn.

Whether the target succeeds at or fails the save, they lose all Static charges.
descriptionText:
A single target in range must make a save or the Static stacks on them immediately discharge, triggering the Static effect as though it was the end of the target’s turn.

Whether the target succeeds at or fails the save, they lose all Static charges.

name: Static Overload
descriptionHtml: A single target in range must make a save or immediately take Lightning damage equal to their Static and become inflicted with Daze.
descriptionText: A single target in range must make a save or immediately take Lightning damage equal to their Static and become inflicted with Daze.
requirementHtml: The target must be afflicted with Static you applied.
requirementText: The target must be afflicted with Static you applied.

name: Statue Form
descriptionHtml:
You turn yourself into a statue, petrifying yourself and the items on you. While in this mode, you gain a +5 bonus to your guard but cannot take any actions except Block. You may leave this mode by spending 0 AP.

You may rest as normal while in this form. While staying in this form, you do not need to eat.

You gain a +10 bonus to your Deception for convincing others that you are just a statue.

name: Status Assessment
descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.
descriptionText: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.

name: Status Assessment II
descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also assess any damage type weaknesses and strengths that the enemy has at the current time. You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.

descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP and RP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also assess any damage type weaknesses and strengths that the enemy has at the current time. You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.

name: Stay Here With Me!
descriptionHtml:
All allies within range heal for 8 HP.

Upkeep: 1 AP, 2 Mana. When you pay upkeep, you heal all allies for 8 HP again.
descriptionText:
All allies within range heal for 8 HP.

Upkeep: 1 AP, 2 Mana. When you pay upkeep, you heal all allies for 8 HP again.

name: Steadfast Earth Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter a stance that grants you the toughness of the earth. You gain a +2 bonus to your guard and a +6 bonus to your Block.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance.
descriptionText:
You enter a stance that grants you the toughness of the earth. You gain a +2 bonus to your guard and a +6 bonus to your Block.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance.

name: Steady Craft II
descriptionHtml: You add a crafting check to the item. The crafting dice is automatically a 7.
descriptionText: You add a crafting check to the item. The crafting dice is automatically a 7.

name: Steady Ground
descriptionHtml:
The target gains Immovable until the start of their next turn.

You may also use this for 2 AP instead.
descriptionText:
The target gains Immovable until the start of their next turn.

name: Steady Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter a Stance in which you become Immovable unless the enemy has more Power than you. If they do, you may pay an additional mana to retain the effect against them for that turn if they would prone you or knock you back.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance.
descriptionText:
You enter a Stance in which you become Immovable unless the enemy has more Power than you. If they do, you may pay an additional mana to retain the effect against them for that turn if they would prone you or knock you back.

This stance lasts until you enter a different stance.

name: Steal Heart
descriptionHtml:
The target must make a save or become Charmed until the end of the encounter.

If you use this on a Grunt level enemy and you charm them, you may choose their actions when it's their turn in addition to Charm’s normal effect.

You may only have 1 target charmed at the same time.
descriptionText:
The target must make a save or become Charmed until the end of the encounter.

If you use this on a Grunt level enemy and you charm them, you may choose their actions when it's their turn in addition to Charm’s normal effect.

You may only have 1 target charmed at the same time.

name: Steal Time
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you inflict Time Stolen, which lowers their Initiative by 1 and you gain Stolen Time, which increases yours by 1. This effect can stack both on you and on enemies.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you inflict Time Stolen, which lowers their Initiative by 1 and you gain Stolen Time, which increases yours by 1. This effect can stack both on you and on enemies.

name: Steel Aura
descriptionHtml: You gain Steel Aura, granting you 3 additional guard, but you can no longer use any RP actions besides Block and actions with the Rage keyword. You can end this effect at any time for 0 RP. This effect ends at the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You gain Steel Aura, granting you 3 additional guard, but you can no longer use any RP actions besides Block and actions with the Rage keyword. You can end this effect at any time for 0 RP. This effect ends at the start of your next turn.

name: Stolen Power
descriptionHtml:
Make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack that deals Arcane damage against the target. You use their Power for the damage calculation.

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText:
Make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack that deals Arcane damage against the target. You use their Power for the damage calculation.

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Stolen Skill
descriptionHtml:
You may name one skill (such as perception, athletics) and force the target enemy to make a save against your Potency. On failure, you steal their skill points spent into the skill until the end of the encounter or for 1 minute. You gain their skill points they have in that skill to your skill while they lose all of theirs.

Only affects skill points spent, not any other bonuses from abilities or stats.

Can not be used on artisan and gathering skills.

You may only have 1 instance of Stolen Skill active at the same time, but you may choose to drop your current stolen one for 0 AP.
descriptionText:
You may name one skill (such as perception, athletics) and force the target enemy to make a save against your Potency. On failure, you steal their skill points spent into the skill until the end of the encounter or for 1 minute. You gain their skill points they have in that skill to your skill while they lose all of theirs.

Only affects skill points spent, not any other bonuses from abilities or stats.

Can not be used on artisan and gathering skills.

You may only have 1 instance of Stolen Skill active at the same time, but you may choose to drop your current stolen one for 0 AP.

name: Stoneskin
descriptionHtml: You gain Stoneskin, which grants +1 guard and +4 block, but also -2 evasion and dodge.
descriptionText: You gain Stoneskin, which grants +1 guard and +4 block, but also -2 evasion and dodge.

name: Store Time
descriptionHtml: You gain Store Time, granting you 1 extra AP at the start of your next turn.
descriptionText: You gain Store Time, granting you 1 extra AP at the start of your next turn.

name: Strata Cut
descriptionHtml:
You make a Precise attack against the target. 

Combo: If used after Tectonic Overhead, the mana cost is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You make a Precise attack against the target.

Combo: If used after Tectonic Overhead, the mana cost is reduced by 1.

name: Stratagem: Lightning
descriptionHtml: All allied units (including yourself) gain +1 to Initiative and may immediately move up to their Speed.
descriptionText: All allied units (including yourself) gain +1 to Initiative and may immediately move up to their Speed.
range: All allies in sight, including yourself.

name: Strengthening the Bond
descriptionHtml:
You swap places with a willing ally. This movement does not trigger any attacks of opportunity. You cannot use this ability if it causes an ally unit to occupy an invalid space. Before or after the swap you can take a 5ft step, but the swap must occur.

You may spend either 0 AP or 1 RP to use this ability.
descriptionText:
You swap places with a willing ally. This movement does not trigger any attacks of opportunity. You cannot use this ability if it causes an ally unit to occupy an invalid space. Before or after the swap you can take a 5ft step, but the swap must occur.

You may spend either 0 AP or 1 RP to use this ability.
requirementHtml: A willing ally is within 10ft range.
requirementText: A willing ally is within 10ft range.

name: Strike of Still Water
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.

name: Study Target
descriptionHtml:
Your next basic attack against the target gains the Lock On keyword OR you apply Death Mark to the target.

Overcharge: You may spend 2 additional AP to instead make the next basic attack gain the Sure hit and Full Pierce keywords.
descriptionText:
Your next basic attack against the target gains the Lock On keyword OR you apply Death Mark to the target.

Overcharge: You may spend 2 additional AP to instead make the next basic attack gain the Sure hit and Full Pierce keywords.

name: Stygian Screen
descriptionHtml: You create a wall of darkness that is 20ft long, 5ft wide and 10ft high. This wall must be a straight line.  This wall blocks line of sight. Targets inside of the wall can only see 5ft away
descriptionText: You create a wall of darkness that is 20ft long, 5ft wide and 10ft high. This wall must be a straight line.  This wall blocks line of sight. Targets inside of the wall can only see 5ft away

name: Suckerpunch
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Unbalanced.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Unbalanced.

name: Sudden Growth
descriptionHtml: You trigger the healing of your Regrowth.
descriptionText: You trigger the healing of your Regrowth.
requirementHtml: An ally within range that has your Regrowth has taken damage from an enemy.
requirementText: An ally within range that has your Regrowth has taken damage from an enemy.

name: Summon Animal
descriptionHtml:
You summon a randomly chosen animal to a location you can see within range. The summon does not act by itself, but you may spend AP to make it act. The AP cost for these actions is the same as they would be for you taking the basic actions. (Example, you can spend 2 AP to make the summon do a Heavy attack).

The summon also gains access to the abilities the summoned creature normally has. The costs for these have to be paid by you, same as they would be for basic actions. Any attacks it makes are made with its own stats. When an animal summoned through this ability dies, you cannot use this ability again until the end of the encounter. You can undo the summoning manually for 0 AP.

The pool of creatures that can be summoned is the following: Wolf, Boar, Giant Spider.
descriptionText:
You summon a randomly chosen animal to a location you can see within range. The summon does not act by itself, but you may spend AP to make it act. The AP cost for these actions is the same as they would be for you taking the basic actions. (Example, you can spend 2 AP to make the summon do a Heavy attack).

The summon also gains access to the abilities the summoned creature normally has. The costs for these have to be paid by you, same as they would be for basic actions. Any attacks it makes are made with its own stats. When an animal summoned through this ability dies, you cannot use this ability again until the end of the encounter. You can undo the summoning manually for 0 AP.

The pool of creatures that can be summoned is the following: Wolf, Boar, Giant Spider.

name: Summon Lesser Eidolon
descriptionHtml:
Your contracted Eidolon hears your call and sends their minions to fight for you. The summon called and costs are dependent on your attunement. Lasts up to 5 minutes. You must pay the upkeep cost under the Summon’s Summon Skill or the Summon vanishes.

Unless the summon has a skill that says otherwise, a summon acts after you on initiative, but cannot act the round it is summoned except for RP actions.
descriptionText:
Your contracted Eidolon hears your call and sends their minions to fight for you. The summon called and costs are dependent on your attunement. Lasts up to 5 minutes. You must pay the upkeep cost under the Summon’s Summon Skill or the Summon vanishes.

Unless the summon has a skill that says otherwise, a summon acts after you on initiative, but cannot act the round it is summoned except for RP actions.

name: Summon Piece
descriptionHtml:
You summon a Pawn puppet under your control. It (and other puppets from this class) have HP equal to 20 + Focus, no evasion and no guard. These puppets are not living targets and are generally treated as structures rather than creatures.

They last until the end of the encounter.

Overcharge: You may spend extra mana to summon the following puppets instead:

1 Mana: Knight or Bishop

2 Mana: Rook

3 Mana: Queen
descriptionText:
You summon a Pawn puppet under your control. It (and other puppets from this class) have HP equal to 20 + Focus, no evasion and no guard. These puppets are not living targets and are generally treated as structures rather than creatures.

name: Swallow Acrobatics
descriptionHtml: Your next movement before the end of your turn does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionText: Your next movement before the end of your turn does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
requirementHtml: Can be used after you make a melee attack while flying.
requirementText: Can be used after you make a melee attack while flying.

name: Swap
descriptionHtml:
You Swap positions with a chosen willing ally or any non-heroic enemy.

You may use either AP or RP for this ability. You don't need to pay the cost of both.
descriptionText:
You Swap positions with a chosen willing ally or any non-heroic enemy.

You may use either AP or RP for this ability. You don't need to pay the cost of both.

name: Sweeping Stance
descriptionHtml:
You enter a stance in which you spin your weapon around in a circular motion and lash out against any enemy that approaches. When an enemy enters your weapon’s range you may make an Attack of Opportunity against them. An enemy moving while already being in your attack range does not provoke. Your weapon's range for these attacks of opportunities is increased by 5ft (This does not affect your normal threaten range).

The stance lasts until you make an attack that isn’t an Attack of Opportunity.
descriptionText:
You enter a stance in which you spin your weapon around in a circular motion and lash out against any enemy that approaches. When an enemy enters your weapon’s range you may make an Attack of Opportunity against them. An enemy moving while already being in your attack range does not provoke. Your weapon's range for these attacks of opportunities is increased by 5ft (This does not affect your normal threaten range).

The stance lasts until you make an attack that isn’t an Attack of Opportunity.
requirementHtml: Two-handed weapons only.
requirementText: Two-handed weapons only.

name: Sweet Dreams
descriptionHtml:
As a rest action, you may choose an ally other than yourself to heal for 5 + Toughness after their rest has finished.

Doesn't stack with Medical Kit.
descriptionText:
As a rest action, you may choose an ally other than yourself to heal for 5 + Toughness after their rest has finished.

Doesn't stack with Medical Kit.

name: Swift Wind Palm
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target is knocked down 30ft or until they hit the floor (on top of any other height loss from being hit while flying) and you may Sidestep next to them afterwards. 

A target knocked down on to the ground with this ability is knocked prone and takes falling damage as normal. They do not take the normal extra damage as result of being knocked into the floor.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target is knocked down 30ft or until they hit the floor (on top of any other height loss from being hit while flying) and you may Sidestep next to them afterwards.

A target knocked down on to the ground with this ability is knocked prone and takes falling damage as normal. They do not take the normal extra damage as result of being knocked into the floor.
requirementHtml: You and the target must be airborne
requirementText: You and the target must be airborne

name: Sword Riding Art
descriptionHtml:
You jump onto a light sword, versatile melee weapon, greatshield, bayonet musket or two-handed melee weapon you’re carrying and use it to move around. While riding on top of the sword, you gain Flight. You can fly this way for up to 5 minutes.

If you take damage while flying higher than 5ft above the ground, your altitude drops by 20ft. If this would reduce your altitude to the point where you touch the ground, you may hop off your weapon and put it back into your hand if possible for 0 RP. After this happens, your Sword Riding ends. If the attack that reduced your HP came from a flying creature other than yourself, you do not lose altitude but instead become unbalanced.

If you are knocked back by an effect, you must make a save against the attacker's potency. Else, you are blown off your sword.
descriptionText:
You jump onto a light sword, versatile melee weapon, greatshield, bayonet musket or two-handed melee weapon you’re carrying and use it to move around. While riding on top of the sword, you gain Flight. You can fly this way for up to 5 minutes.

If you take damage while flying higher than 5ft above the ground, your altitude drops by 20ft. If this would reduce your altitude to the point where you touch the ground, you may hop off your weapon and put it back into your hand if possible for 0 RP. After this happens, your Sword Riding ends. If the attack that reduced your HP came from a flying creature other than yourself, you do not lose altitude but instead become unbalanced.

If you are knocked back by an effect, you must make a save against the attacker's potency. Else, you are blown off your sword.
requirementHtml: Must have a Light Sword or two-handed melee weapon in your hand.
requirementText: Must have a Light Sword or two-handed melee weapon in your hand.

name: Tackle
descriptionHtml: You attempt to tackle the target and may make a Heavy Attack against them. This attack deals no damage. On hit and if the target did not use the Block action against this ability, you and the target fall Prone. If the target successfully dodges this ability, you fall Prone.
descriptionText: You attempt to tackle the target and may make a Heavy Attack against them. This attack deals no damage. On hit and if the target did not use the Block action against this ability, you and the target fall Prone. If the target successfully dodges this ability, you fall Prone.

name: Tag Rotation
range: Two ally units, or yourself and an ally unit  that are adjacent to each other that you can see.

name: Tailwind
descriptionHtml: You and all allies within 40ft gain Tailwind, which provides a +1 bonus to initiative and doubles movement speed in the first round of combat.
descriptionText: You and all allies within 40ft gain Tailwind, which provides a +1 bonus to initiative and doubles movement speed in the first round of combat.

name: Take it easy
descriptionHtml: Do not make a gathering check. Instead, immediately collect 25% of the Outcrop’s base material as a bonus (doesn’t affect material totals), but no Node or Lucky progress is made.
descriptionText: Do not make a gathering check. Instead, immediately collect 25% of the Outcrop’s base material as a bonus (doesn’t affect material totals), but no Node or Lucky progress is made.
requirementHtml: Must in a gathering session.
requirementText: Must in a gathering session.

name: Take Off
descriptionHtml:
Immediately mount and blast off into the sky equal to double your movement. 

Cannot be used if you are the target of an attack during the Encounter Start round.
descriptionText:
Immediately mount and blast off into the sky equal to double your movement.

Cannot be used if you are the target of an attack during the Encounter Start round.
requirementHtml: Aerial Stave in Combat Inventory
requirementText: Aerial Stave in Combat Inventory

name: Talisman Recursion
descriptionHtml:
After using a Talisman, you may immediately spend the cost of that talisman (before reductions) to repeat the effect without consuming another talisman. If the talisman had a target, you must choose the same target.

Does not work with Secret Talismans.
descriptionText:
After using a Talisman, you may immediately spend the cost of that talisman (before reductions) to repeat the effect without consuming another talisman. If the talisman had a target, you must choose the same target.

Does not work with Secret Talismans.

name: Tap Cracker
descriptionHtml:
You open a door or interact with an object remotely.  You can cast this through a creature affected by Mind Connection.  

Overcharge: You can pay 1 mana to magically unlock most doors and objects (DM can decide if an object is too complicated, and still make you roll a Skill Check).
descriptionText:
You open a door or interact with an object remotely.  You can cast this through a creature affected by Mind Connection.

Overcharge: You can pay 1 mana to magically unlock most doors and objects (DM can decide if an object is too complicated, and still make you roll a Skill Check).
requirementHtml: Object is in a room affected by Psychometry
requirementText: Object is in a room affected by Psychometry

name: Tectonic Overhead
descriptionHtml: You make a slow, powerful overhead swing and make a Heavy attack against the target. Their evasion (but not dodge) is doubled for this attack.
descriptionText: You make a slow, powerful overhead swing and make a Heavy attack against the target. Their evasion (but not dodge) is doubled for this attack.

name: Tempestuous Fire Stance
descriptionHtml: You enter the Tempestuous Fire Stance. While in this Stance, before you make an attack with the Unarmed Strike keyword, you may choose to move 5ft per AP spent on the move. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. This Stance lasts until you enter a different stance or until you move, with the exceptions of this ability and movement abilities with the Unarmed Strike keyword. Making an attack does not cancel this stance.
descriptionText: You enter the Tempestuous Fire Stance. While in this Stance, before you make an attack with the Unarmed Strike keyword, you may choose to move 5ft per AP spent on the move. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. This Stance lasts until you enter a different stance or until you move, with the exceptions of this ability and movement abilities with the Unarmed Strike keyword. Making an attack does not cancel this stance.

name: Tengu Aura Weapon
descriptionHtml: Your infuse your weapons with fiend killing aura, making them equivalent to Silver weapons for the purposes of harming fiends. Attacking a fiend with a silver weapon disables their regeneration.
descriptionText: Your infuse your weapons with fiend killing aura, making them equivalent to Silver weapons for the purposes of harming fiends. Attacking a fiend with a silver weapon disables their regeneration.

name: Tengu Mask
descriptionHtml: You manifest and don a Tengu Mask of your desired design, granting Presence Concealment.   You cannot use any mana abilities or Aura abilities while in Presence Concealment.  You can end this effect for 1 AP or 1 RP, to either remove your mask or to wear it on your head in a way that doesn't cover your face.
descriptionText: You manifest and don a Tengu Mask of your desired design, granting Presence Concealment.   You cannot use any mana abilities or Aura abilities while in Presence Concealment.  You can end this effect for 1 AP or 1 RP, to either remove your mask or to wear it on your head in a way that doesn't cover your face.

name: Terracing
descriptionHtml:
You raise the ground around you in a 25x25ft square centered on yourself. The ground is raised upwards by 10ft. Can only be used on natural ground and cannot be used on ground that’s already been raised.

Overcharge: You may spend 1 AP and 1 Mana to raise it upwards by another 10ft.
descriptionText:
You raise the ground around you in a 25x25ft square centered on yourself. The ground is raised upwards by 10ft. Can only be used on natural ground and cannot be used on ground that’s already been raised.

Overcharge: You may spend 1 AP and 1 Mana to raise it upwards by another 10ft.

name: Tetsuzanko
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals additional Light Damage added to the Heavy Damage. Combo: If used after an ability that moved the target, you may push the target for an equal distance again.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals additional Light Damage added to the Heavy Damage. Combo: If used after an ability that moved the target, you may push the target for an equal distance again.

name: Thanergetic Bloom
descriptionHtml: You summon a temporary Zombie as if you used Raise Undead. It disappears at the end of the encounter (or immediately if used outside of an encounter).
descriptionText: You summon a temporary Zombie as if you used Raise Undead. It disappears at the end of the encounter (or immediately if used outside of an encounter).

name: Thermal Quench
descriptionHtml: You make a crafting check. For each time you rolled a 5 or higher this craft, this check gains a +1 bonus.
descriptionText: You make a crafting check. For each time you rolled a 5 or higher this craft, this check gains a +1 bonus.
requirementHtml: Must be in a crafting session.
requirementText: Must be in a crafting session.

name: Thermal Vision
descriptionHtml: You can perfectly see and detect heat sources up to 120ft away, including stealthed creatures. This cannot detect things hidden by magical means. You can no longer discern a difference in heat once something reaches freezing temperatures.
descriptionText: You can perfectly see and detect heat sources up to 120ft away, including stealthed creatures. This cannot detect things hidden by magical means. You can no longer discern a difference in heat once something reaches freezing temperatures.

name: Thick Skull
descriptionHtml: When you would get Dazed, you may make a Save against the effect even if it would normally not allow for one. If you already had to make a save to avoid it, then you don’t get another.
descriptionText: When you would get Dazed, you may make a Save against the effect even if it would normally not allow for one. If you already had to make a save to avoid it, then you don’t get another.

name: This is our moment!
descriptionHtml:
All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their damage rolls. This bonus is doubled on Heavy attacks.

Upkeep: 1 AP
descriptionText:
All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their damage rolls. This bonus is doubled on Heavy attacks.

Upkeep: 1 AP

name: Throw Potion
descriptionHtml: You throw a Potion in your hands at a willing ally unit within range. The unit may pay the mana cost (if any) to receive the effect of the Potion.
descriptionText: You throw a Potion in your hands at a willing ally unit within range. The unit may pay the mana cost (if any) to receive the effect of the Potion.

name: Thunderstorm
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack that deals Lightning damage against all target enemies in range. As the attack comes from the sky, any cover is calculated from above the target rather than from your path to the target.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack that deals Lightning damage against all target enemies in range. As the attack comes from the sky, any cover is calculated from above the target rather than from your path to the target.

name: Timberwright's Core Crafting
descriptionHtml:
Carpenter's Modification B
Cost: X Crafting Points
Description: 
You add an B-Type modification to the weapon or tool. See the Universal Weapon page as well as the individual weapon page for details. Each modification has its own cost.
descriptionText:
Carpenter's Modification B
Cost: X Crafting Points
Description:
You add an B-Type modification to the weapon or tool. See the Universal Weapon page as well as the individual weapon page for details. Each modification has its own cost.

name: Tiny Pixie
descriptionHtml:
Your size is tiny and you are able to occupy the same square as an ally or enemy. Your Toughness is reduced by 2 and your Agility is increased by 2.

When walking (and not hovering or flying), your movement speed is reduced to 5ft.
descriptionText:
Your size is tiny and you are able to occupy the same square as an ally or enemy. Your Toughness is reduced by 2 and your Agility is increased by 2.

When walking (and not hovering or flying), your movement speed is reduced to 5ft.

name: Torture Techniques
descriptionHtml: You twist the knife and inflict a debilitating wound on the enemy. You inflict one of the following conditions: Slowed, Unbalanced or Bleeding. These last until the end of the target’s next turn.
descriptionText: You twist the knife and inflict a debilitating wound on the enemy. You inflict one of the following conditions: Slowed, Unbalanced or Bleeding. These last until the end of the target’s next turn.
requirementHtml: You landed a crit on the enemy (and it wasn't blocked or dodged).
requirementText: You landed a crit on the enemy (and it wasn't blocked or dodged).

name: Toxic Blast
descriptionHtml: You fire a stream of poison and make a Light attack against the target. On hit, this deals no damage but inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.
descriptionText: You fire a stream of poison and make a Light attack against the target. On hit, this deals no damage but inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.

name: Trail Mix
descriptionHtml: For a camp action you create up to 5 servings of a trail meal.  It costs 20u of food per serving and only gives 1 mana (0 for Mirane), but it keeps starvation away.  Does not require a culinary kit, and does not count as cooking for the purposes of culinary actions such as using stocks.
descriptionText: For a camp action you create up to 5 servings of a trail meal.  It costs 20u of food per serving and only gives 1 mana (0 for Mirane), but it keeps starvation away.  Does not require a culinary kit, and does not count as cooking for the purposes of culinary actions such as using stocks.
requirementHtml: 20u of Food Per Serving
requirementText: 20u of Food Per Serving

name: Trailblazer
descriptionHtml: You move up to your speed. Any allies within 30ft of where you started moving may spend 1 RP to move up to twice their speed towards you. They ignore the effects of natural difficult terrain for this movement.
descriptionText: You move up to your speed. Any allies within 30ft of where you started moving may spend 1 RP to move up to twice their speed towards you. They ignore the effects of natural difficult terrain for this movement.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted and meet the requirements of your Light Cavalry key ability.
requirementText: Must be mounted and meet the requirements of your Light Cavalry key ability.

name: Trample
descriptionHtml:
You may activate this after moving at least 20ft in a movement action to gain Trample until you stop moving. Abilities with the Teleport keyword do not apply for this, but declaring multiple AP to move at the same time counts as 1 action. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and you can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against them with your mount, using your mount’s stats. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

Each enemy can only be affected by trample once per activation of the ability, regardless of whether they are attacked or move out of it.
descriptionText:
You may activate this after moving at least 20ft in a movement action to gain Trample until you stop moving. Abilities with the Teleport keyword do not apply for this, but declaring multiple AP to move at the same time counts as 1 action. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and you can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against them with your mount, using your mount’s stats. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

Each enemy can only be affected by trample once per activation of the ability, regardless of whether they are attacked or move out of it.
requirementHtml: Must be mounted.
requirementText: Must be mounted.

name: Transfusion
descriptionHtml:
You lose HP up to your Toughness x 2. Target ally within range heals for the same amount of HP you lost.

This HP loss cannot be mitigated in any way and ignores temporary HP. This does not trigger effects that would trigger upon taking damage.
descriptionText:
You lose HP up to your Toughness x 2. Target ally within range heals for the same amount of HP you lost.

This HP loss cannot be mitigated in any way and ignores temporary HP. This does not trigger effects that would trigger upon taking damage.

name: Transmutation Basics
descriptionHtml:
Alchemic Catch
Description: 
Co-Craft. Use a hasty transmutation to attempt to fix a crafting error. You may reroll a crafting dice immediately after determining the result. You must keep the second number. Cannot be used for the last crafting dice.

Temperature Shock
Description: 
Co-Craft. Can be used immediately after the result of a roll is determined. The previous action has no effect and instead gain a +10 to your next crafting action.

Rage Quit
Cost: 1 Crafting Dice
Description: 
Co-Craft. Only usable once per crafting IP.  Destroy the uncrafted item and all materials invested into the craft.  You may immediately start another crafting session.  If you use this as a Co-Craft it requires 1 crafting dice from the main crafter.

Bouncing Ideas
Description:
Co-Craft. You assist with crafting adding 1d4 crafting points to the current craft.

Create Ingot
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create an ingot from blacksmithing base materials or from blacksmithing special materials.  See Item:  Blacksmithing Materials.

Create Oil Coating
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create an Oil Coating from Carpenter materials.  See Items:  Carpenter Materials

Create Wood Block
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create a Wood Block from Carpenter materials.  See Items:  Carpenter Materials

Craft Fuel Shells
Cost: Errand
Description: 
You craft up to 5 small shells.  You can instead craft a medium shell instead of 2 small shells.  Small shells require 50 magical fuel, medium shells require 200 magical fuel.

Create Artifice Parts
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create up to 3000u of artifice parts of the same type of blacksmithing material used to make them at a 1:1 rate. (3000u of Iron Creates 3000u of Iron Artifice Parts.)  See Items:  Blacksmithing Materials, Artificer Materials. When converting items of a higher tier, you can convert up to 6000 of tamahagane, 9000 of mithril, 12000 of Orihalcum or 15000 of escudo.

Tan Leather
Cost: Errand
Description: 
You create a tanned hide from armorsmithing base leather materials. See item: Armorsmthing materials.

Create Box or Bundle of Food
Cost: Errand.
Description: 
You create a perfect mix of ingredients that would be worthy of a stock with 500u of matching material.  Example:  500u of Meat can make 1 Box of Fresh Meat.  You can make 5 boxes of any kind for one errand action.
descriptionText:
Alchemic Catch
Description:
Co-Craft. Use a hasty transmutation to attempt to fix a crafting error. You may reroll a crafting dice immediately after determining the result. You must keep the second number. Cannot be used for the last crafting dice.

Temperature Shock
Description:
Co-Craft. Can be used immediately after the result of a roll is determined. The previous action has no effect and instead gain a +10 to your next crafting action.

Rage Quit
Cost: 1 Crafting Dice
Description:
Co-Craft. Only usable once per crafting IP.  Destroy the uncrafted item and all materials invested into the craft.  You may immediately start another crafting session.  If you use this as a Co-Craft it requires 1 crafting dice from the main crafter.

Bouncing Ideas
Description:
Co-Craft. You assist with crafting adding 1d4 crafting points to the current craft.

Create Ingot
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create an ingot from blacksmithing base materials or from blacksmithing special materials.  See Item:  Blacksmithing Materials.

Create Oil Coating
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create an Oil Coating from Carpenter materials.  See Items:  Carpenter Materials

Create Wood Block
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create a Wood Block from Carpenter materials.  See Items:  Carpenter Materials

Craft Fuel Shells
Cost: Errand
Description:
You craft up to 5 small shells.  You can instead craft a medium shell instead of 2 small shells.  Small shells require 50 magical fuel, medium shells require 200 magical fuel.

Create Artifice Parts
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create up to 3000u of artifice parts of the same type of blacksmithing material used to make them at a 1:1 rate. (3000u of Iron Creates 3000u of Iron Artifice Parts.)  See Items:  Blacksmithing Materials, Artificer Materials. When converting items of a higher tier, you can convert up to 6000 of tamahagane, 9000 of mithril, 12000 of Orihalcum or 15000 of escudo.

Tan Leather
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create a tanned hide from armorsmithing base leather materials. See item: Armorsmthing materials.

Create Box or Bundle of Food
Cost: Errand.
Description:
You create a perfect mix of ingredients that would be worthy of a stock with 500u of matching material.  Example:  500u of Meat can make 1 Box of Fresh Meat.  You can make 5 boxes of any kind for one errand action.

name: Transmute Effective Implement
descriptionHtml:
From the surrounding material you construct an Effective Implement, granting you a +5 to the skill of your choice.  You must explain how this implement will be effective towards the check using the relevant skill (example:  creating a springboard to jump higher with athletics) and the GM determines the validity or this ability has no effect.  Does not work with crafting or gathering skills. This implement lasts until you have attempted the specific check it was created for. 

You may also spend 1 RP instead of 1 AP for this ability.

Overcharge:  You can spend 1 additional mana to increase the skill bonus to +10.
descriptionText:
From the surrounding material you construct an Effective Implement, granting you a +5 to the skill of your choice.  You must explain how this implement will be effective towards the check using the relevant skill (example:  creating a springboard to jump higher with athletics) and the GM determines the validity or this ability has no effect.  Does not work with crafting or gathering skills. This implement lasts until you have attempted the specific check it was created for.

You may also spend 1 RP instead of 1 AP for this ability.

Overcharge:  You can spend 1 additional mana to increase the skill bonus to +10.

name: Transmute Terrain
descriptionHtml:
Creates a connected transmuted terrain that grows from the point of origin.  For every mana spent, you can create up to 4 5ft squares of terrain that must be connected.  Choose solid ground normal terrain or difficult terrain.  Removes effects on the terrain such as ice, fire. The terrain can push objects and creatures in the direction its being created.  If the transmute terrain deals damage to a creature, the spell stops after and the 5ft segment that contacted them is destroyed.  Each segment of wall has HP equal to 20+Focus

Heroics caught in the terrain may spend 1 RP to step out of it. Once they do, they can't be shoved within this use of transmute terrain even if you attempt to hit them with it again.

name: Transmute Wall
descriptionHtml: You quickly transmute multiple walls to defend against an incoming ranged attack.   Each wall you summon reduces the damage of the incoming attack by 2* Focus, you can summon as many walls as you like against the incoming attack for 1 mana per wall. After the attack resolves, every wall you made vanishes regardless of remaining HP.
descriptionText: You quickly transmute multiple walls to defend against an incoming ranged attack.   Each wall you summon reduces the damage of the incoming attack by 2* Focus, you can summon as many walls as you like against the incoming attack for 1 mana per wall. After the attack resolves, every wall you made vanishes regardless of remaining HP.
requirementHtml: You or an ally in range is the target of a ranged attack.
requirementText: You or an ally in range is the target of a ranged attack.

name: Transmute Weapon
descriptionHtml:
Using the available materials around you, you transmute any basic weapon or shield into your hand or next to an ally, your ally can grab the weapon at the time of its creation for 0 RP, as well as sheathe their weapons.  The weapon lasts until the end of the encounter and is destroyed.

You can transmute weapons out of special material if there is enough of it in the area, or if you have one (such as an ingot) but the material is destroyed afterwards.  The DM determines if this is possible in the specific case.
