You can transmute weapons out of special material if there is enough of it in the area, or if you have one (such as an ingot) but the material is destroyed afterwards.  The DM determines if this is possible in the specific case.
requirementHtml: There is suitable material available. (GM decides)
requirementText: There is suitable material available. (GM decides)

name: Transmuter Tricks
descriptionHtml:
Stabilize Matter
Description: 
Co-Craft. Use a transmutation that stabilizes the material, making it easier to work with. The next crafting d10 cannot roll lower than a 6.

A Small Bit of Creation
Cost: One herb with a rarity higher than common.
Description:
You deconstruct and reconstruct the structure of an harvested alchemy herb. By lowering its energy level you attune an herb to another element. Choose one herb and lower its rarity by one step and then change its element into the element of your choice.

name: Traveler's End
descriptionHtml:
You play the final tunes of the melody that signals the traveler’s ending. 

While Traveler’s End remains active, the Potency of your Mist of the Vale and Despair of Isolation is increased by 3. Your Mist of the Vale can no longer be removed and any effect that would remove it instead dispels Traveler’s End.

At any point after activating this song, you may spend 1 RP and 5 Mana to make a Sure Hit Heavy attack against all enemies within your Mist of the Vale. On killing blow, you regain 1 mana you spend on the attack (up to 5). Afterwards, the Mist of the Vale ends and cannot be reused in this encounter.

Traveler’s End otherwise lasts until the end of the encounter or until the Mist of the Vale is gone.

Upkeep: 1 Mana
descriptionText:

requirementHtml: Mist of the Vale must be active for at least 1 turn.
requirementText: Mist of the Vale must be active for at least 1 turn.

name: Tremorsense
descriptionHtml:
You become aware of the presence and exact location of any creature within range that is touching the ground until the end of your turn.

Overcharge: You may spend extra mana to increase the range by an additional 40ft per mana spent.
descriptionText:
You become aware of the presence and exact location of any creature within range that is touching the ground until the end of your turn.

name: Trial By Fire
descriptionHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, they are challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

 If this does not deal damage, they cannot be challenged by you until the start of your next turn.
descriptionText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, they are challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

 If this does not deal damage, they cannot be challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

name: True Divine Release
descriptionHtml: You unleash your latent angelic powers and transform into a semi-divine being for up to an hour. While transformed, you gain controlled flight and +5 movement speed. Upkeep: 2 mana After using this ability, you cannot do so again until the interlude rest phase.
descriptionText: You unleash your latent angelic powers and transform into a semi-divine being for up to an hour. While transformed, you gain controlled flight and +5 movement speed. Upkeep: 2 mana After using this ability, you cannot do so again until the interlude rest phase.

name: Twin Verdict
descriptionHtml: You make two Heavy attacks against the target.
descriptionText: You make two Heavy attacks against the target.

name: Twinkle Step
descriptionHtml:
All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their Evasion and Dodge.

Upkeep: 1 AP
descriptionText:
All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their Evasion and Dodge.

Upkeep: 1 AP

name: Two Point Strike
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you apply Wave Palm I. 

Wave Palm increases the mana cost of the afflicted target’s next action that uses mana by an amount equal to the amount of stacks applied. If the triggering attack makes the number of total stacks exceed the target's current mana, they lose mana equal to the amount of total stacks and take true damage equal to triple this amount. Wave Palm does not stack with itself, use only the higher value.

If the target has no mana, they immediately take true damage as if their stacks exceeded their current mana.

When the Wave Palm effect triggers, either by increasing the mana cost or by dealing the true damage, the Wave Palm effect is removed.

If the target has no mana, they immediately take true damage as if their stacks exceeded their current mana.

When the Wave Palm effect triggers, either by increasing the mana cost or by dealing the true damage, the Wave Palm effect is removed.

name: Two Sword Crush
descriptionHtml: You may add your Light damage to the attack.
descriptionText: You may add your Light damage to the attack.
requirementHtml: Can be used after hitting an attack with a Two-Handed melee weapon. Must be dual wielding a second Two-Handed melee weapon.
requirementText: Can be used after hitting an attack with a Two-Handed melee weapon. Must be dual wielding a second Two-Handed melee weapon.

name: Uke Nagashi
descriptionHtml: Roll Heavy Damage and treat that as your Block against the attack that’s targeting you. If you reduce the damage to 0, the attacker becomes Unbalanced. On hit effects and maces do not gain their effect if you reduce the damage to 0. After the attack is resolved, you may immediately make an Iai Strike against the attacker for 0 RP. This Iai Strike gains the Sure Hit keyword against an Unbalanced target.
descriptionText: Roll Heavy Damage and treat that as your Block against the attack that’s targeting you. If you reduce the damage to 0, the attacker becomes Unbalanced. On hit effects and maces do not gain their effect if you reduce the damage to 0. After the attack is resolved, you may immediately make an Iai Strike against the attacker for 0 RP. This Iai Strike gains the Sure Hit keyword against an Unbalanced target.
requirementHtml: Katana only, target of a melee attack and must be in the Iai state.
requirementText: Katana only, target of a melee attack and must be in the Iai state.

name: Unconventional Weapon
descriptionHtml: You may treat the weapon you’re currently wielding as a weapon of a different group for the next attack in addition to its normal group. In addition to receiving the base weapon properties of both weapon groups, this allows it to meet the requirements of abilities that require a certain group, and allows you to change its damage type to the chosen weapon’s damage type. The GM may rule that some abilities still cannot be performed with your equipped weapon.

In addition to receiving the base weapon properties of both weapon groups, this allows it to meet the requirements of abilities that require a certain group, and allows you to change its damage type to the chosen weapon’s damage type. The GM may rule that some abilities still cannot be performed with your equipped weapon.

name: Undying Justice
descriptionHtml: If the damage would reduce your HP to 0 or lower, it instead lowers your HP to 1.
descriptionText: If the damage would reduce your HP to 0 or lower, it instead lowers your HP to 1.
requirementHtml: You take damage. Your HP is higher than 1.
requirementText: You take damage. Your HP is higher than 1.

name: Unholy Pact
descriptionHtml: You remove your Bone Armor to heal yourself for Power x 2 and gain a +2 Power bonus on your next attack.
descriptionText: You remove your Bone Armor to heal yourself for Power x 2 and gain a +2 Power bonus on your next attack.
requirementHtml: Bone Armor is active on you.
requirementText: Bone Armor is active on you.

name: Unmake
descriptionHtml: You target one magically created wall or unattended object within range. You instantly destroy a 5x5 square of it or the object entirely.
descriptionText: You target one magically created wall or unattended object within range. You instantly destroy a 5x5 square of it or the object entirely.

name: Unrelenting Assault
descriptionHtml:
You may use this ability when an enemy willingly moves out of your melee weapon range to make a Heavy attack against them. You can use this even if they took the disengage action or a similar action that would not make them provoke attacks of opportunity. If the target uses a teleport type move, then you cannot use this ability, unless they Teleport into your weapon range.

This is treated as an opportunity attack.

You can use this even if they took the disengage action or a similar action that would not make them provoke attacks of opportunity. If the target uses a teleport type move, then you cannot use this ability, unless they Teleport into your weapon range.

This is treated as an opportunity attack.

name: Unsummon
descriptionHtml:
Unsummon your Eidolon or Lesser Eidolon.  Recover mana equal to half of the mana cost of the summon cost.

You may use this as an Encounter Conclusion action.
descriptionText:
Unsummon your Eidolon or Lesser Eidolon.  Recover mana equal to half of the mana cost of the summon cost.

You may use this as an Encounter Conclusion action.
requirementHtml: You have an active Eidolon or Lesser Eidolon.
requirementText: You have an active Eidolon or Lesser Eidolon.

name: Until My Voice Breaks
descriptionHtml:
Whenever you’re about to pay mana on one of your abilities with the Idol keyword, you may instead reduce your current and max HP by 8 for each mana you’d spend.

This max HP reduction lasts until the end of the encounter and cannot be removed.
descriptionText:
Whenever you’re about to pay mana on one of your abilities with the Idol keyword, you may instead reduce your current and max HP by 8 for each mana you’d spend.

This max HP reduction lasts until the end of the encounter and cannot be removed.

name: Vampire Bite
descriptionHtml:
You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you drain 1 mana from the target, recovering 1 mana yourself. If the target has no mana remaining, you instead deal an additional Light damage.

This unarmed strike must be made with your fangs, but may be made even with both hands full.

Damage done by this ability also reduces the target’s max HP until the target finishes a rest.

A target reduced to 0 HP by this ability is killed and if the target was a heroic unit, it has a chance (GM’s decision) to turn into a vampire subservient to you.

If the target has any mana remaining and is a willing target, you may choose to not deal damage with this attack.
descriptionText:
You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you drain 1 mana from the target, recovering 1 mana yourself. If the target has no mana remaining, you instead deal an additional Light damage.

This unarmed strike must be made with your fangs, but may be made even with both hands full.

Damage done by this ability also reduces the target’s max HP until the target finishes a rest.

A target reduced to 0 HP by this ability is killed and if the target was a heroic unit, it has a chance (GM’s decision) to turn into a vampire subservient to you.

If the target has any mana remaining and is a willing target, you may choose to not deal damage with this attack.

name: Vampire Shapeshift
descriptionHtml:
You are able to change your form to that of a rat or bat.

While in this form, your size changes to that of the chosen animal and you are treated as a normal animal of that type. You cannot make any attacks or use any abilities while in this form.

You may exit this form at any time for 0 RP.
descriptionText:
You are able to change your form to that of a rat or bat.

While in this form, your size changes to that of the chosen animal and you are treated as a normal animal of that type. You cannot make any attacks or use any abilities while in this form.

You may exit this form at any time for 0 RP.

name: Vampiric Domination
descriptionHtml:
You mentally dominate the target. The target immediately considers you their master and they will serve you like a loyal servant. You may command them and they will obey most commands. Any command that is obviously suicidal or completely goes against their nature (for example: telling a servant to jump off a cliff or to kill their own child) will end the domination prematurely. This effect lasts until dispelled, they die or until you use Vampiric Domination on another target.

After the effect ends, the target will remember everything it was forced to do while it was your servant and it cannot be affected by Vampiric Domination again for a year.
descriptionText:
You mentally dominate the target. The target immediately considers you their master and they will serve you like a loyal servant. You may command them and they will obey most commands. Any command that is obviously suicidal or completely goes against their nature (for example: telling a servant to jump off a cliff or to kill their own child) will end the domination prematurely. This effect lasts until dispelled, they die or until you use Vampiric Domination on another target.

After the effect ends, the target will remember everything it was forced to do while it was your servant and it cannot be affected by Vampiric Domination again for a year.
requirementHtml: Target must be under the effects of Vampiric Fascination
requirementText: Target must be under the effects of Vampiric Fascination

name: Vampiric Fascination
descriptionHtml:
You charm a non-heroic creature within range. While charmed, the target must spend its AP during its turns on moving towards you in the most direct path possible while avoiding any dangers it is aware of. If it is already next to you, it instead takes no actions.

At the start of your next turn, you may spend 4 AP to continue the charm. If so, the charm continues until you stop paying the AP cost or until the target takes damage from an attack other than a Vampire Bite.

While you have a target under the influence of Vampiric Fascination, your Vampire Bite costs 0 AP and has Sure Hit plus Full Pierce against that target the first time you use it each turn.
descriptionText:
You charm a non-heroic creature within range. While charmed, the target must spend its AP during its turns on moving towards you in the most direct path possible while avoiding any dangers it is aware of. If it is already next to you, it instead takes no actions.

At the start of your next turn, you may spend 4 AP to continue the charm. If so, the charm continues until you stop paying the AP cost or until the target takes damage from an attack other than a Vampire Bite.

While you have a target under the influence of Vampiric Fascination, your Vampire Bite costs 0 AP and has Sure Hit plus Full Pierce against that target the first time you use it each turn.
requirementHtml: Target must be able to see or hear you, Target must be non-heroic.
requirementText: Target must be able to see or hear you, Target must be non-heroic.

name: Vanish
descriptionHtml:
You gain the Hiding state from anyone you have cover or concealment from.

During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.
descriptionText:
You gain the Hiding state from anyone you have cover or concealment from.

During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.

name: Vengeance
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. If your VIP is at 0 HP or lower, this attack gains Lock On and Guard Crush.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. If your VIP is at 0 HP or lower, this attack gains Lock On and Guard Crush.
requirementHtml: Your VIP was attacked last turn and you re-directed an attack from them to you or your VIP is downed.
requirementText: Your VIP was attacked last turn and you re-directed an attack from them to you or your VIP is downed.

name: Venom Strike
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.
requirementHtml: Must be made with a melee weapon or with a Set of Missiles, Throwing Weapon or Thrown attack with small weapon only.
requirementText: Must be made with a melee weapon or with a Set of Missiles, Throwing Weapon or Thrown attack with small weapon only.

name: Verdant Instinct
descriptionHtml: Make a gathering check and apply it to NP. After rolling, roll two more dice that will be used as your next 2 strike dice values. You may reorder them or replace one with a 5.
descriptionText: Make a gathering check and apply it to NP. After rolling, roll two more dice that will be used as your next 2 strike dice values. You may reorder them or replace one with a 5.
requirementHtml: Must be in a gathering session.
requirementText: Must be in a gathering session.

name: VIP Protection
descriptionHtml:
You change the target of the attack to you instead of your VIP.

This attack automatically hits you and you may not use the Dodge and Block or similar reactions against it. 

The re-directed attack is treated as having most the requirements met as if it was still targeting the original target, including effects that are conditional such as Full Pierce on a downed target, and you are considered to be in the original target's spot for the purposes of range of the attack you're re-directing. 

GM's may rule some conditional effects are based on you rather than the original target, such as attacks with effects based on race.

Does not work against Attacks of Opportunity and cannot be used against an attack that's already redirected.
descriptionText:

GM's may rule some conditional effects are based on you rather than the original target, such as attacks with effects based on race.

Does not work against Attacks of Opportunity and cannot be used against an attack that's already redirected.
requirementHtml: Your VIP is within 5ft of you and is the target of an attack that does not target you as well.
requirementText: Your VIP is within 5ft of you and is the target of an attack that does not target you as well.

name: Vital Drain
descriptionHtml:
You make a Precise Attack against the target creature that deals Earth damage equal to their Toughness with Full Pierce.  On damage the current host of Spore Symbiote is healed for the damage dealt.

Vital Drain can be casted from the location of the host of your Spore Symbiote.
descriptionText:
You make a Precise Attack against the target creature that deals Earth damage equal to their Toughness with Full Pierce.  On damage the current host of Spore Symbiote is healed for the damage dealt.

Vital Drain can be casted from the location of the host of your Spore Symbiote.

name: Vital Drive
descriptionHtml: You regain HP equal to 5 times the mana spent.
descriptionText: You regain HP equal to 5 times the mana spent.

name: Vital Drive II
descriptionHtml: You regain HP equal to five times the mana spent. Vital Drive II cannot heal more than the damage you took from the triggering attack.
descriptionText: You regain HP equal to five times the mana spent. Vital Drive II cannot heal more than the damage you took from the triggering attack.

name: Vivisect
descriptionHtml: You cut the target in half with your scissors or chainsaw, killing them instantly.
descriptionText: You cut the target in half with your scissors or chainsaw, killing them instantly.
requirementHtml: Giant Scissors or Chainsaw only. Target is affected by Expose and is a grunt.
requirementText: Giant Scissors or Chainsaw only. Target is affected by Expose and is a grunt.

name: Volley
descriptionHtml: You make a Light attack against all targets in a 25x25ft area.
descriptionText: You make a Light attack against all targets in a 25x25ft area.

name: Wall Formation
descriptionHtml: Until the start of your next turn, every ally within range gains Wall Formation. If they are adjacent to another ally gains a +1 bonus to their guard and a +4 bonus to their block value.
descriptionText: Until the start of your next turn, every ally within range gains Wall Formation. If they are adjacent to another ally gains a +1 bonus to their guard and a +4 bonus to their block value.

name: Weapon Maintenance
descriptionHtml:
You recall having previously assisted an ally in maintaining their weapon, causing it to be in top shape for battle. This weapon gains a +1 Power Material Bonus or +1 Focus Material Bonus. If you smithed the weapon it gains both. This Artisan bonus is considered the same bonus as from a weapon's material like Tamahagane and does not stack with it.

If the weapon you choose gets no bonus from this ability, it's critical range instead improves by 1. (A normal weapon now crits on a 19 and 20, a katana on a 18, 19 and 20).
descriptionText:
You recall having previously assisted an ally in maintaining their weapon, causing it to be in top shape for battle. This weapon gains a +1 Power Material Bonus or +1 Focus Material Bonus. If you smithed the weapon it gains both. This Artisan bonus is considered the same bonus as from a weapon's material like Tamahagane and does not stack with it.

If the weapon you choose gets no bonus from this ability, it's critical range instead improves by 1. (A normal weapon now crits on a 19 and 20, a katana on a 18, 19 and 20).
requirementHtml: 1 Ally’s Smithed Weapon, or your own smithed weapon.
requirementText: 1 Ally’s Smithed Weapon, or your own smithed weapon.

name: Weighing the Heart
descriptionHtml: You get a +5 Expertise bonus to insight checks when looking to discern if someone is lying to you.
descriptionText: You get a +5 Expertise bonus to insight checks when looking to discern if someone is lying to you.

name: Weight of the Mountain
descriptionHtml:
You prepare to strike with enhanced power.

Your next attack with a two-handed melee weapon this turn loses the keywords: Lock On and Sure Hit. In addition, you do not gain accuracy from your Focus on the enhanced attack. The attack also cannot benefit from Offstep and similar effects that guarantee the attack hits.

Instead, the attack deals extra damage equal to the accuracy lost from not gaining Focus due to Weight of the Mountain. If the attack is a heavy or precise attack, it deals extra damage equal to double the accuracy lost instead. 

If the attack made with this effect already did not benefit from focus, this ability has no effect.
descriptionText:
You prepare to strike with enhanced power.

Your next attack with a two-handed melee weapon this turn loses the keywords: Lock On and Sure Hit. In addition, you do not gain accuracy from your Focus on the enhanced attack. The attack also cannot benefit from Offstep and similar effects that guarantee the attack hits.

Instead, the attack deals extra damage equal to the accuracy lost from not gaining Focus due to Weight of the Mountain. If the attack is a heavy or precise attack, it deals extra damage equal to double the accuracy lost instead.

If the attack made with this effect already did not benefit from focus, this ability has no effect.

name: Weight of the World
descriptionHtml: You increase the target’s gravity, reducing their elevation by 40ft. This may interrupt movement and if you reduce their elevation down to 0, you slam them into the ground dealing fall damage for the distance they failed to move and knocking them prone.
descriptionText: You increase the target’s gravity, reducing their elevation by 40ft. This may interrupt movement and if you reduce their elevation down to 0, you slam them into the ground dealing fall damage for the distance they failed to move and knocking them prone.
requirementHtml: Target enemy is flying or jumping.
requirementText: Target enemy is flying or jumping.

name: Whisper of the Streets
descriptionHtml: You recall conversations you had with business partners. This grants you a +5 to any Reason check.
descriptionText: You recall conversations you had with business partners. This grants you a +5 to any Reason check.

name: White Thunder
descriptionHtml: You target a Glacial Wall in range and fire a bolt of Frost energy that requires line of sight. On impact, the wall is destroyed and explodes into blades of ice, attacking all enemies within 5ft of the destroyed wall with a Precise attack that deals Frost damage. On damage, the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.

name: Wild Bloom
descriptionHtml: You apply Regrowth to up to 5 (including yourself) allies within range.
descriptionText: You apply Regrowth to up to 5 (including yourself) allies within range.

name: Wild Thrusts
descriptionHtml:
You rapidly thrust your weapon in front of you, making a Light attack against all enemies in a 15ft wide, 10ft long box in front of you. Until the start of your next turn, you may make Attacks of Opportunity against any enemy walking through that box. You cannot make any other Attacks of Opportunity while this effect lasts.

You may cancel this effect for 0 RP.

name: Wind Blast
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light Attack that deals Wind against the target. On damage, you push the target back 20ft. Targets knocked into other characters or an object take damage as if they fell a distance equal to distance they failed to move.
descriptionText: You may make a Light Attack that deals Wind against the target. On damage, you push the target back 20ft. Targets knocked into other characters or an object take damage as if they fell a distance equal to distance they failed to move.

name: Wind Blast II
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy Attack (2 AP) that deals Wind damage against the target. On damage, you push the target back 20ft.
descriptionText: You may make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy Attack (2 AP) that deals Wind damage against the target. On damage, you push the target back 20ft.

name: Wind Buffet
descriptionHtml: You blow wind in a 30ft, 60ft degree cone in your chosen direction. All caught in the cone must make a save against your Potency or be blown back to the end of the cone and knocked Prone. Enemies with a size smaller than you suffer a 1d4 penalty to this roll, while enemies bigger than you get a 1d4 bonus instead. Targets knocked into other characters or an object take damage as if they fell a distance equal to distance they failed to move.

Targets knocked into other characters or an object take damage as if they fell a distance equal to distance they failed to move.

name: Wind Infusion
descriptionHtml: You surround the willing target in protective winds, changing their typing to Wind II. As a Wind II type, they take regular damage from all other elements, but only half damage from Wind or Earth damage or from attacks with the Wind or Earth keyword unless that attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Frost damage or attacks with the Frost keyword. While the ward lasts, they gain a +2 bonus to their Evasion against ranged weapon attacks. The ward lasts until the end of the encounter or until their type is overwritten by a more powerful type.

name: Wind Shield
descriptionHtml: You grant the target  1 RP that must be spent on the basic Dodge or Block action against the triggering attack as well as Wind Shield. Wind Shield grants a bonus to Dodge equal to your Focus against the triggering attack. The triggering attack can also no longer benefit from Lock On or Sure Hit

name: Wind Wall
descriptionHtml: You create a wall of wind that is 30ft long, 5ft wide and 10ft high that slows down all ranged weapon attacks passing through it, treating them as having only half the normal range. This wall must be a straight line. These attacks also lose the Lock On, Sure Hit, Half Pierce, Guard Crush and Full Pierce keywords. In addition, the targets of those attacks are treated as having +2 Evasion and +1 Guard. Any Spells that are considered attacks (those that require an accuracy roll against a person that isn’t using the Block reaction) that pass through the wall also suffer this penalty.

name: Wind-Empowered Aim
descriptionHtml: You project Wind-Empowered Aim aura around yourself that empowers the ranged attacks of your allies. When a heroic ally within 20ft of you (including yourself) makes a ranged attack, they may add 1d4 to the accuracy roll. Upkeep: You must spend 1 AP at the start of each turn or the Aura fades.

name: Wind-up Punch
descriptionHtml: You may make a Heavy attack against the target. Overcharge: You may spend additional AP when using this ability to deal an additional Light Damage per AP used. Add all of this damage together before applying damage reduction from Guard or abilities.
descriptionText: You may make a Heavy attack against the target. Overcharge: You may spend additional AP when using this ability to deal an additional Light Damage per AP used. Add all of this damage together before applying damage reduction from Guard or abilities.

name: Wire Sweep
descriptionHtml: You whip your wire to ensnare the target. If they fail their save against your Potency+2 they are rendered Prone and take Light Damage.
descriptionText: You whip your wire to ensnare the target. If they fail their save against your Potency+2 they are rendered Prone and take Light Damage.

requirementText: Saboteur Threaded Dagger only.

name: Wither the Stalk
descriptionHtml:
You strike an enemy with an attack that saps their strength. You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target cannot add their Power for damage to their next attack.

Does not work against Boss enemies.

name: X-Attack
descriptionHtml: You give your summon a +1 Focus and +1 Power buff.

name: Zap
descriptionHtml: You may make a Light attack against the target, dealing Lightning damage. On damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus X 3.

name: Zhen Jiao
descriptionHtml: When you move toward an enemy as part of a Martial Artist or Bajiquan ability due to Fire Stance or an inherent move effect of the ability (such as Rushing Knee Drop), your attack deals three extra points of damage for every 5ft moved. If your attack hits more than once or more than one target, you only apply this damage once.
